We have also been fortunate to have received national recognition as a progressive and extremely well managed business through best exporter award and best tax payer in export category. Currently more than 3000 people are employing directly in five different operating units in Kathmandu, producing more than 75000 pairs every day.

Name: Rock Fall
Description:
Pioneering the Future of Safety Footwear

At Rock Fall UK, innovation isn’t just a buzzword—it’s in our DNA. As a multi-award-winning safety footwear specialist, we’re committed to pushing the boundaries of performance, sustainability, and comfort.

Founded in 1997, we are a second-generation, family-run business that has grown into a global leader in safety footwear, supplying industries worldwide. With a strong presence in the UK, a distribution network spanning the globe, and a dedicated warehouse in the USA, we ensure that cutting-edge safety solutions reach those who need them most—wherever they are.

We don’t just create footwear; we challenge the norm. Our relentless drive for innovation means we embrace change, test new ideas, and continuously refine our designs. From integrating plant based materials and recycled components to ensuring each one of our styles is packaged using zero plastic, recycled card and printed using soy based ink, we’re leading the charge toward a more responsible future. Many of our products are also certified by The Vegan Society, reinforcing our commitment to ethical and forward-thinking manufacturing.

Beyond product innovation, we support our distribution partners with world-leading point-of-sale (POS) solutions, helping them showcase our footwear effectively in-store and educate customers on the latest advancements in safety technology. We also work directly with end users, conducting on-site audits to assess workplace environments and ensure they are equipped with the most suitable, high-performance safety footwear for their specific needs.

At Rock Fall, we believe that everyone deserves to work safely and comfortably—without compromise. If you share our passion for game-changing safety footwear and want to be part of something bigger, we’d love to connect.

Let’s redefine safety footwear, together.

Name: V12 Footwear
Description:
When it comes to tough resilient footwear that offers safety and comfort, V12 lead the way. 

We've developed a diverse range of workwear boots that offer unbeatable protection and comfort all day long. From oil platforms to railway tracks, construction sites and farms, our wearers work in some of the harshest most unpredictable environments. That's why every pair of V12 boots or shoes is developed with the wearer in mind, to offer safety and comfort as standard.

Since we founded V12 in 1998 we have supplied full strength footwear to high profile industry leaders such as BP, Honda and Sky. Although we operate on a global scale our goal is to provide a personal service with honesty & integrity, quality and excellence at the fore. And to make sure that we're also on hand with friendly customer service whenever you need it.

But our high standards don't stop there. We constantly invest time and resources into product development and extreme testing to deliver durable footwear that exceeds standard safety requirements. We currently work closely with specialists across several industries to identify and research the hazards and challenges that workers face. And with leading technology and cutting edge materials we continue to develop new solutions and designs that allow wearers to step forward with confidence.

Name: Sebago
Description:
Sebago was established in Westbrook, Maine (Usa), in 1946. Daniel J. Wellehan, owner of five shoe shops in the area, decided to open his own factory. He became partners with two local shoe manufacturers - William Beaudoin and Joseph Cordeau - and Sebago-Moc was born.

The name was inspired by nearby lake Sebago, that in the native Abenaki language means “long-shaped water basin”. Its first mocassin, the renowned “penny loafer”, was created in the same year, handsewn as by native tradition, still one of the brand’s best-sellers. 

The first yachting shoes came out in 1948, but their patent was sold to Uniroyal. In 1950 Sebago-Moc’s turnover reached 1 million dollars and in 1952 daily production reached 2000 pairs of shoes: a new plant was built. 
In 1965 the company started selling in Europe thanks to a partnership with entrepreneur Francisco Gaudier.In 1963 it started to manufacture women’s shoes; in 1970 it launched the Docksides design, another of the brand’s best sellers.
For the occasion the company name was simplified into Sebago. 
In 1978, passionate sailor and CNN founder Ted Turner agrees in lending his own image to Docksides products.
In 1981 the Campsides outdoor line was launched.In 1984 Sebago was the first American company to sponsor a boat in the O-Star Race. 
In the late 90s the company went through a time of crisis that peaked in 2003 when Sebago was acquired by US company Wolverine World Wide, Inc.
On July 31st, 2017 the brand became part of the BasicNet Group’s portfolio.

Name: Innolux Footwear
Description:
Working from Europe in Vietnam - Innolux Footwear Group's Development Center and Footwear Factory is based in the South of Vietnam. Our team are 2nd and 3rd generation shoe makers, spread across 15 different nationalities. 

MU1 is 100% European owned, managed and operated since 2017. MU1 is specialized in the production of lifestyle, casual and outdoor shoes. We know what it takes to transform a tech pack to a commercially attractive and comfortable shoe, as per your brands and markets wish. 

Most factories in Vietnam stick to mass manufacturing, but we start thinking about your footwear one step ahead. We speak your language, both in Vietnam and the Netherlands, as shown on the picture, where Innolux opened an office and showroom South of Amsterdam to discuss and develop making footwear in Vietnam. 

Making outsoles, creating last, our development team is there for all your sampling needs, from fitting samples to prototypes, confirmation to bulk sales samples. Our technicians, sourcers and developers are all under one roof, resulting in faster, smoother footwear development.

Name: JALLATTE
Description:
Créé en 1947 par Pierre Jallatte, Jallatte représente une marque historique dans le secteur des chaussures de sécurité. Son savoir-faire est le résultat d'années d'expérience et constitue le point de référence du marché européen.
Depuis près de 80 ans, sécurité, confort, esthétique et bien-être sont les jalons d'un processus qui a conduit Jallatte à prendre naturellement en compte les questions de santé liées au port des chaussures de sécurité. Une réflexion que Jallatte intègre totalement à la conception de ses produits.

Name: Umoja Shoe Company Ltd
Description:
Africa has always lived on its feet. Ever since man took his first faltering steps in the great Rift Valley, Africans have been renowned as the world's best walkers. Today Africans are still walking tall, but with one notable exception: the extra milage provided by their Umoja Shoes. 
Since its own first steps in the late 1970s, Umoja Shoe Company Ltd. has helped to put affordable shoes on millions of feet across Africa. From kenya to Congo, Ethiopia to Madagascar, Umoja has become a household name- a name that stands fro strength, confort, value and reliability. 
Today's bustling Umoja Headquarters is a far cry from the small slipper factory that opened with 26 employees on Mombasa Island in 1978. The Company's Mtwapa headquarters today employs more than 1,600 people and produces a phenomenol 100,000 pairs of slippers and 30,000 pairs of canvas shoes eveyday. As its name implies Umoja is 'number one' in every regard. But it is not just its products that put Umoja several steps ahead of the competition. The company has become one of Mombasa's lifeblood industries, and a solid pillar of East African Economy. In one decade, Mtwapa has grown from a village fo 1,000 people into a thriving community of more than 200,000. 
Today Umoja slippers and shoes are worn by people from all walks of life. From the sylish Pigeon ladies' shoes to its famous Simba and Ndovu slippers, Umoja footwear can be found gracing feet and floors the length and breadth of Africa.
The Key to Umoja's success lies in its broad randge of string, stylish shoes- currently available in more than 50 designs and more than 600 different colors.

Name: YIHFULL FOOTWEAR INDONESIA
Description: Established in 2022, PT YIHFULL FOOTWEAR INDONESIA is a company part of LaiYih Group. Office based in Semarang, Indonesia, we dedicated to distributing a wide range of high-quality footwear to global markets.

Name: Industrias Manrique SAC
Description:
Somos fabricantes peruanos con más de 26 años especializados en calzado de seguridad industrial, creadores de las marcas EINS y HOLZ & STEIN. Distribuimos a los principales representantes de los sectores productivos de nuestro país. 

Estamos orgullosos de ser la primera empresa peruana del rubro que logra obtener 4 normas ISO internacionales: 9001, 14001, 45001 y 37001, además de haber obtenido la segunda estrella de Huella de Carbono, alcanzados en base a esfuerzo y dedicación de nuestros colaboradores por lo cual garantizamos nuestro compromiso por brindarles calzados con tecnología, diseño y calidad siendo socialmente responsables. Protegemos al trabajador de hoy y a la tierra del mañana. 

Ponemos la seguridad a tus pies!

Name: Tamaris
Description:
Ein Schuh, viel Weißfläche und jede Menge Raum für Fantasie – ein starker Produktfokus ist die DNA der Marke Tamaris. Klar im Design und konsequent in der Bildsprache. Seit mehr als einem halben Jahrhundert gehört unsere Leidenschaft Schuhen, die den Moment perfekt machen – und zwar jeden!  Vom roten Teppich bis zum Waldweg. An Alltagen und besonderen Tagen. Moderne und stilbewusste Frauen finden in unseren Kollektionen eine außergewöhnliche Modellbreite mit speziellen Features. Wir kennen die Bedürfnisse unserer Kundinnen und sind daher auch bei Optimierungs- und Innovationsprozessen immer eine Schuhlänge voraus. Eine optimale Passform, der bestmögliche Tragekomfort und eine zuverlässige Qualität stehen bei Tamaris an erster Stelle.

Mit einer Markenbekanntheit von mehr als 90 Prozent hat unsere reichweitenstarke Brand Kampagne den Weg geebnet für einen neuen Schritt: Erstmalig gewähren wir als Marke einen Blick hinter die weiße Leinwand und machen echte Frauen und ihre einzigartigen Geschichten zu den Protagonistinnen einer neuen und emotionalen Kommunikation. Eine Reise weg von der punktuellen Werbeerinnerung hin zu einer kontinuierlichen Interaktion mit der Zielgruppe. Denn wir glauben daran, dass jede Frau auf ihre Art einmalig ist – in jedem Alter, mit jeder Hautfarbe, mit jeder Einschränkung und all ihren Erfahrungen. Diversität und Authentizität sind die Treiber unserer Kommunikation, während die passenden Schuhe, die Persönlichkeit ganz individuell unterstreichen. Denn kein Weg gleicht dem der anderen. Jeder Schritt, jede Geschichte, jede Frau und jeder Schuh ist unterschiedlich – einzigartig.

Name: Priority Shoes
Description:
Bem-vindo à Priority Shoes, somos uma empresa apaixonada por calçados com mais de 35 anos de experiência no mercado calçadista.

Aqui, nós não paramos. Nossa cultura de inovação impulsiona um vasto portfólio de modelos produzidos. São mais de 10 mil modelos até hoje, e continuamos a crescer, sempre atualizados com as tendências e as mudanças no setor.

Exportamos para mais de 72 países, pois desde a pesquisa de tendências até a entrega do calçado na caixa, estamos sempre conectados ao mundo e suas transformações. 

Somos do tamanho de nossa história, pois permanecemos fiéis à nossa vocação: desenvolver e fabricar calçados com excelência. Com ampla experiência no mercado calçadista, oferecemos serviços divididos em três pilares:

O Priority Lab conta com uma equipe qualificada para desenvolver o melhor que seu projeto pede.

Já o Priority Manufacturing vai desde a pré-produção até a entrega final, contando com toda a estrutura da fábrica e a expertise dos nossos profissionais.

Seja para terceirização, exportação ou private label.
Conte ainda com o Priority Corporate, um serviço para quem precisa de calçados personalizados com a identidade visual de sua empresa, seja para uniformização dos seus colaboradores ou para comercialização de produtos promocionais.

Todas essas soluções, em um único lugar. De ponta a ponta do processo. Grande ou pequeno. Conte com a gente.

Priority Shoes

Mount to Coast is an award-winning footwear brand rooted in long-distance running, aiming to design shoes capable of supporting runners to go way beyond the 26.2 miles of a standard marathon.

With its own biomechanics laboratory, Mount to Coast integrates innovative midsole materials inspired from various industries to engineer running shoes that offer exceptional comfort, support, energy return, and durability for enduring the most extensive distances. Name: Estival Calçados de Segurança
Description:
A Estival Calçados de Segurança foi fundada em 1992 na cidade Alemã de Dusseldorf, como agente exportador e importador.

Pouco depois, suas instalações foram estendidas para o Brasil, instalando-se na cidade de Franca. Esta ampliação permitiu melhorar e estreitar o relacionamento com fornecedores, e atender melhor seus clientes e pedidos específicos do setor couro-calçadista.

A partir de 1996, a Estival deixou de ser apenas um agente exportador/importador, se firmando como sinônimo de desempenho e confiabilidade em produtos voltados ao mercado de calçados de segurança. Contando com sistemas rigorosos de qualidade na escolha de parceiros para a confecção de seus produtos, a empresa garante aos seus clientes o acesso a constantes inovações tecnológicas, traduzindo-se em desempenho, maior durabilidade e menor custo.

Name: FERAGGIO
Description:
Feraggio is the world’s first perfect heels online store. It was born out of the frustration of never having the right suede heel for all occasions, never finding the same heel in different heel heights, and never being able to re-order your favorite shoe or find the same shoe in different colors. This inspired the creation of a new shoe concept: Feraggio.

Always the same heel and always in stock, Feraggio heels are available in two heel heights and multiple colors, making Feraggio the perfect suede heel for every shoe collection.

Combining timeless elegance with maximum comfort, Feraggio heels are beautifully designed and thoughtfully constructed from the highest quality materials and the best in European manufacturing.

Feraggio heels are the must-have shoe, perfect for every need, every occasion and every woman.

More than just a shoe, Feraggio heels are shipped in a unique black box storage system. This luxury gift box has been designed to easily access and view your Feraggio suede heels. Each box has an anti-slip mat for easy stacking, and a unique pull out drawer with an image label to display the box contents.

WALK TALLER, STAND LONGER AND BE FABOULOUS

#FeraggioHeels #PerfectHeels #ComfortableHeels

Name: SAGUARO
Description:
Fuzhou Toloog E-commerce Co., Ltd. is a cross-border e-commerce enterprise dedicated to foot health shoes, Established in 2010 and headquartered in Fuzhou, Fujian Province, the company has grown into an industry player with a 250-strong elite team—among them, SAGUARO, as Toloog’s flagship barefoot shoe brand.
SAGUARO is not just a barefoot shoe brand—it’s a advocate for “returning feet to their natural state of movement.” For a decade, we have centered our R&D on the physiological characteristics of human feet and the principles of natural biomechanics, crafting"true barefoot shoes" that break free from the constraints of traditional footwear. Every pair of SAGUARO shoes adheres to three core design standards: " Zero-drop soles","Ultra-thin and flexible soles""Wide toe boxes"
Our design philosophy goes beyond “comfort”—it’s about "rebuilding foot strength and reviving natural movement patterns", just as nature intended. Modern lifestyles (long periods of sitting, rigid footwear) often weaken foot muscles and disrupt the body’s inherent stride; SAGUARO’s shoes counteract this by letting feet move freely, gradually strengthening arches, improving balance, and reducing fatigue even after hours of wear. 
If you’re looking to enrich your footwear section with a brand that combines foot health, functional design, and global market appeal, SAGUARO is the ideal addition. Let SAGUARO help you tap into the fast-growing global barefoot shoe market and deliver tangible value to customers seeking healthier, more natural footwear options.

Name: Botina Mineira
Description:
A Botina Mineira é uma fábrica de calçados artesanais localizada em Frutal, Minas Gerais, especializada na produção de botinas de couro legítimo que unem tradição, conforto e resistência.

Com um processo de fabricação que valoriza o trabalho manual e o cuidado em cada detalhe, a Botina Mineira mantém viva a essência do calçado rústico e autêntico, fabricando produtos que representam o estilo e a força de quem vive o dia a dia com intensidade — seja no campo, na estrada ou na cidade.

Nosso propósito é entregar calçados duráveis, confortáveis e cheios de identidade, que refletem o compromisso com a qualidade e o respeito à tradição mineira. Cada par carrega nossa história: feita com dedicação, ética e amor pelo que fazemos.

Entre nossas principais linhas estão:
 Vaqueira Premium – design tradicional e acabamento impecável;
 Vaqueira Confort – a combinação perfeita entre estilo e palmilha de conforto;
 Montana – robustez e autenticidade para o trabalho e o lazer.

Com solados de borracha pura, palmilhas duplas e acabamento artesanal, nossos produtos são desenvolvidos para oferecer resistência e conforto em qualquer terreno.

Mais do que calçados, entregamos confiança, tradição e orgulho mineiro.
Porque, para nós, calçar Botina Mineira é vestir um modo de vida.

 www.botinamineira.com.br

Name: FootDirectClub

At FootDirectClub, we understand that foot pain can be debilitating, affecting both physical comfort and overall well-being. We also recognize the barriers that prevent many individuals from seeking professional assistance, such as cost constraints and limited access to healthcare. That's why we've developed a range of exceptional insoles that provide effective support and relief, right at your fingertips. Our commitment to quality is unwavering. We proudly manufacture all our insoles in America, adhering to the highest standards of craftsmanship and utilizing cutting-edge materials and technologies. By ensuring the production takes place locally, we not only maintain strict quality control but also support our domestic economy and local workforce.Whether it's running, hiking, dancing, or simply strolling through life, let us be your support system on this incredible journey. Name: Dochaa
Description:
Welcome to Dochaa, where cultural heritage meets modern design. Founded in 2017, Dochaa crafts high-quality footwear using traditional Nepali fabrics and patterns, celebrating our rich cultural heritage. Our shoes provide comfort and durability, meeting global quality standards made right here in Nepal.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between treasured traditions and today's fast-paced world. By incorporating traditional fabrics and their stories into daily life, Dochaa rekindles love for our vibrant culture, especially among Nepali youth. We create wearable art that tells the narratives woven into our past.

Dochaa is driven by three core values: Authenticity, Empowerment, and an Enterprising.

Authenticity: We embrace individuality and reflect it in our products, carrying the essence of the cultures and artisans behind them. We honor cultural authenticity and indigeneity in our craftsmanship.

Empowerment: Dochaa empowers communities across Nepal by amplifying their voices and providing economic support. Our creations, made with marginalized communities, aim to empower them and give them a platform to share their narratives.

Enterprising: Our growth from humble beginnings reflects our dynamic energy. Dochaa celebrates culture, identities, art, and respect for our artisans, blending tradition and modernity to help individuals embody their identity.

Our products, including footwear and accessories, fuse unnoticed art with modern design, showcasing Nepal's rich heritage and skilled craftsmanship. We ensure high-quality materials and traditional techniques, creating beautiful and functional items.

Committed to sustainability and ethical practices, We source materials responsibly, ensure fair wages, and promote sustainable practices.
We value customer feedback and continuously improve. Join us in bridging tradition and modernity, preserving cultural heritage, and supporting the artisans and communities who make it possible. Thank you for being a part of Dochaa

Name: SLIC
Description:
Saudi Leather Industries Company (SLIC) was established in 1981 to meet the local and regional requirements of military and safety footwear.

SLIC is a 100% Saudi company and has a manufacturing plant on 15,000 sq. mtr in Dammam 2nd Industrial City in Saudi Arabia. It is equipped with modern machinery and follows modern systems of manufacturing. It is also equipped with a modern laboratory for raw material and finished goods testing in order to guarantee, monitor and assure meeting the required standards and specifications.

In order to keep up with the latest in this industry, SLIC is a member in many international well-known institutes specialized in footwear research and testing. These institutes keep Saudi Leather Industries Company updated with the latest in this field. Since the total quality is a priority in Saudi Leather Industries Company, SLIC is an ISO 9001 certified organization since 1996 until now.

Name: Calzaturificio Dema srl
Description:
Dema è un'azienda italiana specializzata nella produzione di calzature artigianali di alta manifattura per Grandi Case di Moda. 

Nel 2023 entra a far parte di HModa Group diventando Capofila della Footwear Business Unit. 

Fondata nel 1989 da un’iniziativa di Giovanni de Simone, Dema si distingue per l'attenzione ai dettagli, la scelta di materiali di alta qualità e l'artigianalità, che caratterizza ogni fase del suo processo produttivo. Inizialmente specializzata nella realizzazione di mocassini tubolari di alta qualità, l’azienda ha poi ampliato la sua gamma realizzando tutte le principali tipologie di calzature. L’ingresso dei figli Italo, Paolo e Danilo nel 2015 ha segnato una nuova fase di crescita per Dema, con un notevole sviluppo aziendale e la creazione di partnership strategiche con alcuni dei più importanti brand del lusso, sia italiani che internazionali. Questo sviluppo ha portato, nel 2021, alla nascita del tomaificio Alinea, una risorsa chiave che ha incrementato produzione interna e ampliato l'offerta dei servizi.
L'azienda unisce sapientemente tradizione e innovazione, realizzando calzature che combinano eleganza, comfort e durata. Ogni prodotto è il risultato di una profonda esperienza nel settore e di un costante impegno nella ricerca di nuove tecnologie e tendenze, senza mai allontanarsi da valori come l’artigianalità e la produzione Made in Italy. Grazie a un team di artigiani altamente qualificati, L'azienda offre ai clienti un servizio professionale e attento, proponendo soluzioni innovative e di alta qualità.
Oggi, Dema continua a crescere, mantenendo un forte legame con la propria eredità artigianale e guardando al futuro con la volontà di migliorare continuamente, rimanendo fedeli ai valori di qualità, creatività e attenzione al cliente.

All’epoca, le calzature antinfortunistiche e da lavoro erano un universo ancora tutto da esplorare, ma le idee erano già chiare sin da allora: l’obiettivo era di introdurre una visione più orientata all’estetica e al design italiano per un prodotto tradizionalmente di servizio, unendo gli elementi propri dello stile delle calzature urbane alle caratteristiche tecniche indispensabili per una scarpa da lavoro.

Description:

It took its first steps in designing children's models and also dipped its toes into men's footwear. Currently, it specializes in high-quality women's footwear, with a strong sense of aesthetics and fashion.

Season after season, the models that parade through the hands of its collaborators delight those who witness their creation. The art of shoemaking has elevated manufacturing to the level of excellence that we have accustomed our customers to.

ALPIM XXI exports the majority of its production to high-value fashion markets, such as French, Canadian, and American markets. And it supports its customers in the development of new collections, as well as in the creation of new projects linked to what has been considered the "sexiest industry in Europe."

It is our mission to transform raw materials into dreams. At Alpim, customer satisfaction and the satisfaction of its collaborators are paramount. Producing shoes is just one part of the process, which aims to integrate customers into this home and invites them to bring the necessary ingredients to obtain the most refined models.

Name: Calzado Kondor
Description:
Bienvenidos a Calzado Kondor!

Imagina un viaje en el tiempo que nos lleva de vuelta a 1980. En ese año, nacimos con una visión: proteger los pasos de quienes construyen el futuro. Hoy, más de cuatro décadas después, seguimos comprometidos con esa visión.

Somos Calzado Kondor, una empresa con más de 40 años de experiencia en el mercado del calzado de seguridad industrial. Nuestra pasión es la protección, y nuestro enfoque es el pie. En un mundo en constante evolución, hemos abrazado la tecnología para crear diseños únicos y cómodos que se adaptan a las necesidades de cada área laboral.

Nos enorgullece decir que nuestros pasos han trascendido fronteras. Exportamos nuestros productos a ocho países, y nuestro horizonte se extiende aún más allá. Nuestro objetivo es convertirnos en un referente en el área andina, Centroamérica y el Caribe, llevando nuestra misión de seguridad y comodidad a nuevas tierras.

Nuestra historia es una narrativa de dedicación, innovación y compromiso. Nos levantamos cada día con un propósito claro: seguir sirviendo durante muchos años más y ser vanguardistas en la protección del pie de nuestros clientes. Porque cada paso que damos, cada diseño que creamos y cada innovación que implementamos, nos acerca un paso más a un mundo donde los riesgos laborales se minimizan y los trabajadores se sienten seguros en cada paso que dan.

Únete a nosotros en este viaje, donde el pie es el héroe y la seguridad es nuestra guía. Juntos, construiremos un futuro más seguro, paso a paso.

Gracias por ser parte de la comunidad Calzado Kondor!

Name: 3D Fit Shoes
Description:
OUR STORY
Founded by an American, 3D Fit Shoes is an innovative company specialized in the production of made-to-measure footwear, especially designed for individuals who struggle to find suitable shoes in conventional stores.

3D Fit Shoes is present in every state of Brazil, offering a unique footwear solutions to the challenges faced by those seeking footwear tailored to their specific needs.

Our company's distinctive feature lies in the application of cutting-edge technology. 3D Fit Shoes footwear is meticulously crafted using 3D scanning and printing technology with millimeter-precision digital accuracy. This innovative process enables the creation of made-to-measure shoes, taking into account not only aesthetic design but also the unique anatomical characteristics of each individual.

OUR FACTORY
3D Fit Shoes operates its own factory in São Paulo for the production of all custom shoes. The factory currently houses over 180 3D printers, ensuring a fully digital and efficient production process. Our footwear is ready in 5 business days and is delivered to customers’ homes in record time.

OUR PURPOSE
At 3D Fit Shoes, we are dedicated to transforming the footwear industry by introducing an innovative approach that is cost-effective, efficiently manufactured, and customized to meet each customer’s unique needs. We recognize that many individuals encounter difficulties when attempting to find a solution through traditional retail channels, and we endeavor to provide a precise solution to this challenge.

At 3D Fit Shoes, we believe that everyone deserves to experience the comfort and confidence that comes with a perfectly fitting pair of shoes. Our mission is to democratize access to made-to-measure footwear by making it more accessible, affordable, and convenient for individuals of all walks of life.

Name: Camminare Boots
Description:
Camminare Boots – Polish Quality, European Style
Camminare Boots is a Polish manufacturer specializing in high-quality EVA boots and clogs, trusted by professionals and individuals across Europe. Our footwear combines Italian-inspired design with reliable Polish craftsmanship, resulting in products that are lightweight, durable, and comfortable.
For over 20 years, Camminare Boots has been committed to supporting people at work and in everyday life, offering a wide selection of footwear designed for different needs:
•	Safety boots for demanding industrial and construction environments, providing protection and grip where it matters most.
•	Medical clogs for healthcare professionals, ensuring comfort during long shifts and easy cleaning for maximum hygiene.
•	Leisure clogs for everyday comfort, perfect for home, garden, or casual wear.
•	Fishing boots designed to withstand wet and challenging conditions, keeping feet dry and protected.
•	Agricultural boots made to handle tough outdoor work, offering resistance and comfort for long hours in the field.
Why choose Camminare Boots?
•	We are innovators. Camminare Boots stands out for its constant drive to improve and reinvent protective footwear. We have developed and perfected advanced materials such as EVA++, setting new standards for lightness, durability, and comfort in the industry.
•	Custom solutions. If you are looking for something unique or have specific requirements, our team is ready to work with you to develop tailored solutions that fit your needs.
•	Certified safety and comfort. All Camminare Boots products are certified, waterproof, and designed for maximum comfort—no matter the environment or challenge.
•	With over 20 years in the market, Camminare Boots combines experience, passion, and a commitment to sustainability in everything we do.
If you’re looking for boots or clogs that combine safety, comfort, and style—at work or at home—Camminare Boots is your reliable partner every step of the way.

Name: The Bag Belt
Description:
Nuestra marca Comienza un 4 de diciembre. Ese día marcó nuestra memoria, ya que abríamos las puertas de nuestro primer local.
Con emoción recordamos que se encontraba en Galería Libertad. Pleno centro de la ciudad de Rosario, Santa Fe.
Instantáneamente fuimos aceptados por el público.
En ese momento, el local vendía: ropa, carteras y zapatos. No teníamos muy en claro, qué rubro iba a ser el principal o definitivo. En ese entonces nos bautizamos como “The Bag & The Belt” Refiriéndonos exclusivamente a carteras y accesorios.
En el transcurso de esos primeros meses identificamos que el calzado era lo que más buscaban. Y sus preferidos eran los confeccionados por nosotros mismos.
A partir de ese momento crecimos y con ello la apertura de más locales.
Palace Garden, hoy situado en Córdoba 1617 Shopping del Siglo, Mitre 842, Portal Rosario Shopping, Alto Rosario Shopping, de la ciudad de Rosario.
Luego, nos fuimos haciendo lugar en otras provincias. Honduras 4802 (Caba), Alto Comauhe Shopping Neuquén, La Ribera Shopping Santa Fe Capital.
Varias franquicias en Reconquista, San Nicolás, Salta y Comodoro Rivadavia.
Felizmente anunciamos la última apertura en la provincia de Mendoza, Plaza Shopping.
En todo ese proceso de aperturas y crecimiento, la marca cambió a “The Bag Belt”
Encontramos en todos estos años, la capacidad de brindarle a nuestras clientas (mujeres diferentes y practicas) colecciones aceptadas año tras año.
Nos propusimos ofrecerles líneas con los más exquisitos gustos, con materiales importados, pero sin perder lo esencial; NUESTROS PROPIOS DISEÑOS!
Además no dejamos de apostar a nuestro país, todos nuestros cueros son regionales, de las mejores curtiembres que existen en la plaza.
Hoy, llegamos a los 21 años, luchados y exitosos. No dejamos de soñar y proyectar.
Con nuestra fuerza de trabajo, nuestra gente, la cual trabaja con profunda dedicación, para conseguir día a día que esta marca siga creciendo.

Name: Serafini Sneakers
Description:
In 1885 the shoemaker Giuseppe Serafini opened his first store in Castiglion Fiorentino, in the province of Arezzo, signaling the beginning of a family and company history that brought to the world of footwear freshness and unique style that would endure for generations to come.
But in 1985 when Fabrizio took over, the historic SERAFINI company set off on a totally new and original course.
Can a shoe be elegant, like a handmade shoe, but still be comfortable and modern like a sneaker? And this is how FLAT was created, a model that identified SERAFINI and became successful as it conquered international buyers the world over.
SERAFINI's collections are distributed in over 10 countries and are well on their way to paving the road for the evolution of SERAFINI into an authentic Made in Italy life style brand.

Name: Merit Medilinks
Description:
We are manufacturers of Orthopaedic, Diabetic and Customised footwear. Our team of footwear experts bring you the best quality medical footwear that incorporates latest global research, while being fashionable, comfortable and affordable! 

We make high quality MCR / MCP footwear that provides gait correction, postural stability, and weight distribution. It provides relief from back, knee, heel, ankle and metatarsal pain and helps correct issues like flatfoot, leg length discrepancy, corn, bunion, amputation, elephantiasis, polio, body balance issues, and Achilles Tendonitis. 

We also specialise in preventive footwear for pregnant ladies, children, and diabetic patients. 

"Healthy Feet, Happy Life! :)"

Name: ONYC
Description:
ONYC was founded to address the challenges parents face in finding trendy, colorful, and well-fitted footwear for their children. The brand's mission is to provide well-fitted and gripped footwear for kids, emphasizing both style and comfort.

What sets ONYC apart is its commitment to responsible and child-friendly manufacturing, using 100% biodegradable raw materials. Each shoe is thoughtfully designed to support healthy foot development, focusing on ergonomics.

To ensure a perfect fit, ONYC conducted a comprehensive survey involving over 500 families, addressing common sizing issues. Unlike modern designs that may hinder foot development, ONYC prioritizes ergonomically correct designs for natural movement and sensory feedback.

At ONYC, fashion meets functionality in the most kid-friendly way. Explore a colorful and responsibly crafted world of kids' footwear at www.onyc.in. Gift your children style, comfort, and healthy development with ONYC.

Name: American Sole
Description:
At AMERICAN SOLE, we help customers realize their ultimate vision for their finished product. We’ve been there and know how daunting the manufacturing process can be. Tap into our expertise and realize your dreams.

Global Sourcing:   We collaborate with renowned brands to identify and procure the finest materials worldwide. These materials are carefully selected for their quality and durability, ensuring that our final product meets the highest standards.

Partial Assembly:  Some specialized construction work is carried out overseas, before they make their way to our state-of-the-art facility in San Antonio, Texas. We leverage expertise and efficiency in certain stages of the manufacturing process. This helps us maintain a competitive edge while adhering to stringent quality standards.

Affordable Made in USA: We offer brands an affordable option without compromising on the exceptional quality customers expect. We take pride in delivering value without sacrificing excellence. Contact us today if you're currently importing 100% finished footwear and are interested in supporting American craftsmanship. We believe in empowering all workers and promoting pride in American craftsmanship.

At AMERICAN SOLE,  we provide brands and customers with high-quality, cost-effective footwear solutions that reflect the pride and excellence we feel in our products. Join us in making a difference and experiencing the unmatched quality of our boots.

Name: Botas.cz
Description:
Celé to začalo v roce 1949 ve Skutči.

Původně se obuvnický podnik nazýval Botana a od roku 1963 vyráběl sportovní obuv pod názvem Botas, což znamená BOTA-Skuteč.

Výroba se rozrůstala a stejně tak rostla i prestiž značky.

Botasky obouvali přední čeští sportovci jako třeba Emil Zátopek, Věra Čáslavská nebo Jaromír Jágr.

Produkce sportovní obuvi směřovala na trhy celého světa. Botasky si podmanily Anglii, Francii, Německo i Ameriku. V devadesátkách využívaly tyto kvalitní produkce světoznámé značky jako PUMA, nebo SALOMON.

Pojem botaska vstoupil do povědomí celého národa.

Na začátku roku 2023 však tato legenda oznámila likvidaci. Toho si všimnul i Václav Staněk, zakladatel firmy Vasky. Odmítnul se smířit s koncem legendární české firmy Botas. Botasek se však nechtěla vzdát ani široká veřejnost a tak se díky neuvěřitelné podpoře Vaskám podařilo získat potřebné finance a značku Botas zachránit.

Nyní začínáme psát další kapitolu. Věnujeme se výrobě původní řady Authentic, jíž si můžete pamatovat z předešlých let. Zároveň navrhujeme novou kolekci botasek, které ocení každý milovník sportu a těšit se můžete i na novinky v podobě oblečení, které vám dopřeje pohodlí a styl na každém kroku v botaskách.

Name: 豐泰企業股份有限公司 (TWSE: 9910)
Description:
豐泰企業成立於 1971 年，以製造運動鞋為主要業務，於 2002 將企業總部遷至雲林科技工業園區現址，目前企業員工總人數約 14 萬人，為主要客戶 Nike 最資深之製鞋合作夥伴。

豐泰秉持立足台灣，放眼世界之精神，在台灣深耕多年後，於 1988 年在中國成立荔豐鞋業開發公司；之後持續於印尼、越南、印度海外據點擴充成長。

豐泰企業以製鞋起家，恪遵創辦人王秋雄先生誠信、守法、雙贏、深耕、精緻的經營理念，致力實踐其三大理想追求。在全體職工的努力下，歷經台灣產業轉型及多次全球經濟衰退的挑戰仍屹立不搖，且日益茁壯。

願景:
培育一群 "認同工作理念 / 家人支持 / 以公司為榮之職工"，塑造以 "研發與品質" 為中心思想之企業文化，以經營豐泰公司成為 "穩定獲得合理利潤" 的 "百年製造業者"，並且不斷地關心環境保護，盡力回饋當地社會。

創辦人的三大理想追求 
1.追求合理的利潤 
合理的利潤能夠用來提高員工薪資、改善工作環境與機器設備、引進最新知識與技術，藉以降低生產成本、提升競爭能力，進而獲得更多的訂單和更大的利潤，創造「經營的良性循環」。 

2.追求舒適的生活
豐泰企業力求工作與生活兩者平衡相容。藉由提升工作效率追求公司的整體績效，期許全體職工享有健康舒適的家庭生活。在主管的力行及領導下，人人各盡所能，用最短的時間完成預定產量，減少加班，增加休假日數，俾讓個人享得更多私人時間。 

3.追求長久的生存
豐泰企業以永續經營為首要目標，持續不斷地提升產品格調，以品質精緻而價格合理的產品滿足客戶要求並強化公司競爭力，以期獲得源源不絕的訂單，確保公司長久生存。

三大核心能力
豐泰企業在產品上堅持品質第一，在經營上重視人才發展，在技術上強調研發創新。

1.品質第一 
對於品質的堅持、完美的追求、紀律的要求以及執行的落實，使豐泰不單贏得客戶的肯定與訂單的支持，更在全球競爭的環境中脫穎而出。 

2.人才發展 
透過完善的制度、適切的分工、合理的授權、及時的獎勵並持續的歷練與磨練，使豐泰人擁有獨立自主並全方位的實力，充分發揮個人所長，更能樂在工作。 

3. 研發創新 
藉由長年累積的製鞋專業，廣泛蒐尋各種產業的應用科技並努力不懈地鑽研嘗試，使豐泰不斷地在產品設計上有所創新，在製程與設備上有所改良，更在製鞋技術上有所突破。

Name: The Bag Belt
Description:
4 de diciembre: el comienzo de un sueño

Desde el inicio, el público nos recibió con entusiasmo, aunque aún no sabíamos cuál sería nuestro camino. Vendíamos ropa, carteras y zapatos, pero pronto descubrimos que el calzado artesanal conquistaba a nuestras clientas.

Así nació The Bag & The Belt, con un nombre que reflejaba nuestra pasión por los accesorios. Con el tiempo, evolucionamos a The Bag Belt, expandiendo nuestra identidad y creciendo sin perder nuestra esencia.

 De Rosario al país
Nuestra historia nos llevó a abrir locales en Palace Garden, Shopping del Siglo, Portal Rosario, Alto Rosario, y luego más allá: Buenos Aires, Neuquén, Santa Fe, Mendoza y diversas franquicias en Argentina.

 Diseño y calidad sin fronteras
Año tras año, creamos colecciones pensadas para mujeres prácticas y sofisticadas, combinando materiales importados con los mejores cueros regionales. Cada diseño refleja nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y el amor por lo que hacemos.

 21 años de pasión y crecimiento
Nuestro mayor orgullo es el equipo que hace posible esta marca, con esfuerzo y dedicación. Seguimos soñando, proyectando y apostando al futuro con la misma pasión del primer día.

Gracias por ser parte de nuestra historia!

Name: Befado
Description:
Bielskie Zakłady Obuwia „Befado” to polski producent obuwia tekstylnego, znany i doceniany przez wymagających odbiorców zarówno z kraju, jak i z zagranicy. Jesteśmy liderem na polskim rynku w zakresie wzornictwa oraz bogatej oferty dla każdej grupy wiekowej.
 
Oferujemy obuwie: 
•	dla dzieci, młodzieży, dorosłych
•	dla osób z problemami stóp 

Befado jest opiekunem rozwijających się małych stópek. Modele dziecięce zostały oznaczone znakiem ZDROWA STOPA. Otrzymaliśmy wiele nagród oraz certyfikatów. W 2019 oraz 2021 roku przyznano nam także tytuł Dobra Marka. 

Dr Orto to obuwie profilaktyczno-zdrowotne, stworzone z myślą o potrzebach ludzi starszych oraz z problemami stóp. 

Możemy pochwalić się ogromnym doświadczeniem. Jesteśmy nowoczesną marką, ale nie zapominamy o tradycji. Nasza firma już od 95 lat zatrudnia najlepszych fachowców w branży, stawia głównie na jakość i szerokość oferty. 

2 000 000 – tyle par obuwia produkujemy i sprzedajemy rocznie. Komfort, jaki daje obuwie Befado, doceniany jest także przez klientów z bardzo wymagających rynków europejskich takich jak Niemcy, Francja, Czechy, Słowacja, Ukraina czy Bułgaria.

Zachęcamy do kontaktu sklepy, hurtownie chcące zapoznać się z ofertą marki Befado.

Name: Xiamen Yinghe Shoes
Description:
Create a highlight begin with shoes first --that's the reason Xiamen Yinghe comes into being. Yinghe has a variety of footwear for the young ones including the basics such as school and casual as well as sporty and formal footwear. A large collection of shoes styles were developed every month. There's always a good find in YINGHE. Its affordable price makes it competitive given its consignor-based set-up. These are just but some of the milestones of the company. Product quality, customer service, and professional manufacturers with a hand on the skillful control of fixed and variable costs are considered keys to the company's consistent success.

Relentless in our pursuit of "create a highlight begins with your shoes first", we provide low MOQ service, say 200pairs each color each style. Customized styles are acceptable, such as your DIY drawing can be applied onto the sneaker. Our factory was certificated by SEDEX, BSCI, DISNEY, WALMART, K-MART and Tesco etc., with Eco-Friendly materials applied in compliance with the standard of PROP65 OR CPSIA or REACH as per client's request. 

Xiamen Yinghe goes to attend the Canton fair in every May and November, winning a good reputation among both European & North American buyers. YINGHE also goes abroad to attend the footwear sourcing at Magic in LasVegas, USA & The EXPO RIVA SCHUH (GARDA SHOE SHOW) in Italy. It's convenient to have a face to face meeting for the customers who aren't available to come to China.

YINGHE is located in Xiamen, around 20-minute drive to Xiamen Airport or Xiamen train station. It's our most pleasure of welcoming you come to visit us. Any your inquiry or order are welcomed!

Name: Greer & Anderad
Description:
Seeking Excellence To Deliver Excellence.

Manufacturers of the finest quality handmade leather shoes for men and women. We offer customization and worldwide deliveries.
Greer & Anderad (G&A): luxury, design, perfection
Since its creation in 2016 G&A pursued its vision refining the cultural heritage of craftsmanship and excellence. G&A was Born with the creation of the haut de gamme shoes laboratory by Rizwan Hameed Malik.

Made in Pakistan – Tradition and innovation – Modern attitude married to ancient know-how
The distinctive features of the pure Made in Pakistan remained unchanged through time. Quality, passion for details and rigorous handmade workmanship are the core elements of distinction from its competitors in the exclusive club of the most famous and recognizable luxury brands of the world. Tradition and innovation. These are the parallel pillars G&A built its success on, thanks to the perfect combination of traditional production techniques, as the ability of making entirely made-to-measure shoes, and the evolution in research and design. Peculiarities that a sophisticated customer, who always chooses the best for himself or herself and is updated on the evolution of style, is attracted to. Modern attitude married to ancient know-how. A legacy guarded by the craftsman masters, all of which work in the company since 2016. They witnessed the turn of G&A from a local workshop into a reference brand and kept alive the original passion for extreme quality and beauty.

Name: The Nude Foot
Description:
We created the first functional barefoot shoe that looks cool.
 A shoe designed for movement, made with purpose.
 A barefoot shoe that you can wear with jeans but also train in at a moment’s notice.
  Designed for athletes, movers, and everyday wearers—because wear barefoot shoes, can also be a cool factor
  Handcrafted in Spain using traditional materials and processes, because quality and sustainability matter. Sustainable and zero carbon footprint.
Unlike most barefoot brands, we don’t settle for ugly designs or compromise on performance. The Nude Foot is about bringing the benefits of barefoot to the real world—without sacrificing aesthetics or function.

Why We Exist
The modern shoe industry has failed us.
  Shoes are too narrow—destroying natural foot function.
  Soles are too thick—blocking ground feel and movement.
  Designs are outdated—forcing barefoot users to choose between function and style.
We created The Nude Foot because we believe your shoes should work with your body, not against it.
 It’s time for a shoe that lets you move naturally, look good, and feel great—wherever you go.

Name: JOYAN SAFETY PROTECTION CO.,LTD.
Description:

Our business philosophy is rooted in "credibility first, quality-based," and we continuously enhance our international competitiveness by leveraging our expertise in supply chain management, professional buying services, and collaborative design operations.
As a company that has evolved beyond traditional manufacturing, JOYAN now specializes in providing comprehensive supply chain solutions for safety and functional footwear. We offer a one-stop service platform that encompasses design, development, and production tailored to the specific needs of our clients. Our capabilities extend to managing large-scale orders for major brands, navigating international certifications, and offering flexible supply chain configurations with accompanying certificates.
JOYAN's professional buying services provide procurement and selection advice, factory audits, and comprehensive quality control, ensuring that our clients receive the best solutions for their market needs. Our collaborative design operations enable us to develop new products rapidly, from prototyping to bulk delivery, supported by supply chain financing solutions. Whether serving brand companies or retailers, JOYAN is committed to providing tailored solutions that help clients succeed in the marketplace.

Name: No(N)s
Description:
At No(N)s minimalist & classic shoe design meets sustainability, and every pair of shoes tells a story of artisan craftsmanship. If you’re seeking footwear that seamlessly blends timeless shoe design with the comfort of minimalistic barefoot footwear, look no further.
 
In our collection, you will find a diverse range of classics such as traditional oxford and derby shoes for men and women, stylish brogue and wingtip dress shoes, elegant knee-high laced boots, combat style boots for all terrains, as well as closed-toe sandals. Most of our footwear is unisex ensuring inclusivity across gender, age, and foot size. Our footwear features wide toe sections, narrow heels, and a design that promotes natural foot movement and muscle engagement.  

With No(N)s you can enjoy all the foot-friendly features of barefoot footwear, including: 
* A minimal, zero-drop, flexible sole
* A wide toe box
* No arch support
* As well adjusted to the foot as possible


No shoe will last forever. But we aim for a very long lifetime for No(N)s by using high quality materials and expert handcraft. No(N)s barefoot boots and shoes are exclusively made with premium materials. Crafted from hand picked leathers from ethical tanneries, our footwear is both breathable and for most part biodegradable. Our shoes and boots are also always repairable: The leather part can be patched, the seams can be re-sewn, the sole can be partially or completely replaced. 

Crafted exclusively in Estonia, EU, every pair of No(N)s footwear is a testament to artisanal expertise and beloved shoe designs.
 
Katrin Koch-Maasing, our head designer and brand owner, is a 5th generation artisan. Our trusted production partner Samelin has nearly a century of experience in footwear production and vast expertise in modern shoe-production. This means that you can be sure - every single pair of No(N)s meets the highest standards of quality and comfort.

Description:

Name: Anna und Paul
Description:
Willkommen bei Anna und Paul – Pionier der Krabbelschuhe. 

Wir stellen die Kinder in den Mittelpunkt: für Kinder gemacht, von Eltern geliebt!
Seit über 20 Jahren sind wir auf hochwertige Baby- und Kinderschuhe spezialisiert. Unsere Marke steht für höchste Qualität, exzellente Materialien und erstklassige Verarbeitung.

Unser Ziel ist es, kleine Kinderfüße und die gesunde Entwicklung durch kontinuierliche Qualität, Kreativität und Innovation zu unterstützen. 

Alle Anna und Paul Krabbelschuhe sind Barfußschuhe: strapazierfähig, atmungsaktiv und superweich. Unsere Produktmodelle sind Öko-Test-Sieger und erhalten sehr gute Kundenbewertungen. Fair und liebevoll, aus 100% chromfreiem Leder. 

Unsere Schuhmodelle werden in sorgfältiger Handarbeit unter fairen und umweltfreundlichen Bedingungen in Europa hergestellt. Unsere schadstofffreien Schuhmodelle enthalten keine Weichmacher, bestehen aus pflanzlich gegerbtem Leder und die Farben sind ökologisch abbaubar.

Name: Skobi Shoes
Description:
Skobi is Australia’s only range of children’s shoes designed and founded by Paediatric Podiatrists. With kids'needs at the forefront of all designs, each shoe has been specifically engineered with multifaceted design elements to meet the requirements of the school-yard, and the children who play in it! Skobi’s diverse designs are intended to look good and feel great.
Skobi takes a keen interest in all processes involving the design, manufacture and production of its shoes. Skobi’s objective is to ensure all styles meet the highest of standards in order to create the ultimate feel, form and function. The Skobi brand is locally designed in Brisbane, and works closely with European production teams to ensure these same standards and working conditions are being met across the globe.

Name: Dnk Sports
Description:
At DNK Sports we are building performance footwear designed specifically for the fastest growing sport in America pickleball. Our shoes are engineered with purpose driven technology to help athletes move with confidence reduce injury risk and enjoy the game longer.

Founded by lifelong athletes and friends DNK Sports is driven by a love for competition community and innovation. Every product is crafted with attention to detail from our torsion lock heel that provides unmatched stability to our responsive midsoles built for quick movements and explosive power.

We are on a mission to elevate the pickleball experience for players of all levels. From grassroots events and local courts to national tournaments DNK Sports is committed to growing the game and supporting the community that makes it so special.

Name: Kingstep
Description:
At Kingstep, we're proud to be a leading OEM and ODM manufacturer in the footwear industry, specializing in women's sandals and shoes. In addition to our partnerships as a licensee of esteemed global brands and the proud licensor of our own brand, couchkiss, we're dedicated to designing, developing, and manufacturing a diverse range of high-quality footwear products.

From chic sandals to stylish shoes, we offer an extensive selection to cater to the varied preferences and needs of our customers. Our collection includes everything from casual flats and trendy sneakers to elegant heels and sophisticated sandals. At Kingstep, we're committed to delivering footwear that not only meets but exceeds industry standards in terms of quality, comfort, and fashion-forward design.

We manufacture our footwear products at our state-of-the-art factories, as well as through our network of trusted partner factories in Southeast Asia. This allows us to maintain rigorous quality control measures and ensure timely delivery to customers worldwide.

With our global head office located in Xiamen,China, a cutting-edge R&D center in Guangdong area, and sales and design offices strategically positioned across Asia and Europe, we're well-equipped to serve our customers with excellence and efficiency. Whether you're seeking customized design solutions or looking to enhance your footwear offerings with our branded products, Kingstep is here to collaborate with you every step of the way.

Name: IKEECI KGL
Description:
IKEECI Kgl is a shoe customization and selling business that provides customers with unique and personalized footwear options. Our mission is to empower individuals to express their personal style and creativity by allowing them to design their own shoes or choose from our wide range of customizable designs. At IKEECI Kgl, we believe that every customer should have access to shoes that fit their personality, lifestyle, and budget. 

We offer high-quality materials, exceptional craftsmanship, and unparalleled customer service to ensure that every pair of Ikeeci shoes is a perfect fit for our customers. Whether you're looking for a classic style or something more avant-garde, IKEECI Kgl has something for everyone.

Since our launch in 2022, IKEECI has brought multiple international brands to your hometown. We are also turning things up, by customizing the usual same old sneakers to match your personal styles and preferences. Name: Astrea Srls
Description:
Astrea was born, as well as from the great passion for shoes, from the desire to create a product that is, as much as possible, sustainable and cruelty-free.
The fundamental concept of the Astrea brand is sustainability to the maximum of its possibilities: a product that respects the environment and animals in every part of the production, from the creative process to shipping.
A product that is fashionable at the same time, that follows the trends of the season, that reflects what fashion is: art.
Astrea will be using the valid alternative materials that already exist on the market but are still very undervalued and/or little known.
The production will take place in Italy, with the use of innovative materials; they will range from vegetable leathers, biodegradable fabrics, organic and/or recycled materials.
WHY "ASTREA"?
In mythology, Astrea, daughter of Zeus and Themis, was one of the Hours: she protected the law courts and was an inflexible punisher of crimes.
Legends tell that the Goddess she descended to earth in the Golden Age: it was the kingdom of Justice and Good Faith and the Gods lived alongside mortals; once upon a time there was no violence between men and people ate only legumes and fruits.
It was a period of eternal spring, peace and justice reigned supreme.
With the birth of the first conflicts between men, the Goddess Astrea took the responsibility of admonishing men and leading them to the right path.
Unfortunately her efforts were in vain; embittered and disgusted, Astrea decided to leave permanently, flying with her wings among the shining stars (becoming the constellation of the Virgin), from where she, increasingly sad, watched the pettiness of men spread.
This explains the reason behind this name: we hope that we can return to the Golden Age;We want a world where every living being has the right to live according to the laws of nature.
We need peace and justice, we need Astrea to return to Earth.

Name: SAFETYLEAD LTD.
Description:
Protecting People. Supporting Every Step.

Safetylead was founded over 20 years ago with a deeply personal mission —to make sure every worker goes home safely.

That mission began with a family injury.

An accident that could have been prevented, but wasn’t. Watching how one moment changed a life forever taught us a lasting lesson:
Protection only matters if it truly works in real conditions, for real people.

Since then, that experience has shaped everything we do.	

What We Do

We design and manufacture high-performance safety footwear where protection leads — and comfort follows.

Because safety footwear is not worn for a few minutes, but for 8 to 10 hours a day, across demanding shifts and tough environments.

If footwear causes fatigue, discomfort, or distraction, protection alone is not enough.

That’s why we focus on long-lasting comfort — fit, balance, weight, breathability, and underfoot support — without ever compromising safety standards.

Our footwear is made for real workers facing real challenges, from construction and manufacturing to logistics and industrial workplaces.	

What We Stand For

• Reliable protection validated through rigorous testing
• Comfort engineered for long shifts, not short trials
• Thoughtful design driven by how workers actually move and stand
• Consistent quality supported by strong sourcing, development, and QC teams
• A people-first philosophy rooted in a family experience we will never forget	

Who We Serve

We work with global brands, distributors, and industrial partners who believe safety footwear should protect people and support them throughout the working day.	

Our Purpose

To lead with safety, deliver with comfort, and earn the trust of those who build our world —one step at a time.

Safetylead — Safety Leads, Comfort Follows.

Name: Sergio Grasso Industries
Description:
Founded in 1979 in the picturesque hills of Valpolicella, Verona, Sergio Grasso quickly established itself as a symbol of Italian artisan excellence in the riding boot sector. For over 40 years, the company has been dedicated to the artisanal creation of tailor-made boots for various equestrian disciplines.

At the heart of Sergio Grasso's product creation lie stylistic excellence, innovation, and meticulous attention to detail. The company places significant emphasis on the quality of materials and manufacturing processes, as well as a deep commitment to environmental protection and product sustainability, using renewable energy via solar panels.

The EcoRiding line, characterized by environmentally friendly materials such as non-animal-derived leather, and the Endurance line, follow similar principles.

Over the years, Sergio Grasso has established significant collaborations with renowned Italian companies, including Vibram, enhancing products not only in terms of comfort but also in ergonomic adaptability for extended use.

Today, Sergio Grasso serves the entire spectrum of equestrian disciplines, outfitting world-caliber champions such as Henrik Von Eckermann, Laura Kraut, Julia Krajewski, Michel Robert, and other leading figures in the global equestrian arena.

Recently, the brand introduced a new boot configurator, allowing customers to customize their boots by choosing from a wide variety of materials, colors, details, and more.

For more information, visit Sergio Grasso's website.

Lemniloop a specialized design and prototyping service built for footwear entrepreneurs. We understand that most new shoe brands fail before they even launch, not because of bad ideas, but because of the gap between concept and reality. Our mission is to bridge that gap by providing professional, startup-friendly solutions: from 3D concept designs and polished renderings, to functional TPU prototypes, to final CAD files ready for manufacturing. Nata nel 1989, RIBE si specializza nella produzione e nella commercializzazione calzature in termoplastica per sala operatoria e tempo libero.

L’esperienza maturata nel passato unita al coinvolgimento attento del personale, ad una costante collaborazione con gli enti di certificazione e con i nostri fornitori di materie prime ci ha permesso di soddisfare tutte le richieste che i nostri clienti e i nuovi mercati ci richiedono, costruendo le basi per un progetto solido e duraturo.

RIBE GROUP dispone di un’ampia gamma di articoli prodotti con materiali plastici flessibili, leggeri, morbidi e colorati.

L'igiene e la praticità dei prodotti a marchio RIBE sono assicurati dalla possibilità di lavare e di sterilizzare a 134°C. Il sistema antistatico, il plantare anatomico e la suola antiscivolo garantiscono la massima sicurezza in tutti gli ambienti in cui l’affidabilità del prodotto è un requisito fondamentale.

RIBE GROUP è tesa costantemente a soddisfare le esigenze dei propri clienti garantendo loro un’assistenza personalizzata pre e post vendita. Grazie ad un’attenta pianificazione industriale e finanziaria, alla scrupolosa cura degli standard qualitativi e all’imprescindibile attenzione per la sicurezza verso gli utilizzatori dei nostri prodotti, RIBE GROUP è diventata leader del mercato italiano ed europeo.

Name: Hetty Rose Shoes
Description:
I am a bespoke shoe maker and designer creating shoes which are truly unique. 

Working from my studio I handmade bespoke shoes, specialising in bridal, where clients can choose a huge variety of elements to create thier dream shoes! 

I also host shoe making courses where you can learn how to make your very own pair. 

I believe in creating ethical and environmentally considerate products by reusing vintage materials. I'm passionate about shoe making and love to work with clients who appreicate something truly unique and handmade.

I graduated from the London College of Fashion with a degree in Footwear Design & Development (Cordwainers). I have worked in London and Italy for handmade shoe companies & set up my company in 2007.

After being selected to exhibit at London Fashion Week in my first season, I have gone on to feature in many publications including Vogue, Elle & on television around the World. 

I hand make each pair of bespoke shoes my home studio. You are welcome to make an appointment to pop in and see where the shoes are made & order your very own pair. 

I host the workshops from my studio or I can travel to you. If you live further afield it is possible to use video calls for your consultation and fittings. I have made for clients all over the World throughout the 16 years of making bespoke shoes.

Name: NatureSole
Description:
Bienvenidos a Natursole! Somos un equipo apasionado y comprometido con el bienestar de nuestros mayores. En Natursole, nos enfocamos en ofrecer calzado de máxima comodidad y cuidado para los pies de nuestros seres queridos de la tercera edad. Nuestra misión es clara: brindarles una experiencia única de confort, salud y calidad de vida.

¿Qué nos diferencia? No solo nos preocupamos por la comodidad de nuestros zapatos, sino también por el impacto positivo que generamos en la vida de las personas. Sabemos que unos pies felices significan una mejor movilidad, autonomía y capacidad para disfrutar de cada momento.

En Natursole, no solo fabricamos calzado de alta calidad, sino que también promovemos la conciencia sobre la importancia del cuidado de los pies en la tercera edad. Queremos ser aliados en el bienestar de nuestros mayores, brindando información útil y consejos prácticos sobre cómo mantener sus pies sanos y felices.

Nos enorgullece contar con un equipo de profesionales comprometidos, constantemente investigando y mejorando nuestros productos para adaptarnos a las necesidades cambiantes de nuestros mayores y garantizar su satisfacción.

Únete a nosotros en este viaje hacia un mayor confort y bienestar para nuestros mayores. Síguenos en LinkedIn para estar al tanto de nuestras últimas novedades, consejos y reflexiones sobre el cuidado de los pies y la importancia de priorizar el bienestar en todas las etapas de la vida.

Juntos, podemos marcar la diferencia y brindar a nuestros mayores la atención y el cuidado que merecen. Bienvenidos a Natursole, donde la comodidad y el bienestar se unen para crear un mundo mejor!

Name: SCg Shoe Co
Description:
SCg Shoe Co began in 1999 with a simple goal: build footwear that actually works for BMX and MTB riders.
For the first 15 years, we refined our patterns, compounds, and designs while working through outside factories.
A decade ago, we took the biggest step in our evolution — we built our own footwear factory in Bogotá, Colombia.
Since then, every pair of SCg shoes has been made in-house: designed, patterned, cut, stitched, lasted, and built by riders who understand pedal feel and durability firsthand.
Today SCg is one of the only rider-owned footwear brands with full in-house manufacturing capability.
We produce our own BMX/MTB line and build shoes for shops, crews, and other brands through our private-label manufacturing program.
Specialties:
• Flat-pedal shoes (BMX/MTB)
• Clipless MTB shoes
• Rider-owned footwear design
• In-house manufacturing & QC (Bogotá, Colombia)
• Private-label builds & small-run production
• Heritage since 1999
Website: https://scgshoeco.com
Email: info@scgshoeco.com
We're committed to doing our part to use environmentally friendly processes including, but not limited to using 100% post-consumer content boxes, recycled materials in our foams, biodegradable insoles, and PFA-free water resistant treatments.

Name: GEP Chaussures
Description:
En 1907, les Ets Pasquier Frères basés dans le Maine et Loire, bassin historique de la chaussure et du textile,  voient le jour. En 1910 l’entreprise  emploie 30 ouvriers. En 1925, elle compte 220 ouvriers dont une centaine travaille à domicile. en 1950, l’entreprise adapte les nouvelles techniques de fabrication en développant le vulcanisé et en 1957 l’injecté. Entre 1962 et 1970, 3 nouveaux sites de productions sont crées et en 1971, la fusion de plusieurs unités entraine la création de GEP GROUPE PASQUIER, et le groupe crée GEPY (chaussures enfants). En 1977, les magasins franchisés arrivent. En 1987 c est l’apogée du groupe qui emploie alors 1600 personnes et produit 6 millions de paires par an. En 1995,c est le rachat de LA FOURMI mais l’ouverture des marchés internationaux fait connaître un déclin irréversible au groupe . Depuis 2007, une nouvelle équipe issue de GEP INDUSTRIES, décide de reprendre la société en donnant la priorité au service.
 Aujourd’hui, 18 personnes travaillent sur le site pour assurer la création de tous les prototypes, échantillons et collections, la gestion des matières premières, l’administration, la logistique et l’exploitation.

Création contrôle qualité réactivité, service, écoute client,
Location: SAINT GERMAIN SUR MOINE, Pays de la Loire

Name: Trefir Wholesale
Description:
We specialize in manufacturing anatomic sandals, slippers and clogs in Istanbul, Turkiye! With +12 years of experience in footwear manufacturing and +34 years in the footwear industry, we have deep expertise in creating fashionable, quality and comfortable footwear.

Our parent company, Mat Star, was first established in Bulgaria in 1971, initially focusing on wholesale shoes.

Over the years, they expanded their operations to cover all cities within Bulgaria and later established a wholesale distribution network spanning Eastern Europe. Alongside that, they began retail operations under the name Mat Star, with 63 stores now located in Bulgaria, Macedonia, Romania, Greece, Hungary, Serbia, Kosovo, Syria, and Iraq.

In 2013, Mat Star entered the Turkish market, acquiring a 50% stake in TIGERLINE factory, and in 2018, they fully took over the company to join other brands under the Mat Star umbrella, whilst enlarging their own by embodying brands like Dr.Klompa and Dr.Mez, expanding their production capacity to 50,000 pairs of shoes per month, including PVC and polyurethane injection and Monta slippers.

TIGERLINE exports its products to various European countries such as Spain, Italy, Germany, Romania, Croatia, as well as to North African and Middle Eastern countries like Dubai, Saudi Arabia, Libya, Tunisia, Palestine, Algeria, and beyond. Additionally, as of 2021, Our products are also available in the Turkish domestic market with a wholesale store in Gedikpaşa / Beyazit, expanding its influence and catering to various domestic brands, while also engaging in special production to further grow its market presence.

In 2024, we decided to launch our own footwear ecommerce website, Trefir, for retail and wholesale allowing our customers to buy directly from us.

Name: Sole Weavers
Description:
Sole Weavers is a, Make in India, Footwear brand based out of Mumbai. Established by Shraddha Joshi, Entrepreneur and Footwear Designer from FDDI, Mumbai, Sole Weavers officially launched its e-store at https://www.soleweavers24.com/ in March 2022. The company envisions bringing back the culture of handcrafted shoes for the modern, style-conscious, astute Indian who doesn't settle for less but is constantly on the look-out for a pair of shoes that is The Best From The Rest when it comes to style, comfort, and price. Sole Weavers is Handcrafted Luxury for you. 

Find Your Perfect Fit: Ready-To-Wear and Made-To-Measure options are available for you.

Sole Weaver's online store presents a large variety of women's shoes. Choose from Slip-on, Comfort wear, Flats, Heels, Jutties, Kolhapuri, Mules, Pumps, Sliders, Wedges, and more. You can even place an order for customized footwear as per your specifications by writing to Sole Weavers at soleweavers24@gmail.com or calling on their What's app number: +919702433761. Take advantage of the SALE. Grab exciting deals for online shopping!

Our Mission is to weave a perfect pair of shoes that is comfortable and looks great too! To live up to our mission statement, Sole Weavers is committed to helping those unable to find the right fit and size on the racks. 

Our USP: A Sole Weavers shoe is beautiful inside out. It looks beautiful, and it feels beautiful. Just what you desire and what you need. Get Style & Comfort in a glamorous pair of shoes from us.

We want you to try and buy our shoes, so we have kept our prices inexpensive. Vegan & handcrafted luxury made-to-measure so that no size is odd, and no fit is wrong. Our shoe is a perfect fit for you!

Our Brand Philosophy
To care for the planet and people and promote the priceless shoe-making tradition of India.

OUR STORY
We started small, from a unit in Thane, Mumbai, with five employees. Our story is a very prudent and personal belief that Style and Ease Can Belong To The Same Place. 

"Things that look pretty may not be comfortable and vice-versa. This is an age-old problem that we at Sole Weavers are trying to resolve for our customers, giving them the right fit for the design they love," say's Shraddha Joshi. She adds, "Creating value through customization is our forte. We have successfully made shoes for those unable to find the right size or fit or even with foot problems. We have designed shoes for size 43 EUR for a customer with swollen feet who has never worn shoes other than Black closed shoes, a few situations we helped resolve."

To every Cinderella, we are a fairy Godmother! Don't believe it? 
Wish upon a shoe, and let the magic happen

Description:
Di Bello S.r.l. è un’azienda ormai radicata da anni nel settore della produzione e della commercializzazione di calzature, e in particolare in quello della “pantofoleria”.
Una realtà aziendale con una grande coesione interna ed una identità molto forte che, dal 1992, grazie all’esperienza decennale nel campo del commercio, è protagonista nella produzione di calzature.
Uno dei risultati tangibili di questa filosofia che guida l’azienda di Nola, in provincia di Napoli, è il collaudato sistema DeoFit, studiato dai ricercatori interni dell’azienda per le pantofole Axa Shoes, che rende le calzature sempre fresche, asciutte e profumate.Ad esso si aggiunge il sistema DeoPush che, grazie alla presenza di un foro sul sottopiede consente invece di ri-profumare costantemente le pantofole ad uso domestico.
L’azienda è infine impegnata nell’aumentare il suo presidio sul mercato estero, soprattutto in Medio Oriente e nei paesi Dellì’ Est Europa,

anche grazie alla partecipazione alle più importanti fiere internazionali come Expo Riva Schuh, theMicam, Obuv, Moshoes, Euroshoes e Mostra Autonoma Calzature -Almaty in Kazakhstan.

Name: LAMONTI CUOIO SPA - Società Benefit
Description:
Cuoio per suole – Custodiamo i segreti della tradizionale concia lenta in vasca al vegetale 100% Made in Italy e siamo specializzati nella realizzazione di articoli personalizzati, realizzati in base alle richieste ed esigenze di stilisti e modellisti per il settore della calzatura.

Mantenere e migliorare la qualità dei prodotti e dei servizi, nel pieno rispetto della tipicità della propria attività e nel rispetto della propria storia, è la chiave per avere sempre chiara una visione del futuro. Questo è quello che raccontano le azioni di un’azienda che tutti i giorni coniuga l’antica tradizione della lavorazione del cuoio con innovative e tecnologiche tecniche di rifinizione.

La storia ed i valori di un’azienda e di un prodotto Made in Italy.

Lamonti Cuoio, affonda le sue radici in una piccola conceria che aprì i battenti negli anni Settanta. Nel 1998 l’azienda si trasferisce in uno nuovo stabilimento dove i soci utilizzarono gli ampi spazi per migliorare le condizioni di lavoro custodendo però intatti i segreti della tradizionale concia lenta in vasca al vegetale effettuata con bagni di tannino. Nel 2015 Lamonti si è ulteriormente ingrandita e sviluppata portando a 10.000 mq la superfice complessiva degli edifici. Nel tempo la maestria dei padri è stata trasferita ai figli e oggi Lamonti è una società “familiare”, dove ognuno ha messo a frutto le sue migliori capacità nelle singole aree.

La sapienza artigianale della concia lenta in vasca al vegetale.

L’arte della concia lenta, un processo di lavorazione antichissimo, capace di mantenere inalterata la struttura fibrosa della pelle garantendo al cuoio caratteristiche uniche di morbidezza, calore e resistenza, è custodita nell’Area Produzione, a cui è affidato il prodotto fino alla fase che precede la rifinitura. Il reparto rifinizione è affidato all’Area Ricerca e Sviluppo dove tecnici specializzati sperimentano e propongono un prodotto sempre più customizzato e in linea con le nuove tendenze moda.

Name: Gauri & Co.
Description:
Gauri & Co. is a 100% handmade footwear brand from India, creating footwear for all genders and all age groups including men, women, children and the elderly.

We work across B2B, corporate, and direct-to-consumer (D2C) channels and have been exporting handcrafted footwear since 2020, serving customers in 47+ countries, including the USA, UK, Japan, and Norway.

Our work spans two distinct categories:

Traditional Indian Footwear

We craft traditional Indian leather footwear such as Kolhapuris and Mules, following ancestral designs and techniques. These designs are not altered or customised. They are produced in standard sizes, preserving authenticity and heritage craftsmanship.

Contemporary & Western Footwear

We design and specialise in contemporary and western wear footwear, which can be fully customised for any gender, age, size or foot shape.
This includes material (leather or non-leather), colour, sizing, fit and comfort requirements.

Our custom work ranges from special-purpose footwear to extended sizes up to US size 16, all of which have been successfully handcrafted and exported.

Beyond standard sizing, we focus on feet often overlooked by offering solutions for comfort, cushioning, support, height requirements and fit-related pain.

We also undertake corporate, wedding, and occasion gifting, offering customised footwear and accessories such as wallets, belts, passport covers, laptop sleeves, and gifting sets.

 Open to B2B partnerships, corporate orders, bulk requirements, and international collaborations
 Handmade in India | Delivered worldwide

At Fenari, we believe that luxury transcends mere aesthetics—it’s about the stories, values, and dedication that shape each product. Every detail, from the first stitch to the final polish, reflects our unwavering commitment to excellence. We are passionate about preserving and sharing the beauty of our cultural heritage with the world, ensuring that our products are not only visually stunning but also rich in history and meaning.

Our mission is to redefine luxury by blending traditional techniques with contemporary design, creating pieces that are as comfortable as they are sophisticated. At Fenari, each product is a testament to our dedication to quality and our desire to empower our community through craftsmanship. Join us on this journey of discovering the perfect balance between tradition, innovation, and unparalleled quality.
