Name: Calzaturificio Di Giuseppe
Description:
Italiano - Calzaturificio Di Giuseppe nasce nel 1948 da Felice Di Giuseppe. Classe 1932, artigiano di propensione, calzolaio per vocazione, sin dal dopoguerra realizza scarpe per tutti i gusti e generi. Sul finire degli anni ‘60, con il supporto dei fratelli, arrivano i primi successi: il marchio Rhomson, le sfilate al MareModa Capri, le boutique a Pomigliano d’Arco, le collaborazioni con marchi di fama internazionale. Su questa scia, negli anni ‘70, arriva la collaborazione con Salvatore Ferragamo, partnership che prosegue ancora oggi. La storia di Calzaturificio Di Giuseppe continua ancora con la guida della famiglia, attualmente arrivata alla terza generazione, in nome di unica, grande passione: la calzatura sognata, ideata e realizzata rigorosamente in Italia.

English - Calzaturificio Di Giuseppe was founded in 1948 by Felice Di Giuseppe. Born in 1932, craftsman by propensity, shoemaker by vocation, he made shoes for all tastes and genres since the post-war period. Towards the end of the 1960s, with the support of his brothers, came his first successes: the Rhomson brand, fashion shows at MareModa Capri, boutiques in Pomigliano d'Arco, and collaborations with internationally renowned brands. In this wake, in the 1970s, came the collaboration with Salvatore Ferragamo, a partnership that continues to this day. The history of Calzaturificio Di Giuseppe still carries on under the leadership of the family, currently in its third generation, in the name of a single, great passion: footwear dreamt of, designed and made strictly in Italy.

Name: Cauchos Arnedo S.A
Description:
Cauchos Arnedo S.A. se funda en 1981 con el propósito de innovar en la fabricación de suelas de caucho para calzado.
Llevamos más de 30 años trabajando desde Arnedo (La Rioja, España), donde en 2013 hemos renovado la infraestructura estrenando nueva fábrica. Además, contamos con otra planta de fabricación en Tánger (Marruecos), operativa desde 2009.
Nuestro objetivo es la innovación y nuestro compromiso trabajar I+D+i en nuestros propios laboratorios, aplicando exhaustivos procesos de control de calidad.
Esta trayectoria nos ha llevado a ser, en la actualidad, líderes en fabricación de suelas de caucho multicolor.

Name: Phi Creative Office
Description:
At Phi Oficina Creativa we design, develop and manufacture premium footwear collections for brands that need a reliable, process-driven workshop.

We integrate design, digital pattern-making, cutting and assembly with CAD/CAM workflows to ensure consistency, optimize material usage and speed up development. Our processes are auditable and we work under strict confidentiality agreements.

What we do:
• Product and collection development
• Digital pattern-making and grading
• Prototypes and pilot runs
• Cutting, stitching and assembly
• Technical support throughout the production cycle

We partner with brands looking for industrial-level quality with a creative mindset and a team that understands the footwear business end-to-end.

Name: Nis-New Italia Shoes
Description:

Fin dalle origini, l’azienda con il suo brand NiS si è specializzata nella progettazione e nella produzione di scarpe per la neve, il freddo e il tempo libero, tramandando la propria professionalità e la propria esperienza da ben tre generazioni.

L’obiettivo di New Italia Shoes è realizzare dei modelli comodi, femminili e curati nei minimi dettagli.
Per questo motivo, il Team di Sviluppo è alla costante ricerca di materiali innovativi che migliorino la funzionalità e il design delle calzature.

L'innovazione continua si ritrova anche nelle tecniche produttive implementate nella propria filiera, dove qualità e attenzione ai dettagli sono la regola.

Tutto questo ha permesso a NiS di crescere e di affermarsi come punto di riferimento per i Luxury Fashion Boots completamente Made in Italy e, per questo motivo, le proprie calzature sono oggi esportate in tutto il mondo.

Name: PASSION FOOTWEAR
Description:
Introducing Passion Footwear, the epitome of style, quality, and innovation in the world of shoes. As a proud member of the esteemed RHO Group, we embark on a remarkable journey to redefine footwear excellence in Bangladesh. 

At Passion Footwear, we believe that shoes are more than just a fashion statement; they are an extension of your personality, a reflection of your passion. That's why we have devoted ourselves to crafting exquisite shoes that not only elevate your style but also ignite your fervor for fashion.

Our commitment to excellence starts with our manufacturing process. We harness the power of advanced raw materials and cutting-edge chemical components to ensure the utmost quality in every pair of shoes we create. From the soles that provide unrivaled comfort to the premium fabrics that embrace your feet with grace, our dedication to superior craftsmanship is evident in every intricate detail.

Central to our success are our skilled designers, the masterminds behind our innovative shoe designs. They continuously push the boundaries of creativity, blending contemporary trends with timeless elegance. Whether you seek a classic look for a formal occasion or a bold statement for casual wear, our designers have crafted a diverse range of styles that cater to your unique preferences.

But it doesn't stop there. At Passion Footwear, we understand that true success lies in reaching our customers, inspiring them, and bringing our exceptional products to every corner of Bangladesh. That's why we have appointed dedicated dealers in every district, ensuring that our shoes find their way to your doorstep, wherever you may be. We are committed to making our products accessible to all, because we believe that fashion should be inclusive and empowering.

Integrity and diligence are the pillars on which our company stands. We take immense pride in conducting our business with utmost transparency and ethical practices. Your trust in us is paramount, and we strive to exceed your expectations at every turn.

As we embark on this exciting journey, our promise to you is to constantly stay in tune with market demands, bringing you an array of meticulously crafted shoes that perfectly blend style and substance. From the trendsetters to the trend followers, our shoes are designed for everyone who dares to dream, aspire, and make a statement.

Experience the passion of footwear like never before. Join us on this incredible adventure as we shape the future of fashion, one step at a time. Welcome to Passion Footwear, where style meets passion, and dreams find their perfect fit.

Name: Callnak
Description:
Callnak is a footwear startup redefining how shoes are designed and manufactured through additive manufacturing. We develop 100% 3D-printed footwear by combining product engineering, computational design, and high-performance flexible materials to create functional, lightweight, and customizable structures.

Our approach eliminates traditional processes such as molds, stitching, and complex assemblies, enabling full design control, local on-demand production, and rapid product iteration. Using multi-material technologies and varying hardness ranges, we optimize support, comfort, and durability within a single functional piece.

Callnak is built with an industrial and scalable vision, collaborating with manufacturers, technology centers, and strategic partners to create a new footwear value chain driven by software, data, and distributed manufacturing.

Description:
Join our Adventure !

We are footwear enthusiasts - Developing footwear for a carefree life with our best companion since 2009.

Multiple awards!
Suedwind Footwear won the spoga Innovation Award for the best footwear product of the year in both 2015 and 2023.

We believe that, people living a work-life balance, spending quality time outdoors with their best companions, be it their dogs, their horses, or their family, experiencing meaningful connections that lead to a joyful and satisfying life.

Suedwind Footwear was founded in 2009 by the brothers Henrik and Philip Holzapfel. Growing up in a family passionate about horses, sports, and outdoor activities, with an entrepreneurial history going back to 1888, they blend innovation with tradition and style. The result: technically advanced, durable, and comfortable footwear products. Quality, fit, and technology equal maximum comfort. 

Suedwind Footwear's drive is to create high-quality products offering ultimate comfort, emphasizing the perfect fit and support in a continuous development process fueled by a passion for equestrian culture and outdoor activities.

Functionality and comfort have become the philosophy of the brand. 

Suedwind Footwear is a young and experienced team. The products are developed and tested in Germany by creative minds. Their lives revolve around sports, fashion, art, design, and authentic equestrian culture. "We love tradition – We love innovation – We love change! Creating creative ideas and innovative concepts in an open and flexible work environment, without losing sight of tradition and style, is our driving force to develop successful products."

Description:

Nuestro proceso se basa en el análisis y detección de riesgos de la empresa, para identiﬁcar qué tipo de calzado y accesorios son los que requieren para ejecutar su actividad de la mejor manera y con los mínimos riesgos.

At Trekenvyl, we believe great footwear tells a story. That’s why we fuse timeless craftsmanship with modern design, ensuring each pair reflects quality, class, and cultural pride. Name: Faroush: Revolutionizing Children's Footwear
Description:
Faroush is a French brand committed to transforming children’s footwear by combining style, comfort, and health.

Founded by Sarah Kermiche, a mother passionate about the natural development of her daughters' feet, Faroush designs barefoot shoes in collaboration with podiatrists and orthopedists.

Our shoes respect the anatomy of growing feet, allowing toes to move freely and muscles to develop naturally. With flexible soles, a wide toe box, and a flat, zero-drop design, Faroush promotes proper posture, balance, and healthy foot development.

Our Mission:
Stylish Kids & Healthy Feet!

Faroush is on a mission to raise awareness about the importance of proper footwear from a young age. Traditional rigid and narrow shoes can hinder a child’s natural growth, leading to potential long-term issues like back pain or knee discomfort.

Our barefoot models mimic the feeling of walking barefoot, providing a natural, comfortable fit. With a commitment to sustainability, our shoes are vegan, non-toxic, and ethically made in Europe.

At Faroush, we believe in freeing children’s feet from the constraints of poorly designed shoes, empowering them to walk, play, and grow naturally.

Name: Miky Shoes
Description:
MIKY SHOES is an Italian footwear company that operates all full in-house facilities (from design/development to production, from marketing to sales and distribution). The company, born from the will of its founder to do business at the service of fashion trends and needs, excels in women’s footwear perfectly made in Italy. Offering collections ranging from own branded products, licensed products and private label products, MS serves the multi-gender “fast-fashion” industry.
At MIKY SHOES we trust that an excellent product is the result of an extremely sophisticated recipe based on four fundamental ingredients: the manual skills of the craftsman, the choice of high quality materials, the use of cutting-edge technologies, continuous research in order to offer innovative designs.

Name: Florett GmbH
Description:
Deutsche Schuhfabrikation seit 1959
Als langjährige, deutsche Schuhfabrikation schaffen wir es, Tradition und Innovation zu verbinden. Seit 1959 kreieren wir qualitativ hochwertige Produkte und bieten für die unterschiedlichsten Fußprobleme eine passende Lösung. Dafür stecken wir viel Erfahrung und Herzblut in die Entwicklung neuer Schuhe, um sie nicht nur funktional, sondern auch optisch ansprechend zu gestalten. Wir forschen und arbeiten stets an neuen Schuhlösungen, um unsere Produktpalette weiterzuentwickeln.

Made in Germany & Made in Europe
Ein zentraler Wert in unserer Schuhfabrikation ist die Nachhaltigkeit. Deshalb wird der Großteil unserer Produkte direkt am Firmenstandort in Bayern gefertigt und ist somit Made in Germany. Auch bei der Materialbeschaffung für unsere Schuhe liegt der Faktor Nachhaltigkeit immer im Fokus. Wir arbeiten ausschließlich mit Lieferanten aus der EU zusammen und achten auf besonders kurze Transportwege. Mit Ihrer Entscheidung für unsere Schuhe können also auch Sie einen ökologischen Fußabdruck hinterlassen.

Varomed - Das Original mit dem V!
Als deutsche Schuhfabrikation Florett vertreiben wir unsere Produkte unter dem Markennamen Varomed. Die Produkte der Marke Varomed haben sich als deutsches Qualitätsprodukt etabliert, deshalb können wir stolz behaupten: Wir sind das Original mit dem V! Wir achten auf faire Arbeitsbedingungen, nachhaltige Produktionsabläufe und eine hervorragende Qualität unserer Schuhe. Unsere Medizinprodukte sind anerkannt und zertifiziert nach der europäischen Norm DIN EN ISO 13485:2016.

Name: Better Shoes Foundation
Description:
The Better Shoes Foundation is a not-for-profit trade initiative aimed at accelerating the footwear industry's transition to sustainable production. 
 
Our core mission is to:
 
1. Run a highly resourceful knowledge-sharing platform to signpost best practice and to connect brands and producers with credible sustainability service providers and low-impact material suppliers.
 
2. Work towards a level playing field by pursuing industry-specific standards and promoting businesses that genuinely adhere to best social and environmental practices. 
 
3. Enable consumers to make informed, evidence-based choices which in turn spurs transition in the shoe industry - a win-win for business, consumers, and the planet.
 
 
Join us on our journey to dynamically support the growth of a better shoe industry:
 
The Better Shoes Foundation is still at an early development stage, currently seeking and evaluating contributors, collaborators or partners with capabilities to help shoe businesses advance with clarity through our inevitable transition, co-create practical commercial assets, and achieve greater positive impact for the benefit of the entire industry.
 
Please feel free to get in touch if you wish to get involved in any capacity. 

contact@bettershoes.org

Name: HARRIS SHOES - 1913
Description: Many people produce shoes these days. Harris, since 1913, has been making them by entrusting each step to complete human attention: total manual skills that have allowed it to build a name of absolute reliability over time. Today the company boasts an important global presence: in addition to the best shoe shops in Italy and Europe, the brand is present in the best American stores, in Japan, Russia and also in many other countries worldwide. Despite the strong market growth achieved over the years, Harris still remains a family-run business and the daily production, which is constantly increasing, is still thanks to the work of the most expert craftsmen in the sector.

Description:
Compromising health and comfort for style is a thing of the past. Barebarics sneakers break all the norms and combine the benefits of natural walking with urban style. All models are inherently foot-shaped but, at the same time, embody contemporary modern urban style.

Barebarics sneakers are brought to you by Be Lenka, one of the best barefoot footwear brands worldwide. While Be Lenka brings minimalist barefoot shoes for children, women and men, Barebarics offers a bold urban style which highlights your personality. 

Both brands are characterised by their research and development of barefoot footwear, which is based on the legacy of Central European shoemaking.

Name: THE K FAMILY TEAM
Description:
We are not just a factory; we are "Shoe Engineers."

Based in Hong Kong and Dongguan, The K Family Team is a premier manufacturing partner specifically built for independent designers, emerging luxury brands, and high-fashion labels.

Heritage & Evolution Our story began over 27 years ago as a humble, family-run workshop dedicated to traditional shoemaking. While we have evolved into a modern technical partner, we have never lost our artisan soul. We blend time-honored craftsmanship with cutting-edge engineering to solve the industry's biggest pain points. (Read our full history: https://k.shoes/history/)

Why Partner With Us?

 The "Shoe Engineer" Approach We don't shy away from difficult designs. Our team specializes in technical R&D, structural engineering for complex heels, and material innovation. We turn your most ambitious sketches into wearable, durable luxury products.

 Zero MOQ (No Minimum Order) We believe in agility. Traditional factories demand volume; we demand quality. Whether you need a 20-pair capsule collection for a runway show or a reactive restock of 200 pairs, we execute with the same level of precision.

 End-to-End Empowerment From the first sketch to the final unboxing experience, we handle the heavy lifting:

Last Development & Pattern Engineering

Unlimited Prototyping & Sampling

Small Batch Production

Ethical Sourcing & Logistics

Who We Serve Indie Designers | Luxury Startups | Creative Directors | High-End Boutiques

If you are tired of hearing "impossible" from other factories, or if you are held back by high inventory risks, let’s engineer your vision together.

Connect with us:  Website: www.k.shoes  Email: K@K.SHOES  Location: Hong Kong / Dongguan

Name: KPC FOOTWEAR PVT. LTD.
Description:
Welcome to our company, a leading expert in the white labeling of PU footwear for various brands. With over two decades of experience in the production of high-quality PU footwear, we have honed our craft to perfection, making us a trusted partner in the industry.

Our primary specialization lies in the production and customization of PU footwear, which allows us to offer a wide range of options to suit the unique needs of different brands. Whether it's trendy sneakers, comfortable sandals, stylish boots, or any other type of footwear, we have the expertise to manufacture it with utmost precision and attention to detail.

For the past one and a half years, we have proudly collaborated with STOUT brands, a testament to our reliability and commitment to delivering top-notch products. Our association with STOUT brands has allowed us to understand the intricate demands of the market and the importance of meeting the highest standards.

At our core, we value innovation, craftsmanship, and customer satisfaction. When brands choose us for their white labeling needs, they can expect a seamless process from conception to delivery. Our skilled design and production teams work closely with clients to bring their visions to life, ensuring that every pair of PU footwear is a true reflection of the brand's identity and values.

What sets us apart from others in the industry is our dedication to quality. We source the finest materials, employ state-of-the-art manufacturing techniques, and adhere to strict quality control procedures to produce PU footwear that stands the test of time.

Additionally, we understand the importance of timely delivery, and our efficient supply chain management ensures that orders are fulfilled promptly without compromising on quality.

Whether it's a well-established brand looking to expand its product line or a new player in the market seeking a reliable partner, we have the capabilities and expertise to cater to various requirements.

Description:
Hirolas, a brand by Lujo Trends Pvt. Ltd., is India’s homegrown footwear label blending premium design, everyday comfort, and responsible craftsmanship. Founded by Vaibhav Mittal, Hirolas was born from a dream to make quality shoes accessible to all — designed in India, for the world.

Our footwear is crafted using design principles and quality checks inspired by international benchmarks, ensuring every pair performs beyond expectations. Hirolas shoes feature cushioned foot-bed for long-lasting comfort, shock absorption with memory foam that reduces stress on joints and muscles, thick ankle back support for stability and reduced stress, twist-free ankle design to minimize sprains and enhance safety, round-toe extra edge for better movement and added agility while running. These elements come together to create footwear that supports your body naturally while keeping you stylish and secure on every step.

From sporty sneakers to elegant formals, each pair reflects our belief in innovation with purpose, integrity in every step, and giving back to the community. Today, Hirolas proudly caters to customers across India and abroad — even manufacturing for India’s defence forces.

Description:
Povestea noastră a început în urmă cu peste 40 de ani, când un grup de acționari italieni a înființat o linie de producție pentru încălțăminte de protecție, în Italia.
După ce experiența dobândită și calitatea produselor ne-au confirmat ca specialiști în industria încălțămintei de protectie în Italia, în anul 1994 a fost înființat un grup de companii specializate în producția și comercializarea încălțămintei de protecție și lucru din care fac parte cele 3 entități care ne reprezintă astăzi: Rhino Work, Exena și Rhino Safety.  

În acelasi an, odata cu creșterea nevoilor de producție, am deschis prima fabrică pentru încălțăminte de protectie în România, la Bacău - Rhino Work - care continuă și azi să producă produse finite - încălțăminte de lucru și protecție - la același nivel de calitate pentru care suntem apreciați.

În 2010, pentru a răspunde cerințelor pieței și bazându-ne pe puterea de producție a fabricii noastre, am înființat Rhino Safety - o companie de distribuție pentru echipamente de protecție a muncii, care acoperă toate gamele generale din industria de profil: încălțăminte, îmbrăcăminte și accesorii. Astăzi, ne mândrim cu un portofoliu diversificat de produse și cu un angajament puternic față de siguranța și protecția angajaților la locul de muncă.

Cu o viziune orientată către siguranță și protecție la cel mai înalt nivel, misiunea noastră este de a proteja viețile și sănătatea lucrătorilor, prevenind accidentele de muncă și creând un mediu de lucru sigur și protejat. 

Calitatea, profesionalismul și adaptabilitatea ne definesc, iar experții noștri sunt pregătiți să ofere consultanță specializată pentru a satisface nevoile specifice ale fiecărui client.

Pentru mai multe detalii și pentru a discuta despre soluțiile potrivite pentru afacerea ta, te rugăm să ne contactezi la adresa de e-mail: marketing@rhinosafety.ro.

Name: LACTY Co., Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1990, Lac Ty Company Limited is a joint venture established under Vietnamese law through a partnership between An Lac Shoe Company and Taiwan’s Lai Yih Footwear Group.

The company's main manufacturing facility is located at 3-5 Ten Lua Street, An Lac A Ward, Binh Tan District, Ho Chi Minh City. Lac Ty specializes exclusively in the production of vulcanized sports shoes—a product line made from rubber or plastics blended with additives, where raw rubber components are steamed and bonded at high temperatures to form durable, flexible footwear.

With nearly 35 years of experience, Lac Ty has built a strong reputation through its advanced production techniques, diverse designs, and wide range of materials—from everyday fabrics such as cotton and denim to premium materials like imported PU and genuine leather. These strengths have enabled the company to establish itself as a trusted manufacturer for adidas.

Committed to sustainable development, Lac Ty continuously strives to enhance product quality while prioritizing worker health, safety, and environmental responsibility.

Name: CALZATURIFICI TAILOR MADE INTERNATIONAL LORD & TAILOR
Description:
Il nostro gruppo è formato da due aziende Tailor Made International e Lord & Tailor che sono figlie di un calzaturificio storico della zona che dal 1948 produceva scarpe per le migliori case di moda presenti già da allora sul mercato mondiale.
Le aziende sono gestite dalla quarta generazione con i principi di etica aziendale che ci hanno da sempre contraddistinto per il servizio, la qualità, l’efficienza e l’innovazione verso i nostri clienti.
Da sempre attenti ai principi di valorizzazione del Made in Italy la nostra filiera esterna per il taglio e la giunteria è 100% italiana.
Con il tempo abbiamo costruito un bagaglio di esperienza che ad oggi ci rende in grado di produrre tutte le tipologie di calzature uomo e donna sportivo ed elegante in tutte le costruzioni: blacke, ago, strobel, ideal e anche lavorazioni di prestigio come il cucito a mano su forma, il rovesciato e il Goodyear oltre ad avere collaborazioni con aziende di prodotti vulcanizzati in gomma e iniettato.
Dal 2007 le nostre aziende hanno creato un intero reparto di modelleria che a oggi conta 7 tecnici specializzati tra modellisti, tagliatori e aggiuntatrici che in un ambiente dedicato sviluppano i nuovi progetti di calzature  dalla prototipia alla messa in produzione. Negli ultimi anni abbiamo implementato programmi di modellazione cad 2D e 3D per fornire ai nostri clienti una maggiore efficienza e tempestività nella realizzazione delle richieste.
Le nostre aziende sono certificate ISO 14001 e EMAS e l’impatto ambientale delle nostre produzioni è gestito secondo i principi più moderni di sostenibilità, benessere lavorativo delle maestranze e il rispetto della comunità all’interno della quale operiamo.
In un’ottica di crescita e sviluppo aziendale siamo a disposizione per collaborazioni con nuovi clienti e disponibili alla condivisione del nostro bagaglio di esperienza per la realizzazione di nuovi progetti.

Name: Regenerated
Description:
Innovation in the service of the environment is not a claim but our company's credo.
In a world market where the goal of recycling is becoming increasingly vital,
ReGenerated, offers the solution to this problem. An innovative concept that
combines the green economy with the circular economy. The project involves the
recycling of plastics for the production of raw materials, through a process of sorting,
shredding, and washing of all plastic components, which will be transformed into
granules (ecogranulate), becoming MPS (raw material material) of the highest quality.
The granulate will be destined for the production of finished products, specifically for
the fashion business (footwear, clothing and accessories).

Name: Calzado 70
Description:
El 26 de julio de 1965 nace la empresa, en aquel entonces llamada BONITEX, bajo el liderazgo de los actuales socios. Localizada en la calle San Juan, vecina de la flota Magdalena. BONITEX producía calzado colegial y baleta de dama; diez trabajadores realizaban las labores de fabricación para atender el naciente mercado. Fue la época de la pericia en el corte manual por los operarios y la costura del zapato a cargo de cuatro guarnecedores.

A finales de 1968, como parte de un pujante y decidido propósito de crecimiento para atender satisfactoriamente los incrementos de la demanda, trasladó sus instalaciones al Bodegón, antiguas bodegas de Almacenes Ley, con amplitud y área suficiente para labora con 30 operarios y lanzar al mercado la línea de dotación, hecho que coincide con el cambio de marca a BONANZA.

Por aquellos días, Guayabal se perfilaba como el sector por excelencia para los desarrollos industriales y comerciales, circunstancia que aunada a la demanda de mayores áreas de trabajo propias de una sano crecimiento, llevaron a los socios a trasladarse a esta zona, originando también el cambio de razón social a FÁBRICA DE CALZADO 70 LTDA, época de apogeo y proyección de la industria.

A mediados de la década en 1974, la organización lanza al mercado el tenis Sport 70 que marcó hasta 1984, durante 10 años una excelente acogida y el acierto para la diversificación en las líneas de producción.

Los años 80, son distinguidos con la ampliación de las líneas de dotación, orientadas a cubrir las necesidades de la industria y de los nuevos conceptos de condiciones de trabajo para el obrero colombiano. Se entregan entonces, la referencia combate, seguida de las zapatillas y la bota de seguridad.

Hoy, ya con más de 50 años en el mercado, la empresa cuenta con una amplia variedad de calzado de dotación industrial, en procesos vulcanizado, cementado e inyectado. Además, somos distribuidores de botas de caucho y calzado de lona.

Name: BERT / The other shoe
Description:
BERT is not just another outdoor sports shoe brand, it's a new kind of shoe that active people wear immediately before and after whatever they love to do, from running to riding and wakeboarding to white water rafting.'' Bert is the first ever pre/post activity shoe designed for the active life enthusiast. 

Technical gear, including footwear, is designed to excel in a specific activity and not to be worn out doing something else. Cyclists, for example, hate destroying their cleats on the pavement before and after a ride. The more sophisticated sports /outdoor footwear becomes, the harder it is to use it for any other use like walking or relaxing.

Finally,  active people are always looking for ways to save space and weight.  When they pack for the day ahead, every inch counts, Packing smart is key.. That's why Bert shoes are made to squeeze into the tightest places, freeing up much-needed space and keeping you light on your feet wherever you go. 

In Bert we don’t compete against any sports footwear; we complement it

Cycling, Hiking, Running - whatever moves you  -we are ‘the other shoe’ specially designed for your pre and post-activity. 

Bert has become part of the daily use of many athletes here in Colombia where we don’t just make beautiful shoes. but we are also deeply committed to supporting our nation's communities.

The natural rubber we use on our soles is sourced from ASOHECA, a community comprising 1,200 families dedicated to rubber production. These families once involved in activities like working on cocaine farms or being associated with the Guerrilla have been provided with a fresh start. Lastly, our dedication to making a difference extends to our furry friends. We cherish animals deeply and are actively involved in reducing the population of stray dogs in our country. A portion of our profits goes towards supporting sterilization programs in underserved communities throughout Colombia.

Name: La Femme Calçados

Criado em meio ao ramo calçadista, Renato Barboza fundou esta marca com a parceria de seu amigo Jeff, onde juntos basearam-se na proposta de fazer um produto que pudesse transformar, positivamente, a vida das mulheres. 

Dessa forma, traçaram o destino de uma empresa que sustenta seus pilares com amor, primor e respeito.

A La Femme é uma marca especializada na produção de sapatos flats com pedrarias para qualquer ocasião, proporcionando todos os benefícios que as mulheres merecem. 

Além disso, o primor ao acabamento motiva a equipe na elaboração de modelos ricos em qualidade e, pensados para fazer desta experiência de uso, algo satisfatório.

Hoje, contando com uma equipe dedicada e, seguindo para o comando da quarta geração de sapateiros, a La Femme trabalha para levar um novo conceito fashion ao mercado, mostrando que é possível estar na moda com os pés no chão.

Assim, todos os dias, a marca conta uma nova história quando se faz presente no caminhar das #LaFemmeLovers.

The production base employs over 500 people, including more than 100 professional technicians, and has four advanced modern shoemaking production lines with an annual output of over 3 million pairs.

The group has established strong markets in the USA, Spain, Italy, the UK, France, Poland, as well as in Dubai, Kenya, and Chile. Market-oriented, the group emphasizes product research and innovation, designing premium men's and women's shoes including gentleman shoes, fashion shoes, casual shoes, and winter shoes. Known for their fashion, comfort, quality, innovative designs, reasonable prices, and fast updates, these products have earned customer recognition and approval. Oggi il 45% della nostra forza lavoro ha meno di 30 anni, e circa il 50% è stata interamente formata al nostro interno: dati che testimoniano la capacità dell'azienda di aver creato le condizioni ideali per la valorizzazione di nuovi talenti.

La Griffe è più di un calzaturificio: è un laboratorio di idee e competenze, dove tradizione e innovazione camminano insieme verso il futuro.

Name: WORKMAN - Safety Footwear - ESD
Description: Since 1990, Workman has been manufacturing highly specialized safety footwear. Our Ethics, Dedication, and Passion for our craft have enabled us to pass our brand from one generation to the next. The use of the highest quality materials, cutting-edge design and technology, and the integration of top collaborators allow us to guarantee the durability and comfort of our boots. At Workman, we have meticulously supervised processes where we can ensure safety and protection in comfort for long working hours, subjecting our footwear to resistance and aging tests. We offer workers the full range of Workman protection technology, with footwear designed and approved by NOM 113 STPS 2009, featuring a variety of styles and specific characteristics to meet every work need, from slip-resistant soles and ESD antistatic footwear to hydrocarbon and oil-resistant shoes, and even ultra-light shoes. Aware of the demand for specialized products in key sectors such as automotive, aerospace, pharmaceutical, medical, and electronics, where the careful management of processes, contamination control in production areas, cleanrooms, and adequate protection to prevent damage from electrostatic discharges are crucial, we have created the most comprehensive line of ESD antistatic footwear. Our line has been tested and accepted in accordance with the specifications of the Standard: ANSI/ESD S20.20-2021 – ANSI/ESD STM9.1-2022. Our promise? A comprehensive solution for safety, tactical, and occupational products, well-balanced collections with permanent stock, designed and manufactured in Mexico. Contact us.

Name: Korkers Footwear
Description:
Over six decades ago, our founder Sherman Smith watched towering men surf log rafts of old-growth timbers down our Northwest rivers. Anyone with eyes could see falling off would be bad. Real bad.

Fueled by stories of harrowing slips and falls, Sherman set to work carving soles and straps from old tires. He then stapled the pieces together into a lace-up overshoe. Sharp carbide studs completed the prototypes, giving the loggers indispensable traction on slick wood. To this day, Sherman’s ingenious invention stands as a massive innovation that saved an untold number of lives.

At the same time, a small group of steelhead fishermen were pioneering the snot-slick boulders of the North Umpqua. They took note of the loggers’ new studded footwear. Among these steelheaders was Frank Moore, an Umpqua river guide and owner of the then-Steamboat Inn. With typical Oregonian insight and problem-solving, legends like Frank adapted Smith’s overshoes to navigate the endless maze of the river’s ledges. Moore’s Steamboat Inn became our first dealer in 1959 and the Korkers legacy was set in the North Umpqua’s dangerously slick stone. 

Sixty-five years later, ingenuity and problem-solving remain our team’s guiding principles. Within our product line you’ll find innovations like the OmniTrax Interchangeable Sole System, Boa Lacing System, and quick-drying hydrophobic materials. No other company brings you adaptable traction footwear this comfortable, well-made or diverse. And you have our word, moving forward, we’re gonna keep standing tall on what we do best, so you can stand tall doing yours. 

Check out our full product line of fishing, outdoor, work, and casual footwear.

Name: Idecal
Description:
Established in 1989 and rooted in the vibrant city of Bogotá, Idecal has been a pioneering force in the Colombian footwear industry. From our inception, we have been dedicated to transforming plastic raw materials like thermoplastic rubber, expanded plastic, and polyvinyl chloride into versatile soles for all types of footwear.

Since 2017, our journey has been shaped by our state-of-the-art semi-automated factory, enabling us to shift our focus to the design and transformation of plastic mix compounds into PVC work boots and safety boots. Expanding our horizons, we later incorporated a fashion line featuring flats, rain boots, sandals, and loafers – all crafted from full plastic.

Our production ethos revolves around creating lightweight, comfortable, and durable footwear that seamlessly blends style with well-being. Idecal proudly serves distributors of institutional footwear, boutique clothing stores, footwear boutiques, e-commerce platforms, and marketplace partners. We also offer white-label solutions, catering to diverse industries such as agriculture, mining, construction, gardening, food processing, motorcycling, and fashion.

In alignment with our commitment to sustainability, Idecal partners with suppliers who adhere to eco-friendly practices. We aspire to contribute to a healthier environment by recycling all post-industry discards, ensuring nothing goes to waste. From compounds to packaging, everything is repurposed into new products.

At Idecal, our dedication extends beyond our products to the well-being of our employees and their families. We prioritize their stability and happiness by offering above-average salaries, continuous training, motivation, and promoting a healthy lifestyle. Meals are provided, reinforcing our commitment to creating a thriving and supportive workplace. Join us on our journey towards a sustainable and stylish future.

Most guys are wearing shoes that are too narrow: 75% of men have wide feet but only 25% are wearing wide shoes. This means squished toes, collapsed arches, and shot posture. STOKE was built to fix all that. Powerful footwear for all-American guys.

Name: Jácomo Botas
Description:
Em 1968 nasceu em Araçatuba, no interior de São Paulo, uma das mais tradicionais fábricas de botas do Brasil - a Jácomo Botas. Fruto do pioneirismo do Sr. Jácomo Ferracini Netto, a fábrica se tornou, ao longo dessas cinco décadas, uma referência nacional e internacional de qualidade, com produtos inovadores de excelente acabamento e alta durabilidade.

A ideia de produzir botas surgiu durante a Exposição Agropecuária de Araçatuba, em 1968, quando percebeu que ainda não havia uma fábrica que abastecesse o mercado regional. "A cidade já era famosa nacionalmente como a ‘Terra do Boi Gordo’. "Quis transformá-la também na ‘Terra das Botas'", lembra o empreendedor, que já era reconhecido como um grande sapateiro.

A princípio, a Jácomo iniciou suas atividades de maneira artesanal, fabricando botas sob encomenda. Foram longos anos de trabalho duro, medindo e calçando os pés de muitos artistas, políticos, pecuaristas e, principalmente, do cidadão comum que fazia questão de exibir suas botas Jácomo, modelo bico fino e salto carrapeta, nas rodas da sociedade.

A partir de 1993, os filhos Ricardo Ferracini e Jácomo Ferracini Júnior se incorporaram à empresa, que ampliou sua produção e passou a vender também para o atacado, conquistando novos e importantes clientes. Num trabalho arrojado, corpo a corpo junto a seus representantes e consumidores, a Jácomo se tornou líder de mercado e um produto obrigatório nas prateleiras das melhores lojas especializadas no ramo agropecuário e country do país. Por isso, é hoje sinônimo de qualidade e satisfação.

Assim, a Jácomo Botas chega aos dias de hoje com o aval de ser uma fábrica diferenciada. Porque a gente não fabrica apenas botas, mas sim realiza os sonhos de todas as pessoas que buscam um calçado com a qualidade e o conforto. 

Uma marca 100% nacional, que tem a cara do povo brasileiro. Uma marca que, como o seu povo, não desiste nunca de lutar pelos seus ideais e se esmera, dia a dia, por fazer sempre o melhor.

Le calzature MASOLINI1949 nascono dall'esperienza tramandata di padre in figlio dalla famiglia Masolini.

A crafted footwear always gives a unique emotion.

The MASOLINI1949 shoes are born from the experience handed down from father to son by the Masolini's family.

Their production takes place entirely within the family laboratory by the work of highly professional craftsmen. The manufacturing quality is combined with the choice of exclusive use of materials produced in Italy and, possibly, on site.

All production activities are carried out by hand: from the design of the shoe to the cutting and assembly of the parts. The result is a unique, original, comfortable and durable product.

Name: Sanatek Indústria Produtos Ortopédicos
Description:
Nossa empresa, a Sanatek, acredita que os pés são a base dos nossos movimentos, proporcionando liberdade, autonomia e boa postura. No entanto, quando ocorre algum problema nos nossos pés, como é o caso de pessoas com pés diabéticos ou reumáticos, que possuem neuropatias e/ou deformidades, isso pode prejudicar seriamente a qualidade de vida.

Desde 2017, a Sanatek tem se dedicado a pesquisar, desenvolver e aplicar os melhores materiais e tecnologia na produção de órteses plantares, visando melhorar a qualidade de vida das pessoas. Nossa equipe técnica é composta por profissionais da saúde com mais de 30 anos de experiência, o que garante a qualidade dos nossos produtos.

Nosso objetivo é oferecer aos nossos clientes produtos inovadores, que proporcionem excepcional funcionalidade, conforto e durabilidade para prevenir, proteger e tratar inúmeras patologias dos pés. Atualmente, estamos presentes em mais de 600 pontos de venda no Brasil e exportamos para outros 12 países.

Estamos felizes em auxiliá-lo nessa missão e nos comprometemos a oferecer produtos com total qualidade e compromisso irrestrito.

Ne e shikojmë të ardhmen me ambicie, duke synuar të jemi një pikë referimi në kete sektor, përsa i përket inovacionit dhe cilësisë. Por ajo që e bën Protec Shoes vërtetë unike është përkushtimi dhe puna e operatorëve tanë,ata jane zemra rrahëse e kompanisë sonë. Ne investojmë në mendjet dhe duart që sjellin në jetë këpucët tona. Ne jemi të përkushtuar për të promovuar mirëqenien e bashkëpunëtorëve tanë dhe për të siguruar që ata të marrin trajnimin e nevojshëm e cila na lejon të ofrojmë përsosmërinë e produkteve tona.
Autenticiteti, ndershmëria, përulësia dhe puna ne skuader: këto janë vlerat që udhëheqin çdo hap që hedhim. 
Kësaj i shtohet një angazhim i tanishëm dhe i ardhshëm për të konsideruar qendrueshmerine ekologjike si një pjesë integrale të jetës së përditshme të punës.

Name: Qusheli
Description:
Qusheli Shoes  has been established as a wholesale, retail, e-commerce production company in Turkey Our traditional business model is based on the accomplishment of the business transactions in the wholesale – retail markets in Europe and worldwide and manufacturing.
Qusheli offers customers the opportunity to express themselves freely with its producttion and collections designed in paralell with ever changing customer expectation and lifestyles. Sustained by our global network of partners and suppliers, Qusheli specializes in design and high-tech production of high-volume, time-sensitive shoe collections for the world’s leading customers.
Qusheli has redefined shoes with outstanding technical know-how and a perfected high-tech production process for customer demand. Research, design and innovation skills are always at the forefront of its activities to guarantee a top quality production range. The management, production and warehousing facilities are set in premises of over 2.200 square meters. 
Qusheli is a member of the Leather Working Group, which sets environmental best practices in the industry and provides its members with a sustainable, traceable supply chain environment. we work with various recyclable textile raw materials, such as recycled cotton and recycled polyester, the latter comes from the recycling of plastic bottles and plastic materials collected at the bottom of the sea.
Qusheli share the common corporate policy of attaining and maintaining Zero Accident at all work sites with emphasis on the safety of human beings at the first place.
Putting human health in the first place as a principle for raw materials, semifinished products and accessories, Qusheli considers the protection of nature as the foundation of sustainable production. Having intense trade relations with European and Asian countries, The countries our company has exported to Russia, Ukraine, France, Belgium, Netherlands,Germany, Bulgaria,Romania,Kazakistan, Poland and Saudi Arabia.

Name: Fagum Stomil
Description:
Since our company was established in 1899, successive generations of people connected with Fagum-Stomil have worked hard to meet our customers' expectations. 120 years of experience is a capital that we are extremely proud of. Based in Poland and with a 100% domestic capital, we design and manufacture professional, safety, fishing, hunting and general footwear.
Our shoes are used in virtually every area of human activity: in the manufacturing and chemical industry, power engineering, mining, construction, transport, as well as agriculture, horticulture and forestry, hunting and fishing. We also supply footwear for uniformed and medical services. Our offer includes footwear made of natural rubber, PU, PVC, EVA and the innovative TRC material. We also produce footwear made of natural and synthetic leather. Most of our production is carried out using the most durable direct injection method, but we also use other technological solutions.
Many years of experience, rich human capital, modern machine park, investments in innovative technologies and constant desire for development are the factors which make us a solid and predictable business partner. The highest quality, careful workmanship, durability and comfort of use are characteristic features of our footwear, thanks to which we have gained the trust of many customers in Poland and other European countries.

What sets us apart?

Color that pops: We believe shoes shouldn’t whisper — they should speak volumes. Our palette is fearless, just like our audience.

Fast fashion, faster access: With flash Insta offers , our community never misses the hottest drops.

Gen Z at the core: We track real-time trends, listen to our customers, and design with their lifestyle in mind — whether it’s campus, café, concert, or city street.

Shoeboxx combines style with speed, offering footwear that’s as dynamic as the generation it serves. We’re building more than shoes — we’re building a culture of confidence, energy, and individuality.

If you’re a trend seeker, creator, or bold self-starter, Shoeboxx is your perfect fit.
Follow us for the latest releases, collaborations, and exclusive deals — because your next pair shouldn’t just match your outfit, it should match your energy.

Name: FootFellas / Dutch Footwear Masters
Description:
Dutch Footwear Masters (DFM) is a unique new venture in footwear design and manufacturing.  Craftmanship is in the root of our business. We bring together the passion, knowledge and experience from two industry leaders and combine their collective experience in both fashion and safety footwear.

Dutch Footwear Masters is different. We have an experienced in-house team and an established network of partners, both domestic and international, that possess all the development capabilities necessary to design footwear straight from the drawing board to market. 
Our products are developed in-house and our lasts designed in Europe. With sustainability in mind, we source components and manufacture in countries where the raw materials and skills are available locally. 
All of our designs and components meet European safety standards.

In 2023 we created our own brand FootFellas

1.	FootFellas is produced by people with over 60 years of knowledge, experience and contacts in shoe development and shoe manufacturing.
2.	FootFellas meets the highest and latest European safety standards EN ISO 20345:2022 
3.	FootFellas also makes an extensive Women's footwear line on specially developed lasts, soles and toecaps, in addition to the extensive Men's footwear line. After all, Women's feet are substantially different from Men's feet.
4.	FootFellas uses the best materials, with the best (and often unique) features for the wearer
5.	FootFellas shoes are developed to be as comfortable as possible, light(er) in weight, excellent fit due to special lasts for women and men, moisture-regulating lining so you no longer suffer from sweaty feet, they are easy to put on and take off and feature an anatomically shaped footbed. 
6.	All FootFellas models come with metal-free toecaps and many are completely metal-free.

But above all, FootFellas shoes are also beautiful, functional and timeless. We want FootFellas to be ‘wanna-haves’ and not ‘need-to-haves’. In short, you can be seen with them!

Name: SAINA Group Co., Ltd.
Description:
Saina Group is a safety footwear manufacturer based in Ruian, Zhejiang, China. 

With heritage dating back to 1979, we own and operate four factories across China and Vietnam:  
- China: Saina Ruian, Ansai Ruian & Saina Suzhou  
- Vietnam: Kingshine Vietnam (operational since 2024)  

Specializing in cemented and injected construction techniques, we produce classic work, industrial, athletic, and tactical-style safety footwear.

In this era of supply chain challenges and evolving safety standards, Saina Group partners with global PPE brands, industrial leaders, and distributors. Together, we create safety footwear that marries uncompromising protection with wearer-centered design – because every step deserves confidence.

With a focus on timeless design and exceptional craftsmanship, our mission is to provide unique and authentic footwear that combines quality and style at an exceptional value.

Name: Trederra
Description:
Trederra rubber materials for outsoles is a composition you can count on to maintain or improve the durability of your footwear, with the added sustainability impact of keeping tires out of landfills. We're not just recycling tires. We're helping brands achieve greater sustainability while elevating the durability of their footwear.

Trederra is the first brand to identify a way to recycle tire treads and turn them into high-quality outsoles for your footwear that offer exceptional durability. Plus, you can use Trederra for up to 50% of an outsole, the highest percentage of recycled tire content that has ever been possible for footwear.

Planet-positive from cradle to gate.

Avec notre fabricant et nos fournisseurs français, nous nous mettons au service de la créativité pour fabriquer des chaussures qui restent, des chaussures haut de gamme qui se réinventent tout en subtilité, des chaussures innovantes qui s’affirment pour et avec la personnalité de nos clientes. Chacune d'elles pourra modifier ses chaussures selon ses envies, n'importe où.

"Avec Les Duchesses, vous n'achetez pas une paire de chaussures. Vous optez pour un panel de possibilités".

Nous cherchons à réduire la consommation des chaussures en misant sur des matériaux de qualité et un savoir-faire ancestral afin d'augmenter leur durabilité pour avoir un impact significatif sur la surconsommation. Sur le long-terme, nous aimerions contribuer à la relocalisation de la fabrication de chaussures en France à travers cette entreprise.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Les Duchesses - Brand of shoes with instant personalization, made in France.
"With Les Duchesses, you don't buy a pair of shoes, you opt for a range of possibilities."

Name: Indishoe Company

INDISHOE COMPANY is a global leader in the manufacturing, design, and development of premium leather footwear. With over 20 years of expertise, we have built a reputation for exceptional quality, craftsmanship, and innovation. Our commitment to excellence has positioned us as a trusted OEM partner for many of the world’s leading footwear brands across Europe, North America, South America, and Australia.

Our company’s distinctive image and goodwill have been consistently strengthened through long-term collaborations with renowned global buyers. With 15 years of hands-on expertise in shoemaking, I am personally dedicated to upholding the highest standards of product quality, creativity, and client service.

As we continue to expand our reach, we seek to forge new partnerships with footwear organizations worldwide—helping brands achieve excellence through precision manufacturing, trend-driven design, and superior craftsmanship. Let's create the future of footwear together.

Description: ‘Kavith' is a bold and edgy footwear and accessories brand by designer and patina artist, Kavith Sainaani, known for his fearlessness in embracing groundbreaking trends, and crafting shoes using the finest leathers. As India's first independent shoe design specialist, Kavith is highly regarded among Mumbai's elite and creates personalized offerings for influential fashion-focused men. The brand reflects a bold approach to design and incorporates a passion for patina art on premium leathers. Recognizing the popularity of generic leather brands in India, Kavith aims to cater to bold individuals seeking uniquely creative footwear styles that don't follow mainstream hype.

With a professional foreign trade team and a strong design capability, we support customized development, quality control, and stable delivery. YAOLI is committed to building long-term partnerships based on reliability, transparency, and product quality.

Name: Lea Footwear International Group
Description:
LEA has a successful history of designing and producing footwear products for 30+ years with our strategic partners across 6 continents. 

We partner with Fortune 500 companies and global brands to deliver high-quality footwear and agile supply chain solutions.

We have a robust manufacturing network across 6 countries, including China, Vietnam, Bangladesh, Indonesia, Myanmar, and Cambodia.

LEA is a design-led company that specializes in forecasting fashion trends, developing prototypes, and manufacturing footwear.

Testimony to our rich background of innovation as well as our exceptional quality and service, we produce over 15-20 million pairs of shoes annually for industry-leading clients.

Reliability. Agility. Creativity. 
Our goal is to be the footwear supplier brands trust for dependable, flexible, and creative solutions — from concept to delivery.

We don’t just make shoes — we help shape how people move through the world.

Name: Atelier Uniqua
Description:
Uniqua est une marque de basket 100% personnalisable, réparable et made in Limoges qui s'adresse aussi aux professionnels. Pour créer une basket qui vous ressemble avec vos motifs, vos logos et vos images contactez nous ou rendez-vous sur notre site https://uniqua-limoges.fr/ 

Tous nos modèles sont fabriqués sur commande à notre atelier situé à Limoges par nos soins. Nous sommes fiers de travailler avec des fournisseurs français et limousins pour vous proposer des chaussures de qualité au meilleur prix. 

Pour les plus curieux nous proposons des Ateliers Découverte pour venir fabriquer votre paire de basket Uniqua avec nous en suivant toutes les étapes de conception.

Name: CONSTANT BOSSI
Description:
Depuis plus de cinquante ans, Constant BOSSI est spécialisé dans la création et la fabrication d’articles chaussants en France. Ancrée dans le Sud-Ouest depuis sa création en 1973, notre entreprise a traversé les décennies en préservant son atelier en France, tout en demeurant une entité familiale et indépendante. Un héritage et une fierté pour la 3ème génération présente dans l’entreprise. 

Chaque année, notre atelier situé en Dordogne (24), produit plus de 250 000 paires de chaussons, incarnant notre engagement quotidien pour le maintien de l’emploi et le savoir-faire en France.

Découpe des matières, piqûre, assemblage de la semelle, nous maîtrisons l’ensemble des étapes de fabrication de nos articles chaussants 100% made in France.

Au fil du temps, notre entreprise est devenue une référence nationale pour la qualité et le confort dans le domaine du chausson français.

PERSONNALISATION ET RÉACTIVITÉ AU CŒUR DE NOTRE MÉTIER

Notre bureau d'étude interne et nos équipements nous offrent la capacité de personnaliser nos propres tissus grâce à notre imprimante numérique textile.
Cet outil, très flexible, est non seulement gage de réactivité mais aussi le socle d’une créativité illimitée pour offrir des designs exclusifs. Notre atelier ne se limite pas à la fabrication de chaussons et de chaussures ; nos compétences techniques s’étendent à d’autres gammes d’articles textiles diversifiés.

Nous misons sur nos capacités créatives, la rapidité d’exécution et la maîtrise de notre savoir-faire pour satisfaire pleinement les exigences de nos clients.

 Vous avez des idées, des projets, ou envisagez de relocaliser votre production ? Contactez-nous pour nous parler de vous et de votre projet pour une collaboration « made in France ».

Name: MISS ELASTIC
Description:
Hi, We're Miss Elastic! 

Nuestra misión es generar un impacto positivo en el mundo y en las personas que nos rodean. Hemos logrado con éxito desarrollar una línea de calzado de alta calidad, que destaca por su comodidad y tendencia, al mismo tiempo que se mantiene en precios razonables. 

Buscamos constantemente formas de reducir residuos y optimizar nuestros procesos para ser lo más respetuosos posible con el planeta.

Nuestro objetivo es claro: ser la primera marca nacional que ofrece zapatos 100% animal friendly, sin comprometer la comodidad y el diseño. Cada par de zapatos es una declaración de nuestro compromiso con la moda con principios, hechos con amor en España.

Reutilizamos 6 botellas de plástico para fabricar un par de zapatos, contribuyendo a la reducción de residuos y la limpieza de nuestros océanos. Hasta ahora, hemos reciclado 300,000 botellas de plástico. Únete a nosotros en esta travesía hacia un mundo más racional y sostenible! Elige Miss Elastic, elige #ModaConPrincipios

-

Our mission is to make a positive impact on the world and the people around us. We have successfully developed a line of high-quality footwear that stands out for its comfort and trendiness while maintaining reasonable prices. 

We are constantly seeking ways to reduce waste and optimize our processes to be as respectful as possible to the planet. 

Our goal is to be the first national Spanish brand offering 100% animal-friendly shoes without compromising comfort and design. Each pair of shoes is a statement of our commitment to fashion with principles, made with love in Spain. 

We reuse 6 plastic bottles to make a pair of shoes, contributing to waste reduction and the cleaning of our oceans. So far, we have recycled 300,000 plastic bottles. Join us on this journey towards a more rational and sustainable world! Choose Miss Elastic, choose #SustanaibleStyle

Name: MAIMAI
Description:
Fresh and new, smooth, unrestricted, combining the global life style with the local culture of Salento. 

Maimai was founded in 2012 as a spin off project of Calzaturificio Emmegiemme Shoes, one of the most prominent Italian sneakers manufacturers, mixing the grand knowledge of shoemaking, the superb flavour of Made in Italy and the willingness to express and communicate the essentials of a strong identity. 

Born in the wonderful land of Salento, its colors, perfumes, shapes and art are at the base of the inspiration for each collection.
The attachment to the land and the aim to protect it bring the company to care a lot about environment protection, cultural promotion and people safeguard, which are among the fundamental values of MAIMAI.

MAIMAI shoes are a short circuit between comfort and street style with an infusion of fashion into daily routine. Its collections are a mirror for our fluid world, for the cultural mix and match and for all those ingredients that made continuous changing the only reliable rule of our contemporary living.

Name: W. C. Russell Moccasin Co.
Description: Since 1898 Russell has been handcrafting boots and shoes for adventure. From aviators to the African plains, our footwear can be found on the feet of pioneers everywhere.

Name: Jayshree Group
Description:
Jayshree Group is a leading footwear manufacturer with over four decades of expertise, dedicated to providing high-quality, durable, and stylish products. Founded with a vision to innovate footwear solutions, the company has established a reputation for its exceptional craftsmanship and ability to meet diverse market needs.

As a trusted original equipment manufacturer (OEM), Jayshree Group specializes in producing a wide range of footwear using advanced technologies such as EVA injection molding, PVC DIP shoe injection machines, a double-decker stuck-on line, a complete Hawai and fabrication line, and PU shoes and slippers. With a robust distribution network, the company supplies its products to major retail and e-commerce platforms throughout India.

Jayshree Group's commitment to quality and innovation has solidified its position as a reliable partner in the footwear industry, consistently meeting the evolving demands of the market.

Name: CONTINENTS FOOTWEAR
Description:
Continent Footwears is a premium footwear manufacturer partnering with some of the most iconic and forward-thinking fashion houses across the UK and Europe. With a strong focus on minimalist design, international craftsmanship, and consistent quality, we are the trusted backbone behind several top-tier footwear lines seen across global markets.

We specialize in end-to-end footwear manufacturing, offering white-label and private-label production for luxury and designer brands. From conceptual design to scalable production, our facilities combine artisanal craftsmanship with advanced manufacturing technology—delivering timeless, fashion-forward footwear that meets global standards.

Alongside contract manufacturing, Continent Footwears proudly runs its own unisex footwear brand, created to push design boundaries while staying true to minimalist elegance.

Name: Neri Sport
Description:
Un’azienda produttrice di calzature di alta gamma situata nel cuore della Riviera del Brenta, in Veneto. Con oltre settant’anni di esperienza, Calzaturificio Neri è specializzato in calzature formali da donna e sneakers per i più importanti brand di lusso.

Di proprietà e gestione completamente italiana, Neri è da tre generazioni sotto la guida della famiglia Bozzolan. Pierluigi, Giulio, Monica ed Alessandro hanno saputo consolidare il percorso imprenditoriale iniziato dal fondatore Giulio e la moglie Zita nel 1953, mantenendo un prodotto qualitativamente elevato sempre al centro del processo produttivo.

Sviluppata su tre stabilimenti, la produzione 100 % Made in Italy vede ognuna delle sedi specializzata in una tipologia diversa di calzatura.

Grazie all’esperienza maturata, Neri è in grado di offrire un servizio completo che va a coprire tutti gli step del processo, dalla progettazione alla produzione su larga scala. Da sempre attenta ai continui cambiamenti del settore e ai miglioramenti tecnologici, l’azienda è in grado di soddisfare i più elevati standard.

de

Description:
Ein Meilenstein für gesunde Füße und Stil

Die Kollektion vereint das seit den 1950er Jahren bewährte 5-Phasen-Fußbett mit richtungsweisender Neugestaltung des renommierten New Yorker Designers Jan Wilker. „Wir verbinden orthopädische Expertise mit aktuellem Zeitgeist“, so Geschäftsführer Thomas Bauerfeind.

Nachhaltigkeit und Handwerkskunst im Fokus
Die neue Kollektion von Heinrich Berkemann setzt auf nachhaltige Materialien und traditionelle Handwerkskunst. Das verwendete Pappelholz stammt aus der europäischen Forstwirtschaft und ist ein natürlicher, schnell nachwachsender Rohstoff. Diese nachhaltige Wahl trägt zur Reduzierung des ökologischen Fußabdrucks bei und bietet gleichzeitig einen einzigartigen Komfort: Das Pappelholz hält die Füße warm, wenn es kalt ist, und angenehm kühl bei warmem Wetter.
Die Herstellung erfolgt in Berkemanns eigenem Produktionsbetrieb, in der jede Holzsohle den gesamten Produktionsprozess vom Fräsen der Rohlinge bis hin zur finalen Versiegelung durchläuft. Die Endfertigung der Schuhe übernehmen erfahrene Schumacher, die mit viel handwerklichem Geschick die Schuhmodelle zusammenfügen.

Über Berkemann
Gegründet 1885 in Hamburg, steht Berkemann seit fast 140 Jahren für hochwertige, fußgesunde Schuhe. Das Unternehmen vereint traditionelles Handwerk mit innovativen Technologien und setzt Maßstäbe in der orthopädischen Schuhmode.

Description:

With over 40 years of combined industry expertise, we specialize in crafting boots, sandals, formals, and casuals that balance style, comfort, and durability.

Our state-of-the-art 110,000 sq. ft. facility, equipped with 5 advanced lasting lines, integrates the latest technology and skilled craftsmanship. A dedicated R&D division develops 50 new samples daily, ensuring agility, trend relevance, and consistent quality across all production runs.

Magnum Footwear exports globally, partnering with renowned footwear brands and importers across Europe, the United Kingdom, the United States, and Latin America. Our clients rely on us for precision manufacturing, ethical compliance, and reliable delivery making us a trusted name in global footwear production.

At Magnum, we blend traditional craftsmanship with advanced systems like Real-Time Production Tracking, C-TPAT-certified supply chains, and sustainable manufacturing practices, ensuring every pair meets international standards of design and responsibility.

Why Choose Magnum Footwear?

 Over a decade of proven manufacturing excellence
 Global exports to leading international footwear brands
 Fully compliant facility (SA8000 | SEDEX | BSCI | ICS | C-TPAT)
 End-to-end R&D and customization capabilities
 Scalable infrastructure with 1M+ annual pair capacity

Looking Ahead

We welcome collaborations with women’s footwear brands, private labels, importers, and exporters seeking a reliable manufacturing partner for their production requirements.
 Let’s build something extraordinary together!
Reach out to us at info@magnumfootwear.in or visit www.magnumfootwear.in to explore partnership opportunities.

Name: Caborca Group Official
Description:
Nuestra aventura inicia más o menos hace 45 años en el ocaso de una de las décadas más emocionantes del siglo pasado. Al igual que algunos de los movimientos culturales más importantes de la historia, Botas Caborca, también nació en los 70′s.

Para probar suerte dentro del mundo zapatero, Luis Torres Muñoz y sus dos hijos Luis y José Manuel montaron un pequeño taller de bota en León, Guanajuato, una de las ciudades con mayor tradición zapatera en México y el mundo.

Iniciaron Pequeños, sólo eran 6 trabajadores y fabricaban 12 pares al día. A la empresa le pusieron Botas Caborca en honor a un pequeño pueblo del norte de México, iniciando operaciones en Abril de 1978.

Durante algunos años se dedicaron a fabricar la tradicional bota vaquera hecha a mano y se concentraron en vender solamente dentro del territorio mexicano. Poco a poco el antiguo oficio de hacer bota a mano se fue profesionalizando y el sueño comenzaba a tomar forma.  

El año de 1986 fue histórico porque fue el año en que se empezaron a exportar los primeros pares a Estados Unidos. A partir de ahí, esta empresa ha pasado a tener un nombre reconocido dentro del mundo del calzado a nivel mundial. 

Año con año la empresa se fue haciendo más fuerte y comenzó a exportar a otras partes del mundo como Canadá, Japón e Italia. La compañía «Botas Caborca» se transformó en «Caborca Group».

En la actualidad Caborca Group cuenta con 5 marcas propias y 4 plantas manufactureras cubriendo un área total de 30,000 metros cuadrados donde fabricamos alrededor de 8,000 pares semanales con la ayuda de más de 800 colaboradores. 

Generaciones de trabajo duro han forjado este legado. En 45 años de trabajo arduo hemos logrado consolidar una gran empresa que ha dejado su legado bien cimentado en la tradición botera del país.

Nos sentimos orgullosos de nuestras raíces al igual que nos sentimos orgullosos de nuestros productos porque en ellos hemos materializado el futuro de nuestro sudor, nuestro esfuerzo y nuestra entrega.

Name: Giri Fashion Industries

Giri Fashion Industries, a venture meticulously managed by the visionary Sachin Giri, was established in 2023 with a bold and inspiring vision – to empower and uplift "Make in India."

Under the astute leadership of Sachin Giri, we have cultivated an environment that fosters creativity, craftsmanship, and sustainability. Our mission is to promote indigenous talent, artisanal skills, and ethical practices, and in doing so, we have forged a path towards a more self-reliant and resilient fashion ecosystem.

At Giri Fashion Industries, we blend tradition with modernity, celebrating India's rich heritage while embracing cutting-edge techniques. Our commitment to "Make in India" is more than just a slogan; it's a testament to our dedication to contributing to the growth and development of our nation.

With a focus on quality, authenticity, and a sustainable approach to fashion, we're here to make a difference. Giri Fashion Industries isn't just about clothing; it's about a movement to empower local artisans, reduce our ecological footprint, and redefine the fashion landscape in India.

Join us on this remarkable journey, and together, let's make "Make in India" more than a vision – let's make it a reality.  #GiriFashionIndustries #MakeInIndia #FashionRevolution #VisionaryLeadership

Name: LUIS GONZALO 1966
Description:
History

Since 1966, with deep affection and dedication, the Luis Gonzalo family has been crafting shoes in the city of Almansa, a genuine hub of footwear in Spain, while preserving the venerable tradition of artisanal manufacturing and excellence in quality. In our factory, we have the finest machinery, but all our manufacturing processes (design, cutting, assembly, finishing, and detailing) are carried out entirely by hand, always with a strong commitment to environmental protection and subject to strict quality controls. Our Luis Gonzalo shoe collections are refreshed with each season, incorporating the latest fashion trends while never forgetting the unmistakable classic touch that defines all our products.

Tradition and Quality

Our factory is equipped with the best machinery, yet all manufacturing processes (design, cutting, finishing, assembling, final touches, and stitching) are entirely artisanal, with a focus on environmental protection and rigorous quality control.

Crafting great shoes is no easy task

Our collections are renewed each season, introducing fashion trends while never neglecting the classic touch that characterizes all our products.

There are no secrets in our shoes. We only use leather from the finest tanneries, selecting the most durable and comfortable materials and infusing passion into every aspect of their production.

Description:
Wij verdiepen ons in de wensen van de klant, waardoor elke klant met een tevreden gevoel terug kan kijken op de samenwerking. Dit wordt mede mogelijk gemaakt door de service. Samen met de klant wordt de situatie besproken en waar nodig aangepast om zo tot het beste resultaat te komen.

Waar het ruim 40 jaar geleden begon uit plezier voor het werk is nu uitgegroeid tot een volwaardige onderneming. In Waalwijk zit Snaphaan schoenen gevestigd. Waalwijk is een echte schoenen industrie (schoenlappers land).

De kracht en kwaliteit stromen vooral voort uit het feit dat alles in eigen beheer is, en de klant centraal staat. Dit wilt inhouden dat wij alles zelf kunnen produceren en hier geen externe partijen voor nodig hebben. Hierdoor kunnen wij de gemaakte afspraken nakomen, aangezien wij van niemand afhankelijk zijn. Dit is het vakmanschap waar wij dan ook erg trost op zijn!

Our shoes are front-of-closet essentials, designed to outlast trends and move effortlessly through every moment of life. From ballet and Mary Jane styles to penny loafers and modern classics, each silhouette is reimagined with intention - refined, wearable and forever relevant.

Designed in Sweden and hand-crafted in Spain, every Turf shoe reflects a commitment to thoughtful design and quality craftsmanship. Turf believes in slow fashion: creating responsibly and ethically, producing with care, and designing shoes meant to stay in your life - not just your closet.

Founded in 2005, TDO Therapy is a trailblazing name in the field of therapeutic, diabetic, and orthopedic footwear. Our commitment to comprehensive foot care and improved quality of life has made us a trusted leader in the industry. Our name, TDO Therapy, stands for Therapeutic, Diabetic, and Orthopaedic, reflecting our unwavering dedication to providing holistic solutions for a diverse range of foot-related concerns.

 Our Mission
At TDO Therapy, we are on a mission to enhance the mobility, comfort, and overall well-being of our valued customers. We blend traditional craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology and the latest scientific insights to create footwear that caters to the unique needs of every individual.

 Innovative Footwear
Our meticulously handcrafted footwear is a testament to our commitment to excellence. Using traditional techniques and premium raw materials, we deliver products of the highest quality. Our patented "Triple-layer Technology" ensures the ultimate foot protection.

 Style Meets Comfort
Comfort should never compromise style. With our specially developed molds, we offer an extensive array of styles during each fitting. Our footwear includes exclusive features such as seamless lining, removable insoles, anti-shock outsoles, and adjustable straps—all designed to alleviate foot problems and boost foot health.

 Supporting Wellness
From addressing diabetic foot issues to orthopedic conditions, we take pride in supporting every stage of treatment. At TDO Therapy, we are your steadfast partner in your journey towards healthier, happier feet.

Join us on LinkedIn to stay updated on the latest in foot care, innovation, and wellness. Trust TDO Therapy for a decade of dedication and a lifetime of foot health and comfort.  www.tdotherapy.co.uk

Name: PETCHER Footwear
Description:
Founded in 2004, Petcher Footwear is one of the top global leader in Safety and Outdoor Footwear. Based in Enping, Guangdong Province, China, we have quickly earned a global reputation for quality, innovation, and reliability. Our production capacity now exceeds 3.8 million pairs annually, a testament to our growth over two decades.


At the heart of Petcher Footwear resides quality. Our products undergo rigorous testing and comply with international standards such as GB, CE, ASTM, CSA, AS/NZS, and KOSHA. As a gold SATRA member, we emphasize quality and innovation. We were among the first in our field to earn certifications like BSCI, Sedex, ISO 9001, 14001, and 18001, reflecting our commitment to meeting global standards.

Our sales team provides comprehensive service, backed by a creative design and development team that offers innovative, industry-leading designs. Our unique ERP system ensures efficient communication, real-time monitoring, and swift delivery, enhancing client satisfaction.

Through our Inventory Efficiency (IE) control system, we maintain competitive pricing by optimizing costs without sacrificing quality. We partner with leading suppliers to secure advanced materials at the best rates, ensuring superior, cost-effective footwear.

Petcher has always aimed for an international presence, forming partnerships with global clients and expanding our reach across continents. Our focus on quality, service, and competitive pricing has made us a trusted name in safety footwear.

We are committed to providing exceptional service, positioning ourselves as a reliable partner. Our focus on innovation, precision, and reliability drives us to set new standards in the footwear industry.

We stand for innovation, precision, and reliability. We strive to deliver products that meet the highest standards of excellence, whether for safety, outdoor use, or specialized needs. Join us as we continue to lead and innovate in the global footwear industry.

Sur notre site, nous créons un univers divisé en deux facettes fascinantes, chacune apportant une expérience unique aux amateurs de sneakers et aux aficionados de l'individualisme stylistique. La première facette de cet univers est dédiée à des designs imaginés avec soin, qui sont proposés en édition limitée et numérotée. Ces créations sont le fruit de notre passion pour les sneakers et de notre engagement à offrir à nos clients des pièces uniques et exclusives. Chaque paire est conçue avec une attention méticuleuse aux détails, mettant en avant des motifs, des matériaux et des couleurs qui reflètent une vision artistique authentique. En proposant ces éditions limitées, nous visons à satisfaire les collectionneurs et les amateurs de sneakers qui recherchent une touche de singularité dans leur garde-robe.

La deuxième facette de cet univers est tout aussi excitante, car elle offre la possibilité de personnaliser votre paire de sneakers de manière totalement sur mesure, grâce à notre configurateur en ligne innovant. Cette option de personnalisation vous permet de laisser libre cours à votre imagination et de transformer vos rêves de sneakers en réalité. Vous avez le contrôle absolu sur chaque élément de votre paire, des motifs et des couleurs jusqu'aux matériaux et aux finitions. Que vous souhaitiez des sneakers audacieuses et colorées qui expriment votre personnalité unique, ou une paire plus classique et élégante qui s'accorde parfaitement avec votre style, notre configurateur vous permet de créer la sneaker de vos rêves.

Lorsque vous personnalisez vos sneakers sur notre site, vous devenez le créateur, l'architecte de votre propre style. Vous pouvez choisir des matériaux de haute qualité pour garantir un confort optimal et une durabilité exceptionnelle. Chaque détail compte, de la teinte des lacets à la gravure de votre nom sur la languette. Cette personnalisation sur mesure est une véritable célébration de l'unicité et de l'individualisme, vous permettant de porte
