Name: Alexander Pace
Description:
Alexander Pace benefits from over 30 years of experience that the shoemakers have passed on from generations. Every pair from our high-quality shoe collection is still handcrafted in our workshop and quality controlled by experts at each step of the process.

HOW WE DO IT?

The factory was designed to make fine British shoes. Each section was custom built to achieve this. For example good natural light is a prime requirement for leather grading, colour matching and consistently good stitching, so the environment was arranged to provide this. Alexander Pace promises quality with no compromises.

WHY ARE ALEXANDER PACE SHOES & BOOTS SO GOOD

The originality of our brand will ensure that you are always one step ahead of the fashion game while discovering your unique style. The wide variety means that there is a pair of shoes for everyone.

At first glance, you will discover a broad range of unique designs to match your distinctive style. Choosing each pair of your Alexander Pace Shoes & Boots will be a delightful affair that will make you yearn for more of this thrilling experience.

Once you have had the privilege of slipping a pair onto your feet, you will feel blissfully comfortable. The softest genuine leather will make you want to sleep with your shoes on.

It's simple; we create authentic shoes that are charismatic, each with their own exquisite charm while keeping that all-important comfort and high quality. We wish you a never-ending leather-clad love affair with Alexander Pace!

Your adventure begins here!

Com um olhar clínico e apurado sobre todo o processo de produção, prezamos por um padrão incomparável de qualidade, proporcionado por um trabalho manual que carrega em sua essência uma extrema precisão nos detalhes, assim dando um toque especial em seu estilo.

Sostenibilità: Impegnati per un futuro più sostenibile, utilizziamo processi produttivi eco-friendly e materiali riciclabili.


Perché Scegliere Solettificio Silver?

Esperienza: 56 anni di esperienza nel settore ci permettono di garantire prodotti di eccellenza.

Innovazione: Investiamo costantemente in ricerca e sviluppo per rimanere all'avanguardia nel mercato.

Servizio Clienti: La nostra squadra è sempre pronta a supportare i clienti con professionalità e dedizione.


Unisciti a noi per scoprire le ultime novità nel mondo dei soletti e per rimanere aggiornato sulle tendenze del settore. Segui la nostra pagina per contenuti esclusivi, notizie e opportunità di networking

Name: Terra e Água ind. de calçados
Description:
A Terra e Água foi fundada em 1996 com o intuito de produzir calçados de qualidade, conforto e estilo para todas as mulheres do Brasil. Atualmente é referência no mercado de calçados, trazendo cada vez mais confiabilidade e opções para os seus clientes.

 

Ao longo dos anos, com a expansão da marca, surgiu a oportunidade de desbravar novos mercados além de calçados femininos e, em 2021, foram lançadas as coleções: Bolsas, Masculina e Infantil, alcançando o maior número de pessoas com a melhor qualidade.



Presente em todo território nacional e em mais de 30 países, a Terra & Água tem como missão trazer o melhor design, conforto e qualidade nos seus produtos e, principalmente, a responsabilidade com o nosso planeta. Por isso, temos como objetivo a busca por melhores processos, como as diminuições de poluentes, utilização de toda matéria-prima de maneira consciente, o que faz com que nossos produtos sejam recicláveis, e não possuindo em nossa composição nenhum material de origem animal.



Essa responsabilidade com a sustentabilidade ambiental e o comprometimento com nossos colaboradores é disseminada por toda a empresa, assim como o delicioso cheirinho característico de tutti-frutti que encanta os que adquirem os produtos.


Nosso propósito é atingir o máximo de satisfação do nosso cliente com total bem-estar e liberdade para ser quem é.

Name: Grupo Danper
Description:
Seja bem-vindo(a) ao Grupo Danper, onde cada passo é uma experiência de conforto, estilo e sustentabilidade. Uma líder consolidada na indústria de calçados há quase duas décadas, está localizada na cidade de Araújos, no estado de Minas Gerais, somos um grupo empresarial que se dedica à fabricação e comercialização de calçados, com destaque especial para os chinelos e sandálias.

Nossas marcas possuem características únicas, atendendo a diferentes perfis de consumidores e necessidades específicas. Desde chinelos casuais até opções mais sofisticadas para ocasiões especiais, temos o calçado perfeito para cada momento da vida dos nossos clientes.

Além da qualidade dos nossos produtos, também nos destacamos pelo compromisso com a responsabilidade social e ambiental. Valorizamos a sustentabilidade em todas as etapas do nosso processo produtivo, buscando minimizar o impacto no meio ambiente contribuindo para um mundo melhor.

Desde a nossa fundação, em 2004, nos comprometemos em oferecer produtos de alta qualidade, conforto e durabilidade. Ao longo dos anos, conquistamos uma sólida reputação no mercado, tanto no âmbito nacional quanto internacional, tornando-nos uma referência no setor calçadista.

Fundada pelos irmãos Daniel e Danilo Percília (sócios-diretores), contam com um time de colaboradores competentes e muito comprometidos, contribuindo para o crescimento e desenvolvimento da comunidade local, construindo parcerias sólidas com fornecedores e clientes, que são fundamentais para o nosso sucesso.

Estamos entusiasmados em compartilhar essa história de sucesso com você e convidamos a conhecer os nossos produtos e imergir no mundo dos calçados de excelência fabricados pelo nosso grupo.

Name: PG4 Galleria
Description: PG4 Galleria is a Brazilian factory of handmade shoes made with genuine leather. We work with value-added products, lined in leather and handmade with high quality materials. We are specialists in Private Label production and we export to diverse clients in more than 20 countries.

Name: Bloc Footwear
Description: Bloc Footwear is a proudly South African footwear brand that blends heritage with modern design to deliver quality, comfort, and style. More than just footwear, we empower individuals to embrace their roots while moving forward in fashion and performance.

Name: ALERT INDIA PVT. LTD.
Description:
ALERT SOLES is a premier shoe sole manufacturer offering a wide range of high-quality PU, Rubber, EVA, Phylon, Air, and TPR soles. Our commitment to excellence ensures that every product meets high standards of durability, comfort, and style.

We strive to be a trusted partner for footwear manufacturers by delivering innovative solutions, consistent quality, and reliable customer support.

Our manufacturing practices are supported by BIS and ZED certifications, reflecting our adherence to established quality and process standards.

Choosing Alert Soles means access to a comprehensive product range, continuous innovation, and dependable manufacturing expertise.

Name: Cindy Footwears
Description:
Cindy Shoe manufactures private-label ladies' footwear for its sales. Cindy Shoe specializes in manufacturing, supplying, wholesaling, and overseeing the development, and shipping of different customized shoe models to all our customers.

Cindy Shoes deals in all sorts of ladies’ customized footwear, like shoes, sandals, flats, boots, sneakers, flip-flops, stiletto heels, high-heeled shoes, and slippers which are available in several models, designs, and soles. Being the manufacturer Cindy offers the best price segment for all types of footwear.

We are also listed as top sellers of footwear on multiple top Indian and international e-commerce B2B and B2C portals. Making Cindy India's most preferred women's shoe brand.

Name: Neotrek Footwear
Description:
Neotrek Footwear is redefining adaptive footwear for people with foot anatomy differences. Over 230 million worldwide live with conditions from diabetes, trauma, or birth, yet most are left with painful or unattractive options.

What sets us apart is the blend of lived experience and design innovation. Our founder, a partial-foot amputee, pairs personal insight with advanced 3D scanning and modern design to create footwear that restores comfort, mobility, and confidence.

We started by launching Truer-Fit socks—made in the USA with sustainable fibers, seamless comfort, and configurations for both standard users and partial-foot amputees. In Summer 2025, we introduced the Neotrek Naya, the world’s first custom-fit outdoor sandal built from a simple 3D foot scan. Designed with integrated orthotic support and real-world durability, Naya brings freedom without compromise.

NeoTrek stands for #FootEquity—because everyone deserves footwear that fits their life.

Name: KIARTE Footwear
Description: We are a footwear company with a history of excellence in creating models for men and women since 1987. We have our own collection and also offer flexibility to design and develop customized models based on customer preferences. Join us for SHOEnovation Day and unlock your full creative potential! Register now to secure your spot.

Name: Solid Step
Description:
At Solid Step, we believe every worker deserves footwear that works as hard as they do. Our commitment is simple: help you stand strong and step safe—no matter the job.

From factory floors to construction sites, from oil fields to warehouses, our safety shoes are engineered for the toughest environments while keeping comfort in every step. Built with durability, grip, and support at their core, each pair delivers the protection you need without compromising on style or wearability.

We don’t just make shoes—we provide a promise of safety, reliability, and performance. Every product is rigorously tested to meet international safety standards, ensuring that when you wear Solid Step, you’re equipped to grip, guard, and go through your workday with confidence.

Our Mission
To empower the workforce with high-quality, durable, and affordable safety footwear that delivers unmatched protection and comfort—enabling every step to be a solid one, on any job site, in any condition.

Our Vision
To become a leading name in safety footwear across the region by setting new benchmarks in reliability, design, and value—ensuring every worker stands strong and safe, every step of the way.

Why Choose Solid Step?
B2B Specialists – Catering to bulk and corporate orders (MOQ 200+)

Industry-Wide Solutions – Footwear designed for construction, manufacturing, oil & gas, logistics, and more

Global Standards – Compliant with top safety certifications

Durability Meets Comfort – Long-lasting materials with ergonomic designs

 Let’s work together to protect your workforce. Connect with us or email sales@solidstep.net for inquiries.

Name: ZENONSTEP
Description:
We specialise in footwear development and always strive to satisfy our customers through the rigour and high quality of our products/services. 
Our instinct for creation and development is combined with a strong know-how and experience in the construction of all types of footwear.

Our team offers a complete service that we call the ‘All Steps In One’ process:
-Product and brand design;
-Research and selection of materials as well as development of soles and applications/labels;
-Manual modelling and CAD CAM automatic cutting;
-Prototyping;
-Production (70/80 pairs per day depending on the specifics);
-Quality control throughout the process.

As part of our mission is the evolution, growth and consequent success of our clients, we provide support and accompaniment to the brands after the development and production of the footwear.
We are driven by dedication, knowledge, experience, quality and innovation.

We are also increasingly concerned about sustainability, so whenever possible we take the precaution of creating the smallest footprint on the environment, prioritising national products.

Our vision is to make a difference and guarantee our customers the best product. Proof of this is that we have a unique made-to-measure service with customisation and personalisation at the client's discretion/taste to maximise comfort and satisfaction.
We keep the art of ‘handmade footwear’ alive.
Shoe tailoring exists.
The ideal shoe is possible.

Walk with us.
ZenOnStep


INSTAGRAM - zenonstep_
https://www.instagram.com/zenonstep_/

Name: Groov
Description:
Groov is a first-of-its-kind Footwear Personalization System.

The ShapeSense technology built into our mobile app uses 3D-Scanning and Al-powered algorithmic optimization to determine your perfect step. A game-changing suite of products - called Groovs - enable full customization of the inside of any shoe to maximize comfort, support, and performance in anything from flats to heels, work boots to loafers, and sneakers to ski boots. Our retail 3.0 fulfillment model enables at-home biometric intake in just minutes, on-demand manufacturing completed within hours, and delivery to your door within days.

The end result? A system that discovers your perfect fit and enables you to make any pair of shoes feel Groovy, bringing an end to the tradeoff between what you want to wear and what feels most wearable.

As we like to say: We don't make your shoes. We makes shoes yours.

Stay Groovy :)

Name: Annelieke van Halen
Description:
As an artisan shoemaker who is driven by a lifelong love for shoes, I create timeless designs that span the seasons. My passion for modern and contemporary art is reflected in the minimalist, clean lines of my designs. Each pair of shoes I produce is made to order; I use quality leather and biodegradable materials from Italy for all my creations, resulting in footwear that exudes a high-quality finish and is ideal for lovers of sustainable products.

It is not only possible to order the models from my collection. I also offer the possibility to order tailor-made shoes entirely according to your wishes. 

It has never been more important to know the provenance and environmental impact of what you are buying. I believe in creating honest, low-impact products that help you reduce your carbon footprint.

Name: arpent
Description:
Founded in Paris, Arpent is an independent workshop dedicated to bespoke shoemaking, industrial design, and research around artisanal craftsmanship. The atelier follows a clear ambition: creating exceptional footwear while transmitting the fundamental knowledge of the trade.
Arpent is structured around three complementary pillars: bespoke creation, design & process development, and professional training.
Each pair, each project, and each training session reflects the precision, rigor, and pursuit of excellence that define the workshop.

Today, our young artisans, trained by seasoned masters within our factory, carry forward this legacy, blending traditional techniques with modern advancements to create high-quality, stylish footwear.

Name: Aquisha footwears
Description:
Welcome to AQUISHA FOOTWEARS. We are a team of dedicated shoe makers, designers and enthusiasts who strive to create the perfect blend of style and comfort. Our passion for creating footwear that is both fashionable and practical is what drives us to constantly push the boundaries and design shoes that are truly one-of-a-kind.

We believe that shoes are not just an accessory, but a reflection of who you are. That's why we put so much time and effort into designing shoes that are not only fashionable, but also functional. We use high-quality materials to ensure that our shoes are not only stylish, but also durable and comfortable.

Our collection features a wide range of styles to suit all tastes, from classic and timeless designs to bold and trendy styles. We cater to women and girls and have something to suit all foot types, whether you have wide feet, narrow feet or anything in between.

We are  committed to sustainability and are constantly looking for ways to reduce our environmental impact. We use eco-friendly materials and production methods to ensure that our shoes are not only good for your feet, but also good for the planet environment.

We believe that everyone deserves to have a pair of shoes that they love, and we are dedicated to making that happen. We hope you enjoy our collection and find the perfect pair of shoes for you.

Thank you for choosing AQUISHA FOOTWEARS!

Name: Mishmi Takin International
Description:
Mishmi Takin is a technical footwear and outerwear company designing high performance hiking boots and jackets, optimized for high breathability in wet & humid environments. Since the products breathe better in extremely challenging, tropical environments, they are able to outperform in more temperate and dry environments as well. 

In a world of 'ever declining quality of big brands', Mishmi Takin adopts a 'no compromise' approach. With a 'no gimmicks', 'only what is necessary', minimalist approach, Mishmi Takin products do what they say they will do. They are well designed products that last a long time and deliver exceptional value. 
  
Last but not the least, our products are so stylish that they turn heads wherever you go, be it on the mountain, in city or at office party. 

Mishmi Takin products are ideal for adventure travel, hiking, mountaineering and urban exploration.

The company grew out of Founder, and MIT graduate, Kapil Dev Singh’s experiences working and hiking in his native India and Liberia, West Africa. While delivering medicines to remote villages in West Africa and Eastern Himalayas, he realized he couldn’t find boots or outerwear that worked properly in high humidity conditions. After multiple soggy and slippery experiences, he saw an opportunity to create ultra-breathable performance hiking boots designed to outperform in wet & humid conditions - both hot & cold. 

Mishmi Takin also seeks to highlight the passion for life and resilience that is often found amidst adversity in the poor parts of the world and promote health and well-being in remote communities worldwide.

Name: Tripal Group
Description:
Protecting every step with reliable, made-to-order footwear.

Description: Baco Industries is a leading manufacturer of high quality footwear components. We deliver precise inputs to India's largest footwear production houses. With more than six decades of manufacturing expertise and over twenty-five years specializing in footwear, we are renowned in the industry for our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

Name: ThanQ Group
Description:
In the vibrant city of Kozhikode, situated in the state of Kerala, our footwear manufacturing company is making waves with its dedication to quality and style. Panama Shoes, operating under the brand name Thanq Footwear, has become a beacon of innovation in the footwear industry. Our primary focus is on producing Polyurethane (PU) footwear, a material renowned for its durability and flexibility, ensuring that every step taken in a pair of Thanq footwear is a comfortable one.

The foundation of our quality begins with the careful selection of materials. For our PU, we turn to BASF, a leading name in the chemical industry. BASF is the go-to choice for top PU footwear brands across India, a testament to its reputation for excellence. This partnership ensures that each pair of shoes we craft meets the high standards expected by our customers, reflecting our commitment to providing not just footwear, but an experience that blends comfort with style seamlessly.

Our dedication to quality extends to the upper part of our shoes, made from high-quality rexin for a luxurious feel similar to real leather. This careful material selection reflects our commitment to creating the pair that not only look good but also last.

At Panama Shoes, we understand that design is more than just aesthetics; it's an art form. Our team of designers invests time and effort into creating designs that are not only on-trend but set new standards in the market. We are proud to provide footwear that embraces a wide range of tastes, featuring designs inspired by traditional motifs that reflect cultural richness and contemporary patterns tailored to appeal to the modern consumer. Each design is a sincere labor of love, underscoring our commitment to setting the standard in the market.

One of our key principles is providing the best at a feasible price for our customers.

Name: Zeal Footwear
Description: Leather has a number of very special, natural properties: It is breathable, heat-insulating, stretchy, tearproof and abrasion-resistant and acts a barrier against moisture evaporation. It is also robust, making the shoe more stable and functional. From a stylistic point of view, it gives the shoe its very unique look.

Name: Aerothotic Footwear USA
Description:
Designed in USA and made in Thailand. At Aerothotic, we are dedicated to bringing profound innovation and maximum comfort to your feet. 

Our team has one vision since day one:  to provide women around the world access to our durable, highest quality footwear without giving up style, comfort, and support. We believe if your foot feels good then your mind and spirit feel good.

Name: Hospital Regional De La Orinoquia ESE
New Orchard_vegan footwear

Name: NEUNOI Sneaker
Description:
A circular product for a linear problem.

We design sneakers that don’t get thrown away. NEUNOI is a new kind of kids' footwear: fully repairable, returnable, and made to last. We’re building an open system for circular design – starting with children, but meant for everyone.

We are in the funding phase and ready to launch our paid pilot in real-life market conditions.
Locally rooted. Fully committed. Bold enough to rethink everything – from design to ownership.

We’re open to collaborations, testers, repair partners and support of any kind. Let’s change the system together.

Name: MyBarks
Description:
At MyBarks we are a footwear company with roots in the Mediterranean Sea. We manufacture handcrafted sneakers and espadrilles with a clear mission: to bring the essence of the Mediterranean to the farthest corners of the world.

We are a company born in Spain, more specifically in Valencia, on the shores of the Mediterranean Sea. Moreover, we were born in 2020, an exceptional and challenging year for the whole world. The COVID-19 pandemic brought drastic changes in everyday life. In addition, movement restrictions made us feel far away from our roots even being close. With this feeling of uncertainty and isolation, MyBarks was born under the idea of bringing us closer to the Mediterranean even while being far away and, most importantly, transmitting happiness.

Description:

Name: Dalnico

Name: DANTEMXOFICIAL
Description:
Bienvenido a Dante, donde la elegancia mexicana crea historia desde 1996
Desde el corazón de León, Guanajuato, México, nace Dante. Una casa de calzado que fusiona la tradición artesanal con la audacia contemporánea. En nuestro taller, cada par es más que un simple calzado; es una pieza de arte meticulosamente creada por manos mexicanas apasionadas.

En Dante, nuestro equipo de expertos artesanos dan vida a cada zapato con un compromiso innato con la calidad. Cada puntada, cada elección de material, es una expresión de la rica historia y tradiciones que representamos. En Dante nuestros zapatos llevan consigo la esencia de México, en cada pieza de cuero de la más alta calidad.

En el Taller Dante, cada par cuenta su propia historia, forjada con destreza y amor. Somos una fusión entre lo clásico y lo contemporáneo, desafiando paradigmas con estilos audaces que cautivan el mundo. Más que una marca de calzado, somos una narrativa viva de la elegancia mexicana, trascendiendo tendencias con nuestra misión de crear arte que se lleva puesto.

Explora entre nuestras colecciones, donde cada modelo es un tributo al arte hecho a mano, un testimonio de nuestra dedicación a la excelencia. En Dante representamos una experiencia que celebra la maestría artesanal y la autenticidad de la moda mexicana. Únete a nosotros mientras rompemos esquemas, paso a paso, en cada par que creamos con el corazón!

Name: Lavoro Europe
Description:
We are proud to be a benchmark for the quality of our products and services. Protecting what is important.
Making people feel special. Helping the world of work to become more secure.

Name: MARCO TOZZI Shoes GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
WITH LOVE: Our actions are characterised by attention to detail. This is reflected in all areas: from product development and sales to the marketing of shoes and bags.

FOR YOU: With this love, we always want to inspire our end consumers and immerse them in our brand world.

Name: Byara Calçados
Description: Byara manufactures and retails footwear. The company is based in Brazil and sells its products online and through other retailers. Byara has more than 20 years of experience in the marketplace, designing and delivering the highest quality footwear, matching the product's integrity to the company's business practices and employment environment.

Name: Riomar
Description:
Riomar  prides itself on making the highest quality boat shoes in the world. Founded in 2012 by Lange Sykes, a lifetime waterman, conservationist and the company's founder and Creative Director, Riomar set out to make a highly functional, comfortable and fashion forward boat/deck shoe for men and woman. 

Riomar's patented "Bearing" design allows its wearer to customize and interchange one of the shoes design elements to fit the wearers immediate style for any social setting. Weather sailing, fishing or cruising, one can easily segue from the water to any social event and project confidence in their style while enjoying a superior comfort, fit. 

Riomar's patented Bearings are easily interchanged in seconds to invoke one's monogram, collegiate spirit, yacht club burgee, company logo, or any number of limitless designs. 

Riomar is about the ability to "Change Your Bearings, Not Your Sole," and live the coastal lifestyle in a shoe that is not only aesthetically pleasing but comfortable, functional, waterproof, antimicrobial and non-skid/non-marking. Riomar understands we cannot continue to enjoy this lifestyle without preserving our marine resources for future generations. It is that understanding that led its founder to start Riomar to bring awareness to these important issues and support "boots on the water" initiatives which affect positive change for the future.

Name: Duque Di Galliano
Description:
Especialistas en fabricación de calzado Goodyear Welt para dama y caballero y en entintado a mano.
Orgullosamente Mexicanos.
Location: León Guanajuato, León De Los Aldama

Name: Nano Shoes
Description: Fundada em 1 de Junho de 1987, na Travessa Francisco Reis, em Cesar, freguesia de Oliveira de Azeméis, no norte de Portugal, pela mão do sócio Albino Vaz. Ao longo dos anos, vem-se dedicando ao fabrico de calçado de senhora. Com uma gestão eficaz, apostando na inovação, novas tecnologias e a utilização de novos materiais, a A.Hernani cria calçado de conforto e beleza para vários mercados e está preparada para crescer.

Name: T.M Overseas
Description:
About T.M Overseas  
Welcome to the forefront of footwear innovation T.M Overseas , a premier shoe components manufacturer headquartered in the historic city of Agra, India. In the heart of this culturally rich landscape, we are crafting the future of footwear with a commitment to quality, diversity, and global excellence.
 Crafting Excellence Worldwide 
As a leading force in the industry, T.M Overseas prides itself on manufacturing and trading a diverse range of shoe components that set the standard for quality and craftsmanship. Our extensive portfolio includes Welts, Vineers, Soles, Eva Insoles, Foam Insoles, PU Insoles, Gel Insoles, Insole Boards, Toe Puff & Counters, Jute, Rafia, Italian Leather Bends, and more.
 Global Footprint, Local Craftsmanship 
While based in Agra, our influence spans the globe. We are the preferred choice for renowned footwear brands from all corners of the world. The fusion of our local craftsmanship with global perspectives ensures that T.M Overseas is not just a manufacturer but a creator of experiences that resonate on a global scale.

Name: Bioma Footwear Solutions
Description:
Bioma Footwear Solutions: Reimagining Footwear Production


In today's globalized economy, the vast majority of footwear production is concentrated far away from their consumption markets. At Bioma Footwear Solutions, we believe it is time to rethink this model. The excessive globalization of the footwear industry has exposed vulnerabilities and risks, making it essential to re-industrialize and re-shore production. Our mission is to provide innovative solutions tailored to your footwear needs.

In a VUCA (Volatile, Uncertain, Complex, and Ambiguous) world, factors such as pandemics, geopolitical conflicts, and fluctuating market demands create significant challenges and risks for footwear production. These uncertainties underscore the urgent need for de-risking supply chains and securing production capabilities closer to home. This is where Bioma Footwear Solutions comes in.

Portugal and Spain, with their rich heritage in craftsmanship and advanced manufacturing capabilities, offer an ideal environment for producing high-quality footwear, providing the perfect biome for footwear production, combining tradition with innovation and sustainability practices.

Join us in pioneering a new era of footwear production focused on excellence, resilience, and a sustainable future.

Name: CALZATURIFICIO FRABAR SNC
Description:
Frabar nasce nel solco della grande storia dell’industria calzaturiera italiana e dal 1983 mescola la cura artigianale dei dettagli, l’eleganza dell’alta moda e la comodità del quotidiano, per dar vita a scarpe uniche.

Fondatore della società fu Francesco Bagnolo, capace di lanciare un’attività riconoscibile per professionalità e qualità, ereditata e sviluppata in seguito dai Fratelli Bagnolo, oggi designer e produttori delle calzature per i brand: Desire, Beatrice B, VA9 e Les Fleurs de Paris.

La matrice del successo dei Fratelli Bagnolo ha radici ancor più profonde di quelle di Frabar e risale agli anni ’40 del Novecento. Fu allora che il capofamiglia Giovanni, animato da grande passione per il mondo delle calzature e dotato di lungimiranza imprenditoriale, cominciò a produrre zoccoli, sandali e ciabatte, con la moglie Santina.

Da quella coesione famigliare nacque il Calzaturificio Bocciolo di Giovanni Bagnolo, antesignano di Frabar e delle moderne scarpe italiane, riconosciute per eleganza e comodità.

L’attività produttiva, rivoluzionata all’inizio degli anni ’80, non ha perso quello slancio originario, tenendosi al passo con i tempi e sperimentando materiali e tecniche innovative.

Il nostro calzaturificio si occupa di tutte le fasi della produzione delle calzature: taglio, cucitura e montaggio.

Partiamo dalla progettazione e curiamo tutte le fasi di lavorazione fino ad arrivare al confezionamento. Dedichiamo particolare attenzione al processo di montaggio, eseguito presso il nostro stabilimento, durante il quale non perdiamo mai di vista la qualità, monitorata passo passo.
Offriamo al cliente un produzione interamente creata in Italia, dalla progettazione al taglio, dall’orlatura all’assemblaggio e supporto in tutte le fasi.

Abbiamo una tiratura giornaliera, a seconda della tipologia di scarpa che va dalle 300 alle 500 paia al giorno, realizzate da operatori specializzati nella produzione di in calzature in pelle e tessuto.

Name: ITACA HOLDING CA
Description:
ITACA HOLDING C.A. se especializa en la fabricación y comercialización de botas de PVC y de seguridad, ofreciendo soluciones robustas para la protección personal en diversos entornos laborales. Nuestra trayectoria se caracteriza por un compromiso inquebrantable con la calidad, la innovación y la seguridad de quienes confían en nuestros productos.

Entendemos que la protección de los trabajadores es primordial. Por eso, en ITACA HOLDING, cada par de botas está diseñado y producido bajo estrictos estándares de calidad, utilizando materiales de alta resistencia y tecnologías avanzadas. Esto nos permite asegurar que nuestras botas no solo cumplen con las normativas de seguridad más exigentes, sino que también proporcionan la comodidad y durabilidad necesarias para jornadas laborales extensas.

Nuestra gama de botas de seguridad está pensada para proteger contra impactos, perforaciones, deslizamientos y otros riesgos comunes en la industria, la construcción y el sector agrícola. Por otro lado, nuestras botas de PVC de caña larga son la elección ideal para ambientes húmedos, químicos o donde se requiere una barrera impermeable y resistente.

En ITACA HOLDING C.A. no solo vendemos calzado; ofrecemos la tranquilidad y confianza que surge de saber que los pies están bien protegidos. Somos su aliado estratégico en seguridad laboral, comprometidos con el bienestar de las personas y la productividad de las empresas.

Founded in 1947, Pezzol Industries Srl is an Italian family-owned company specialized in safety shoes production.

The knowledge of our artisans refines a product resulted by the most advanced technologies, while the intelligence of their hands inspires sensitivity and emotion to the industrial processes. To this high level of know-how we add an accurate research of materials and innovative solutions aiming ideally at excellence and involving all the company departments. 

Our soles are obtained by injecting a polyurethane compound directly to the upper. This manufacturing process allow us to produce safety shoes extremely flexible and light. 
To maintain our quality we focus on controlling the whole production process is managed according to the International Quality Management System.

Today the key formula of Pezzol identity is the full realization of the "Made in Italy" concept, which blends Tradition and Innovation in an indefectible way.

For our safety shoes we choose the best technological components:

GORE-TEX
VIBRAM
BOA

Our certifications:

SA 8000: 2014
ISO 9001: 2015
ISO 14001: 2015

Name: Ruiz Bernal - Alpargatas & Espadrilles
Description: Nuestros orígenes se remontan al 1924 cuando Manuel Ruiz García comenzó su andadura en el mundo del calzado con la fabricación de la típica alpargata con suela de cáñamo. En aquella época nuestra familia también cultivaba y producía el cáñamo, la fabricación la realizaban en la conocida Calle Condes de Caravaca.

Name: Granulon
Description: At Granulon, we specialize in making footwear from recycled polymers, contributing to a circular economy and reducing environmental impact.

Name: VALMOR S.R.L.
Description:
Valmor è un’azienda italiana specializzata nella produzione di sneakers di alta manifattura per Grandi Case di Moda. 

Dal 2021 è parte del Gruppo HModa e si inserisce nella Footwear Business Unit.

Valmor nasce negli anni ’60 dall’idea imprenditoriale di Tersilio Torresi e si afferma nella produzione e commercializzazione di calzature; nel 1994, la gestione aziendale passa a Mauro Finocchi e Fiorella Torresi e, dal 1998, l’azienda avvia una significante riconversione produttiva e inizia a lavorare per grandi brand del mondo del lusso, affermando le sue potenzialità produttive nell’ambito dell’alta manifattura calzaturiera.

In Valmor, l’attenzione per le persone e la sostenibilità sono valori centrali. L’azienda si impegna a seguire un’etica sostenibile, intraprendendo iniziative che riducono l’impatto ambientale e favorendo lo sviluppo del capitale umano e delle tecnologie all’interno della propria realtà.

Name: KTM Footwear
Description: "Welcome to KTM Footwear, where quality and craftsmanship meet innovation and style! Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with cutting-edge machinery and staffed by skilled professionals passionate about delivering the best footwear design and production. From sneakers to sandals, boots to brogues, we offer a wide range of styles and sizes to meet the needs of every customer. Whether you're looking for custom-made shoes or wholesale orders, we've got you covered. Contact us today to learn more about our services, and let us help you step up your shoe game!

Name: SHUFAB
Description:
Shufab's genesis stems from the convergence of seasoned professionals hailing from two distinct yet complementary sectors: the "shoe" industry and the "fabric" industry. It was this fortuitous collaboration that birthed the company, with its name derived from a fusion of these two domains - "Shu-Fab". The amalgamation of expertise from individuals deeply entrenched in both fields laid the foundation for Shufab's unique approach to footwear manufacturing.

Shufab, a footwear manufacturer catering to prestigious MNC brands, has rapidly solidified its position since its establishment in 2019. What sets Shufab apart is its vertical integration approach, which involves handling the production of critical components like fabrics, soles, and other footwear components internally. This method not only ensures rigorous quality control but also allows for greater flexibility and customization to meet the diverse demands of clients. As Shufab ventures into expansion, it maintains an unwavering commitment to delivering top-quality products. Automation is integral to this commitment, as Shufab harnesses advanced technology to enhance efficiency and accuracy across its operations. Renowned for its reliability and customer-focused ethos, Shufab continues to thrive as a premier player in the footwear manufacturing sector in India.

Name: Kkavis
Description:
Kavis Fashions is rebranding itself to Kkavis in furtherance of its vision of being one of the foremost shoe brands in the country. This change comes in the wake of the evolution of the brand over a number of years, and its imminent expansion spearheaded by Director and Chief Mentor of the brand, Vikas Mahtani.

After firmly establishing itself in the market, Kavis Fashions is reinventing itself to show its commitment to have a strong and lasting presence in this industry. It is doing so by forging a new identity for itself. The rebranding of its name to “Kkavis” by dropping the rest of its title, is a visionary move. 

The name Kkavis itself carries great weight and has tremendous significance. It is a name that expresses both the brand’s purpose and its corporate vision. The name contains the kernel of the original brand, which is the word Kavis, and further strongly stresses on the word ‘Avis’, which since times immemorial has been the word to denote advice and opinion in the English language. Hence, it is an apt representation of what the Kkavis brand aims to be – one that is opinionated and full of purpose.

The concept of Kkavis is a broad one. Therefore, the intention behind this change was not just to create a new name, but to present to the world a new and extended platform that offers infinite sustainable possibilities. Kkavis will focus on its B2B and B2C operations, thus servicing all its customer’s requirements and B2C consumers who desire fashion and comfort as well as those B2B consumers who are looking for ease of doing business through committed partnerships.

Kkavis will continue to strive to reduce time to market through our Product Development Centre in Mumbai and Our Product Development Teams Located in South of France and New York, yet Kavis has no intent of copying the Lighting Fast Go to Market model of Fast Fashion and instead intends to Shorten the Time to Shelves in a more sustainable and well though our plan.

Name: Meramec Group
Description:
For over 60 years, Meramec Group has been at the forefront of innovation, delivering advanced products and custom polyurethane systems for the footwear industry – and beyond. 
 
Our reputation has been built on what we call "The Meramec Way". 
 
1.  Innovation.  We are committed to pushing boundaries, generating innovative ideas, and working closely with customers to meet their unique needs.

2.  Experience. With decades of expertise in footwear and polyurethane technology, we provide unparalleled knowledge and insight for every project.

3.  Quality.  Our rigorous testing and quality control processes ensure that our products are delivered on time and free from defects.

4.  Support.  Our in-house Account Executives are here to guide you through every phase of your products lifecycle.   

Meramec is your go-to source for all your footwear component needs.  With manufacturing facilities in the United States and Asia, we specialize in:

- Polyurethane (PU) insoles, midsoles and outsoles.

- One Piece woven uppers (Perspair)
- Polyurethane systems

Beyond Footwear…

Our USA operation boasts a cutting-edge material blending facility capable of producing custom polyurethane systems for a diverse range of industries.

As a family-owned business, Meramec Group is dedicated to being your trusted partner in innovation, with the backing of our global presence and a committed team.

Name: Calbrás Calçados Profissionais
Description:
Calbrás, o calçado feito para a sua jornada.

Presente no mercado desde 2010, a Calbrás é uma empresa especializada na produção e comercialização de Calçados de Segurança e Calçados Ocupacionais.
A Calbrás está localizada na cidade de Campo Bom - RS, região conhecida como pólo calçadista nacional, que possui a mão de obra mais especializada do Brasil e abundância de matérias-primas de ponta no quesito calçados. A sede Calbrás fica em um amplo parque industrial com estrutura altamente tecnológica, para proporcionar produtos inovadores e com alto desempenho. 

QUALIDADE CALBRÁS
Atendendo aos mais rigorosos padrões de qualidade, os produtos Calbrás são fabricados utilizando processo tecnológico inovador no Brasil, o que assegura ainda mais conforto e segurança aos seus calçados.
Todos os calçados Calbrás utilizam exclusivamente Couro Legítimo de alta qualidade, o que proporciona hidrofugação em seus calçados, transpirabilidade e maior resistência ao desgaste. 

A Calbrás possui a biqueira com o formato mais adequado ao pé do trabalhador, a qual não machuca os dedos, por ter o formato anatômico. Além disso, a Calbrás possui a única biqueira de aço perfurada do Brasil: mais leve, com maior transpiração e com resistência igual a uma biqueira tradicional.

Buscando constantemente as melhores tecnologias disponíveis do mercado, a Calbrás submete seus produtos à testes de performance, visando sempre oferecer as melhores soluções para seus usuários.

PRODUTOS
Os produtos Calbrás visam o bem-estar e amenizar as tensões do dia a dia dos trabalhadores, e estão alinhados em um mesmo conceito: PROTEÇÃO E CONFORTO.

Calbrás Institucional -  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sMVZAXlTzJw

Name: RE49
Description:
RE49 è il  brand di footwear italiano realizzato con materiali iconici recuperati e riciclati in cui tradizione artigianale ultra-decennale, economia circolare, vera sostenibilità, e tecnologia incontrano il design Made in Italy e il fashion . 

Era il 1949 quando Valentino Masolini fondava la sua azienda di calzature in provincia di Udine iniziando la sua attività riciclando materiali raccolti nelle caserme abbandonate dalla seconda guerra mondiale. Nel 2020, Nicola Masolini,quarta generazione, decide di ritornare alle origini dando vita ad un brand tutto in economia circolare, RE49. RE come recycle and return to 49.

Ogni calzatura RE49 racconta una storia dei materiali di cui è realizzata interamente a mano e registrata in blockchain con NFT della stessa. 

Proveniamo dal Passato, Miglioriamo il Presente, e guardiamo al Futuro. Everything we do today is for the children of tomorrow.

-———

RE49 is the Italian footwear brand made with iconic recovered and recycled materials where decades of artisanal tradition, the circular economy, true sustainability, and technology meet Made in Italy design and fashion.

 It was 1949 when Valentino Masolini founded his footwear company in the province of Udine, starting his business by recycling materials collected in the barracks abandoned after the Second World War.  In 2020, Nicola Masolini ,fourth generation, decides to go back to his origins by giving life to a brand entirely in circular economy, RE49.  RE come recycle and return to 49.

 Each RE49 shoe tells a story of the ‘reborn’ materials, completely handmade and registered in the blockchain with NFT of the same.

 We come from the past, we improve the present, and we look to the future. Everything we do today is for the children of tomorrow.

Name: BELSTA
Description:

- Distributors and retail chains

Let’s build long-term partnerships — grounded in quality and made in Ukraine.

Name: Apache Footwear Group 萬邦鞋業集團
Description:
Apache Footwear was found in Guangdong, China, in 1991. We have served as an official  partner and supply shoes for adidas exclusively for 30 years. We are one of the leading companies in this field. Currently, Apache group has three production bases dedicated to produce adidas footwear products in three countries, respectively located in Guangdong (China), Andhra Pradesh (India), and Tien Giang (Vietnam). Name: ROPAR, s.a.
Description:
ROPAR, S.A. is a company specialized in comfort footwear, combining technology, functionality, and performance. Our story began in 1966 with the birth of A’RCOPEDICO. Today, we manage three footwear brands – A’RCOPEDICO, ARCO, and Ortomedical. We produce footwear for active individuals and anyone who values a comfortable lifestyle without compromising functionality.

A’RCOPEDICO is a worldwide recognized brand known for its universal language of comfort. Offering footwear for both women and men, the brand features exclusive technologies such as the Twin Arch Support System – for proper foot arch support, the Techno Elastic Upper – for a perfect fit, and the Antiviral Sole – providing antiviral properties.

ARCO, our newest brand, introduces a fresh approach to comfort in sneakers. With cutting-edge innovation, superior comfort, and exclusive features, it aims to redefine the orthopedic sneaker market. Launch: 2026

Ortomedical is specifically designed for sensitive feet affected by structural conditions. It is especially recommended for diabetic foot care. Ortomedical footwear meets the standards set by APDP – Associação Protectora dos Diabéticos de Portugal for healthy shoes.

As true footwear enthusiasts, we are passionate about discovering new solutions and are committed to bringing our comfort footwear to every corner of the world.

#comfortfootwear #footwearinnovation #MadeinPortugal #sustainablefootwear

Name: LAST STUDIO
Description:
LAST STUDIO is a Scandinavian–Portuguese footwear and accessories partner specializing in women’s and men’s leather shoes, as well as leather belts. We support international brands with end-to-end services including design, development, production, quality control, and material sourcing.

Combining Scandinavian minimal design with the craftsmanship of certified Portuguese factories, LAST STUDIO works with high-quality Italian leathers and a strong network of specialized production partners across Portugal.

Our team manages the full product cycle — from concept and prototyping to manufacturing, pricing, logistics coordination, and final delivery. We work daily with our factories to ensure strong quality, competitive pricing, and fast response to client needs.

Our services include:

• Design and trend development
• Technical development and pattern support
• Sourcing of materials and components
• In-line and end-of-line quality control
• Production planning and vendor management
• Sustainability guidance and audit preparation
• Cross-category support in both footwear and belts

With deep industry knowledge and long-term factory partnerships, LAST STUDIO offers brands a reliable, agile, and transparent production base in Portugal.

Name: Redeplast
Description:
Situada em Novo Hamburgo/RS, a Redeplast é uma indústria familiar com duas décadas de expertise no desenvolvimento e fabricação de produtos injetados, destacando-se no mercado nacional e internacional por sua qualidade, inovação e compromisso com a sustentabilidade.
Atendemos grandes marcas nacionais, como Colcci, Mormaii, Lilica Ripilica & Tigor, Arezzo, Santa Lolla, Lança Perfume, entre outras. Além disso, exportamos produtos para importantes marcas internacionais na Europa, América do Sul, Central e do Norte, consolidando assim, nossa presença no mercado global.
A Redeplast conta com cerca de 400 colaboradores altamente capacitados e uma produção diária de aproximadamente 10 mil unidades entre calçados, bolsas e acessórios.
Seu portfólio é composto por uma ampla linha de produtos, desenvolvidos a partir de PVC – um material vegano, termo moldável, de alta tecnologia e 100% reciclável. Essa escolha reforça o compromisso da empresa com práticas ecologicamente corretas e soluções responsáveis para o mercado da moda, unindo estética, conforto e sustentabilidade.
Hoje, com 20 anos de trajetória, a Redeplast é referência em seu segmento e segue crescendo com base em inovação, respeito ao meio ambiente e parcerias sólidas com as maiores marcas da moda.

With over 50 retail outlets in the country, the brand emulates elegance, versatility and up-to-date trends while servicing every individual of the household. Starlet constantly strives to evolve in world-class comfort, offering customers most advanced technologies in foot wear industry today. Everyday is a new day and a new process at Starlet, as we believe to progress with the advancements in this Technological era.

Name: PC Footwear
Lancer Footwear (Footwear Klick India Pvt. Ltd.)
Description:
We’ve been making feet happy since 1989. Thanks to Mr. Subhash Chander Gupta’s passion and expertise, we’ve grown from a small start-up to a $100 million footwear giant.

At Lancer, we’ve got our own testing lab to make sure our products are top-notch and meet all the global standards. We’re proud of our ISO 9001:2015, EN 20345:2011, IS 15298 Part 2:2016, and SA 8000:2014 certifications, among others. Our secret sauce? Awesome footwear design, unbeatable quality, and fantastic customer service. We’re always pushing ourselves to wow our customers with great value and even greater products!


With 7 super-modern factories in Delhi and Haryana, we whip up everything from sporty sneakers to cozy slippers and rugged safety shoes. Our secret? A mix of smart R&D, cutting-edge tech, and a team that’s as dedicated as they come.

We’re not just about putting shoes on feet; we’re about putting smiles on faces. Whether you’re in India or beyond, Lancer Footwear is here to keep you comfy and stylish!

Name: LG Shoes
Description:
At LG Shoes, we specialize in being a premier footwear manufacturer catering to renowned shoe brands. With our extensive experience and expertise, we are the trusted partner of choice for brands seeking exceptional quality and craftsmanship.

We work closely with famous shoe brands, acting as their reliable manufacturing partner to bring their unique designs to life. Our dedication to construction quality, reasonable pricing, and strict quality control sets us apart from competitors in the industry.

Additionally, we understand the dynamics of the market and the roles of agents, distributors, and brand representatives. For brands that prefer working through intermediaries, we collaborate seamlessly with agents and distributors to ensure a streamlined and efficient production process.

At LG Shoes, we take care of every aspect of the production process, including material sourcing, logistics, and quality assurance. Brands can trust us to handle the intricate details, allowing them to focus on other essential aspects of their business.

With a dedicated customer support team and account managers, we provide personalized attention and support to our B2B customers. Our aim is to ensure a seamless and successful partnership, built on trust and open communication.

As a specialized footwear manufacturer, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional products and services that exceed the expectations of renowned shoe brands and provide reliable support to agents and distributors.

Name: FORLI SAFETY FOOTWEAR
Description:
Forli nació de la necesidad de dar una respuesta al mercado del calzado de seguridad, el cual está demandando calzado más ligero, flexible.

 

Pretendemos cambiar el concepto que se tiene del calzado de protección. Con esta meta en mente el equipo de Forli se creo a través de gente con amplios conocimientos de producción de calzado, biomecánica, diseño de producto así como de un equipo que trata de aprovechar al máximo las nuevos materiales y tecnologías para darle los mayores beneficios al usuario de nuestro calzado. Esto junto con la mezcla de savia nueva y la experiencia y profesionalidad son ingredientes de la receta que esperamos nos haga alcanzar nuestro objetivo.

 

Conseguir ofrecer zapatos cómodos y ligeros a la vez que atractivos e innovadores es nuestro objetivo para todos nuestros productos.

 

Nuestra amplia gama de calzado cubre prácticamente todas las necesidades posibles de los trabajadores, analizando sus movimientos, posturas y en definitiva sus puestos de trabajo son desarrolladas diferentes tecnologías registradas como la membrana *Forlitex, ajuste *In-Fit, suelas *Cloudconfort, o plantillas *PFM Insole tech.

Name: Epiko - Footwear Solutions
Description:
Originally part of ECCO going back to the early days in Denmark in the middle of the 20th century, through evolution into the 21st century and a joint venture with Fagus, EPIKO is now a company in its own right. 

Born out of providing lasts and moulds, to the most demanding of customers worldwide, EPIKO has extensive knowledge and expertise in designing, developing, and making tooling for the footwear industry.

Able to call upon a considerable depth and breadth of experience from teams based in Portugal and Thailand, we have specialisms in direct injection PU and TPU moulds along with last of all types. Besides that, EPIKO can offer 3d printed moulds for prototypes, samples, and limited edition production runs.

Still part of the wider ECCO group but small enough to be quick and agile, we understand the changing demands of the footwear industry and are ready to meet your requirements. Because although the name is new, the knowledge and experience have been built and honed over many years.

Name: JOIA - Calçado, S.A.
Description:
With over half a century of history, JOIA - Calçado, S.A. is a Portuguese company dedicated to producing footwear. Founded on February 14, 1973, and currently in its third generation, we are known for our expertise and commitment to quality in footwear production.

Our specialty lies in developing private-label footwear, where we create collections that seamlessly blend design, comfort, and innovation to meet the demands of the global market. We are skilled in various construction techniques, including Strobel, moccasin, assembled, Blake stitch, and semi-shearling. We carefully select high-quality materials to ensure impeccable finishes and work exclusively with certified partners to guarantee sustainable and socially responsible production processes.

With 90% of our production destined for international markets, our global presence reflects the recognition and trust of our customers.

Name: Calzaturificio Neri
Description:
Un’azienda produttrice di calzature di alta gamma situata nel cuore della Riviera del Brenta, in Veneto. Con oltre settant’anni di esperienza, Calzaturificio Neri è specializzato in calzature formali da donna e sneakers per i più importanti brand di lusso.

Di proprietà e gestione completamente italiana, Neri è da tre generazioni sotto la guida della famiglia Bozzolan. Pierluigi, Giulio, Monica ed Alessandro hanno saputo consolidare il percorso imprenditoriale iniziato dal fondatore Giulio e la moglie Zita nel 1953, mantenendo un prodotto qualitativamente elevato sempre al centro del processo produttivo.

Sviluppata su tre stabilimenti, la produzione 100 % Made in Italy vede ognuna delle sedi specializzata in una tipologia diversa di calzatura.

Grazie all’esperienza maturata, Neri è in grado di offrire un servizio completo che va a coprire tutti gli step del processo, dalla progettazione alla produzione su larga scala. Da sempre attenta ai continui cambiamenti del settore e ai miglioramenti tecnologici, l’azienda è in grado di soddisfare i più elevati standard.

Name: Jolly Scarpe S.p.a.
Description:
JOLLY SCARPE S.P.A. da 40 anni opera nel mondo delle calzature professionali a supporto di coloro che dedicano la loro vita alla salvaguardia ed alla sicurezza dei cittadini.
Ricerca, tecnologie avanzate, materiali innovativi, sicurezza, comfort e servizio sono gli elementi fondamentali che contraddistinguono da sempre Jolly Scarpe e l’hanno resa un’Azienda leader.

Grazie alle molteplici referenze acquisite, oggi Jolly Scarpe spa, con i suoi marchi Jolly e Cosmas, offre la più estesa e completa collezione di calzature professionali in Europa.

Il principale obiettivo dell’azienda è soddisfare i bisogni del cliente: una missione che continuerà a consolidare lo status di leadership nel mercato.

Jolly Scarpe rappresenta un perfetto connubio tra il totale rispetto degli standard di sicurezza e l’utilizzo di tecnologie di ultima generazione grazie soprattutto alle forti partnership con Aziende che forniscono materiali ad alto contenuto tecnologico.

Le calzature Jolly vestono i piedi degli operatori dei principali Comandi di Polizia Locale, del Ministero dell’Interno – Corpo Nazionale dei Vigili del Fuoco e Polizia di Stato, innumerevoli Enti del Soccorso e multiutilities. Jolly è leader anche in Europa per numerose forniture a Dipartimenti di Vigili del Fuoco, Polizia ed Esercito.

Name: Footwear Innovation Lab GmbH
Description: Footwear Innovation Lab is a full service development center for footwear of any kind, specialized on direct molded footwear. In our premisis we are able to realize even most complex projects completely internally. We develop last, upper & outsole designs in 2 D & 3D; 3d constructions for mold making; rapid prototyping; sample making for prototypes and sales man samples, mold audits and production of Limited Edition, also in smaller quantities. In cooperation with our industry Partners, we are setting up a fully industry 4.0 orientated micro factory, offering the highest possible level of Automation. Visit us in Simac Hall 14 Stand K41 to experience how 3D Development and Virtual Reality can help you to speed up your developments

Name: Lia Line Calçados
Description:
O Grupo Lia Line é uma empresa brasileira de calçados femininos com mais de 30 anos de atuação no mercado. Presente em todo o Brasil, o grupo construiu sua história com foco em qualidade, conforto e atenção às tendências de moda.

Atualmente, as marcas Lia Line, Sua Cia, Offline, Mini Sua Cia e Softli fazem parte do grupo, cada uma com identidade própria e voltada para diferentes perfis de consumidoras.

A produção é realizada em 11 unidades industriais, que juntas empregam cerca de 3.000 colaboradores diretos, com uma média de 600.000 pares produzidos por mês.

Para o atendimento a lojistas e parceiros comerciais, o Grupo Lia Line conta com três showrooms, localizados em Nova Trento (SC), São Paulo (SP) e Fortaleza (CE), além de representantes comerciais em todas as regiões do Brasil.

Para o consumidor final, a marca Lia Line possui duas lojas físicas próprias, uma em Itapema (SC) e outra no Outlet Porto Belo (SC). Além disso, todas as marcas do grupo contam com sites próprios e estão presentes em lojas multimarcas em todo o Brasil, garantindo amplo acesso aos produtos em todas as regiões do país.

Com atuação no mercado internacional, o Grupo Lia Line está presente em mais de 20 países, levando a qualidade do calçado brasileiro para diferentes partes do mundo.

Crafted by hand in Israel through the combined efforts of people from different cultures and backgrounds, Naot shoes are ethically made using sustainable methods with materials of the highest quality. Fine Italian leathers, our signature insoles, and advanced designs make for an unparalleled combination of quality, fashion, and comfort.
 
Naot has been in business for over 80 years and operates globally in the US, Canada, Australia, Japan, and other countries.

Name: Kamet
Description:
HISTORIA
La empresa fue fundada por Vladimiro Kmet en 1950. Sus inicios fueron fabricando calzado a medida, tiempo después incluyo botas y borceguíes para las Fuerzas Armadas. En esos tiempos crea la marca KAMET e incorpora el calzado de seguridad en las empresas industriales. 
Pasaron las suelas de PVC con las primeras primeras inyectoras, la vulcanización del caucho, el poliuretano monodensidad con la primer maquina en nuestro país, el poliurentano bidensidad y bicolor para llegar al Siglo XXI, donde en su primera decada fuimos los primeros y aun los únicos en emplear el poliuretano traslucido para las suelas de nuestra linea de calzados TOP del país.

PRESENTE
Hoy mas firmes que nunca, somos lideres tecnológicos del sector, trazamos horizontes, renovamos la imagen, ampliamos la capacidad productiva, nos comprometemos con la mejora continua, la satisfacción del cliente y el cuidado del medio ambiente, a través del cumplimiento de las normativas nacionales vigentes.
Nuestras lineas de productos, la tradicional WORK LINE, la intermedia NUEVA GENERACION y la de punta del mercado nacional NEW CONCEPT proveen a todas las industrias y la mayoria de los puestos de trabajo de nuestro pais, siempre con la mejor ecuacion costo-performance del mercado.

FUTURO
Un paso adelante. Lanzamos en 202 la nueva linea INDOOR para múltiples propósitos laborales y con la construcción de la nueva planta, incorporamos nueva tecnología y capacidad productiva que nos proyecta a los próximos 50 años.

Chaque paire de chaussons est minutieusement confectionnée avec soin et expertise par notre équipe de professionnels qualifiés. Nous utilisons des matériaux de haute qualité et notre savoir-faire nous permet de garantir un niveau de confort inégalé.

En plus de notre présence en France, nous avons étendu notre distribution à travers le monde, notamment en Suisse, en Suède, aux États-Unis, en Chine, au Japon, et bien d'autres pays. Nous sommes également présents en ligne via notre site web, où vous pouvez découvrir l'ensemble de notre collection et commander vos chaussons préférés.

Rejoignez la communauté Airplum et découvrez le confort exceptionnel de nos chaussons avec leur semelle en mousse. Soyez assuré que chaque paire que vous achetez est le fruit d'un héritage de qualité et d'un engagement envers le savoir-faire français.

Name: Nike Jordan
Description:
Nike is committed to redefining the future of sport through a comprehensive approach to environmental sustainability. Grounded in a deep sense of responsibility for the planet, our commitment extends across the entire lifecycle of our products. Here's how Nike defines environmental sustainability:

Innovative Materials:
At the heart of our sustainability efforts is a dedication to innovative materials that minimize environmental impact. We constantly explore and invest in sustainable alternatives, incorporating recycled materials, organic cotton, and other eco-friendly innovations into our product lines.

Reducing Waste:
Nike is actively working to reduce waste in our manufacturing processes. Through advanced design techniques and responsible sourcing, we aim to minimize the environmental footprint of our products, ensuring that every step of the production cycle aligns with our commitment to sustainability.

Circular Design:
Embracing a circular economy, Nike is reimagining product design to extend the lifespan of our products. By emphasizing durability, repairability, and recyclability, we are actively working to create a closed-loop system that reduces waste and promotes responsible consumption.

Energy Efficiency:
Nike is dedicated to minimizing our carbon footprint by implementing energy-efficient practices in our manufacturing and supply chain. We're investing in renewable energy sources, setting ambitious targets to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, and continuously exploring ways to operate with the environment in mind.

Water Stewardship:
Recognizing the importance of water as a precious resource, Nike is committed to responsible water management. We strive to reduce water usage in our supply chain, implement sustainable water practices, and engage in partnerships that address global water challenges.

Transparency and Accountability:
Nike believes in transparency and being accountable for our environmental impact. We openly communicate our sustainability go

Name: FCTRY LAb
Description:
FCTRY LAb is a venture backed, tech-enabled footwear prototyping lab, democratizing footwear development and innovation for brands, athletes and influencers. It is helping to disrupt the economic monopoly of large sneaker brands while providing domestic speed to market in an environment constrained by overseas supply chain delays.

FCTRY LAb's investors include a diverse group of venture capital firms, top professional athletes and a myriad of pedigreed angel investors. Investors include the Co-Founder of Tinder (via Time Zero Capital), Co-Founder of WeWork, the West Coast Head of Warburg Pincus, and a consortium of NBA & NFL stars via Chicago based Aurelien Capital. Venture capital investment was led by the LA-based, Pay-Pal-backed Slauson & Co, with additional investment from Relay Ventures, Elysian Park Ventures (the private investment arm of the Los Angeles Dodgers ownership group), Level One Fund & Fog City Capital among others.

Name: Tip Toey Joey
Description:
Macios, flexíveis e muito confortáveis, os Tips conquistaram uma geração inteira de pais e filhos com a sua melhor invenção: o sistema Stretch&Stay que abraça (sem apertar!) e não deixa o sapato sair do pezinho

Deu tão certo que muita marca tenta fazer igual, mas só nós podemos dizer que fomos a primeira e a que melhor faz!

Inspirado na filha, o sapatinho original nasceu em 2004 pelas mãos do pai e designer Scott McInerney.

Scott estudou o pezinho da pequena Sofia e criou um sapatinho como nenhum outro

De lá pra cá, o Originals não parou de evoluir e ganhar muitas outras características inteligentes para o desenvolvimento natural do pezinho, sem nunca perder sua funcionalidade e conforto.

A Sofia cresceu, ganhou uma irmã e o papai Scott seguiu inspirado acompanhando a evolução das crianças com a criação de novas famílias de produtos que se adaptam às características de cada fase do desenvolvimento de 0 a 7 anos.

Vem crescer junto!

Name: Crimzon
Description:
Luxury Indian footwear label, Crimzon was conceptualised by designer Sonali Dalwani in 2003 to bring international finesse to shoes with an Indian flair. Filling a gaping void in the indigenous market, creating shoes that were hitherto unavailable in India that propelled Sonali Dalwani to launch her brand.
For over 15 years, every creation from Crimzon strives to tell a story and celebrate individuality. Handcrafted for comfort is the foundation on which every Crimzon shoe is built. Traditional opulence is balanced with a modern sensibility to ensure collections are as versatile as they are wearable.
Ever since its launch, the brand has created a foothold owing to its commitment to uncompromising quality, superior craftsmanship and a sophisticated aesthetic. Crimzon walks the middle ground between current and classic, with a particularly ardent patronage for its signature lightweight wedges that boast the perfect arch support.
Every Crimzon shoe is eco-conscious and is handcrafted using vegan leather. The brand also offers bespoke services as well as a dedicated bridal line. Crimzon has showcased its collections at Lakme Fashion Week in 2009 and 2010, and regularly participates in exhibitions like IMC, Bridal Asia and Design One. Their clientele spans cities like London, New York, Sri Lanka, Hong Kong and Dubai, including celebrities such as Madhuri Dixit-Nene, Priyanka Chopra, Vidya Balan and Alia Bhatt among others.
Crimzon is available at their 3 stores in Mumbai and Delhi as well as online store www.crimzonworld.com. You can also find the brand at multi-designer stores across India like Aza, Carma, Evoluzione and Pernia

Name: IAMBIC
Description: IAMBIC, named a TIME Best Invention, creates AI-tailored, precision-fit footwear with millimeter-level accuracy. Its patent-pending platform combines advanced smartphone 3D scanning, a comprehensive comfort profile, and 20+ biometric measurements to build a personal digital mold for each foot. The system draws on NASA-grade technology and 5 years of government-backed R&D with support from the Center for Biotechnology and U.S. National Science Foundation. Master shoemakers craft from that model using premium materials. The Sole Print system uses tread photos and feedback to calibrate cushioning, structure, and fit for future pairs. IAMBIC brings bespoke into the modern era, where precision fit powers daily performance, presence, and health.

Name: Kaarigar Mandi
Description:
Elevate Your Brand with Kaarigar Mandi - a IIM Ahmedabad and IIM Calcutta supported startup, Streamlining Footwear Sourcing from Design to Delivery!
                                                          
𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐊𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢!

We are a B2B startup revolutionizing the footwear industry by streamlining the sourcing process from design to delivery. Our mission is to facilitate ease of doing business for all the participants in the footwear ecosystem by fully digitizing the footwear supply chain, standardizing small footwear manufacturers and connecting them to bulk buyers. 

At 𝐊𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢 we streamline the process, improving efficiency, reducing costs, and enhancing transparency throughout the supply chain. 

We provide access to a diverse range of footwear designs and materials, all backed by extensive research and development to ensure superior quality products every time. Whether you're a brand owner, distributor, or retailer, our innovative approach provides greater accessibility and opportunities for success.

At 𝐊𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢, we offer comprehensive assistance to small footwear manufacturers and artisans to develop their cottage and micro-enterprises. Our support includes access to raw materials, hand tools, and small machines necessary for footwear-making. We also provide consistent footwear-making orders and offer low-cost credit to manage cash flow. We keep artisans up-to-date with the latest technology by providing training in current footwear trends and techniques and connecting them to the internet.

Read about us on Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/sites/annefield/2024/09/26/modernizing-the-livelihoods-of-female-footwear-artisans-in-india/

Name: Paolo Calzature
Description:
Paolo Calzature est née en août 2023 d'une idée un peu folle : ralentir à une époque où tout va trop vite, et fabriquer des chaussures comme on n'en fabrique plus. 

Ici pas de collections, pas de tendances, pas de boites superflues, nous misons sur la chaussure, sa semelle, ses lacets, ses fils... Chaque paire est faire à la main, avec du cuir soigneusement sélectionnés chez nos concurrents. 

L'inspiration ? Un voyage en Italie où Marcel a été enlevé par la mafia, ils lui ont appris à fabriquer des chaussures et ils l'ont renvoyé en France. Depuis, non seulement il soigne ses chaussures, mais il leur parle pour que chaque paire puisse raconter son histoire. 

En gage de qualité, nous vous offrons la garantie satisfait ou satisfait. Vous disposez de 11 minutes pour retourner vos chaussures si elles ne vous vont pas.

Name: Demetra
Description:
Demetra is the result of a bold vision and a deep commitment to meaningful change in the fashion industry.

There can be no true beauty in a fashion that destroys our planet, and it is for this reason that for years, our goal has been to produce comfortable and eco-sustainable sneakers for a pollution-free style.

We are an idea, a dream of a better world and we constantly strive to combine Italian artisan quality with environmental awareness, because we believe that excellence should never give up in the face of social and environmental responsibility.

Every detail of our footwear tells a story of commitment and dedication, from the careful selection of materials to production. Every step we take is guided by a deep respect for our planet and future generations.

We are aware of our role in shaping a more sustainable world and are committed to doing our part every day. Together we can make a difference for a brighter, greener future!

Name: Flintstone Global
Description:
Flintstone is the world’s first predictive AI-powered tech startup building biometric infrastructure for a specialized, cross-border e-commerce marketplace for footwear and related accessories in fit-first, health-focused, and traceable circular commerce—designed to solve systemic sizing failures, enable preventive care, unlock MSME export access, reduce environmental impact, and deliver rock-bottom prices through infrastructure-led efficiency, with trial-based onboarding to ensure inclusive access and rapid adoption. Flintstone achieves first-mover advantage by embedding predictive AI into sizing, health, and circular logistics—creating the world’s first infrastructure-grade e-commerce marketplace for footwear and related accessories.
At the nucleus of Flintstone’s infrastructure is biometric 3D foot scanning and "AI-Powered Intelligent Fit Engine"—powering predictive sizing, preventive health logic, and circular lifecycle modeling.
By digitizing MSMEs and eliminating retail markups, Flintstone delivers verified comfort at 40–60% lower prices than branded retail—while reducing returns to <5% and unlocking traceable resale, donation, and repair flows.
We aim to capture 5–10% of South Asia’s US$40B market, targeting US$167.4M in revenue over 5 years. Our zero-waste architecture turns every Biometric Scan into a climate-positive data asset, helping avert 2,800+ MT CO₂e annually.
Flintstone has a self-learning AI infrastructure for footwear. Each 3D biometric scan delivers diagnostics, solves sizing failures, and activates MSME manufacturing based on real-time demand. The system continuously learns from scans, returns, and restore cycles, orchestrating production, logistics, and health insights to create a defensible, scalable engine for fit-first commerce.
Flintstone redefines Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) through a Consumer-to-Manufacturer-to-Consumer (C2M2C) model, which allows verified demand to trigger production—minimizing waste, maximizing margin.

Description:
With over 20 years of experience in the footwear export industry, Zhejiang Lucas has built a strong reputation for reliability and professionalism. Our stable supply chain and focus on sustainable practices form the backbone of our operations, allowing us to meet the diverse needs of our clients while adhering to high ethical and environmental standards.

We offer an extensive range of footwear, including women’s, children’s, and men’s shoes. Our dedicated design and development teams work tirelessly to create over 200 new styles each month, ensuring that our product offerings remain fresh, innovative, and aligned with the latest market trends. We are committed to delivering top-quality products that meet the demands of the global marketplace.

Our suppliers are all fully certified and meet the highest industry standards, including certifications such as BSCI, SEDEX, Disney, and GRS. These qualifications ensure that all products are produced under ethical labor conditions, with a focus on environmental sustainability. We are proud of our long-standing relationships with suppliers who share our commitment to excellence.

Trusted by major enterprises across various sectors, Zhejiang Lucas serves leading clients including large supermarkets, department stores, and renowned retail brands. Many of our partnerships have spanned over a decade, which is a testament to the quality of our products and the strength of our customer relationships. Our dedicated business and quality control teams are always on hand to provide personalized service, ensuring that every client’s needs are met to the highest standards.

Name: BY ZMR
Description:
Founded by Ziad Mohammed Rasoul, BY ZMR is a UAE-based leather and footwear manufacturing company that has been at the forefront of footwear craftsmanship for over 40 years across the GCC and MENA region. We specialize in high-quality men’s sandals and custom footwear. We support brands and retailers with end-to-end manufacturing using premium materials and expert craftsmanship. We also offer wholesale distribution of our in-house brands.

What began as a passion for traditional Emirati sandals has evolved into a state-of-the-art manufacturing powerhouse, producing everything from heritage-inspired footwear to ultra-luxury handmade shoes and specialized military and civil defence boots.

Our in-house premium brand, ANTOMIN (www.antomin.com) showcases the pinnacle of design and craftsmanship, ultra-luxury footwear meticulously handcrafted in the UAE using the world’s finest leathers, bold colours, and exclusive finishes. 

What sets us apart?
 End-to-end manufacturing capability in the UAE – from sourcing ultra-high-quality leather to producing a diverse variety of designs and rubber soles, a capability unique in the region.
 Private Label Solutions – we partner with brands to de sign and produce their very own custom luxury private lines, tailored to their vision.
 In-house brands for wholesale distribution — offering both premium collections (ANTOMIN) and value-focused lines (Al Baz and Al Reem), providing flexible options for retailers across multiple price segments.
Premium craftsmanship – blending traditional techniques with cutting-edge technology.

At BY ZMR, every step we take is guided by heritage, powered by innovation, and built on decades of experience. Whether you are looking for a trusted partner to manufacture traditional sandals, military-grade boots, or exclusive luxury collections, we have the expertise, technology, and creativity to bring your designs to life.

BY ZMR – Home of UAE Footwear Manufacturing
