Name: Departamento de Psiquiatría y Salud Mental Oriente
FARE
Description:
FARE, spol. s r.o. is a Czech family-owned company founded in 1991 in Valašské Klobouky. It specializes in producing high-quality, healthy footwear for children and adults. From the beginning, the company has focused on quality and customer satisfaction, establishing the FARE brand as a symbol of reliability and professionalism.

The company’s primary focus is on children’s footwear, to which it has dedicated its utmost attention over the years. This commitment has earned FARE a dominant position in the Czech children’s footwear market. In 2018, the company expanded its range to include a barefoot collection for both children and adults, which has been successfully embraced domestically and internationally.

The name FARE originates from the initials of four Czech words: Fantazie (Imagination), Atraktivita (Attractiveness), Rentabilita (Profitability), and Elegance. These principles continue to inspire the company in developing new models. FARE has its own development department that focuses on innovation and follows modern trends in shoemaking.

FARE has received numerous awards for exceptional design, quality, and innovation, including the GRAND PRIX LEDERMODE Bratislava 2007, Outstanding Product of the Year 2006, and the TOP DESIGN AWARD 2006, among others.

Today, the company is heavily investing in its development, particularly in automation, digitalization, and new technologies. Its products are available through its e-shop and a network of company and partner stores across the Czech Republic. FARE is also actively seeking new B2B partners to expand the availability of its high-quality products.

With over 30 years of experience in the footwear industry, FARE is a leader in the Czech children’s shoe market. By combining traditional craftsmanship with modern technology, the company offers footwear distinguished by its quality, comfort, and attractive design.

Name: Slappys Sourcing Services Limited
Description:
Founded in 2010, Slappys Sourcing Services Limited is a company integrating the R&D and production of finished insoles and open cell breathable PU foam and EVA foam materials. Now the company has established a research center and a production base in Dongguan, Guangdong Province, China, and Long An Province, Vietnam, respectively. With steady and healthy development in these years, the company has been committed to providing more convenient, rapid, and all-round services for customers from every corner of the world.

As an insole supplier recognized by many well-known brands, we specialize in constantly improving our technologies, services, and quality. We have built a R&D and production team of professionals with over 20 years of experience in the industry.

We devote themselves to increasing production efficiency, improving product quality, establishing insights into market trends, and developing cutting-edge technological products in order to gain customers’ trust in our team and products.

Starting with the development of chemical raw materials, the company has owned its core recipes by building a complete production system from PU foaming and EVA foaming to insole moulding, thus better controlling cost and quality, satisfying the special needs of different customers, and making our products more flexible, diversified, and customized. Hence, we can establish versatile, highly competitive product families to serve our customers.

Slappys Sourcing Services Limited sets high standards for itself and prepares for new challenges. We will grow strong together with our customers and partners to create a better future

The shoes are made in Aspe, a shoemaking area with highly skilled artisans who have reached manufacturing excellence and truly love their work. Laocoonte's craftsmanship is authentic and traditional. LAOCOONTE´S DNA

Name: Stadler Holland
Description:
Mijn naam is Günther Flatscher en ik vertegenwoordig het bedrijf Stadler in Nederland en in België. Stadler is een Oostenrijks familiebedrijf dat al sinds 1930 hoogwaardige wandel-, berg- en vrijetijdsschoenen produceert. Ik ben zelf geboren in Oostenrijk en woon sinds bijna 10 jaar in Nederland. Mijn passie voor schoenen is ontstaan in mijn geboorteplaats Tirol, midden in de Alpen. Stadler heeft ook zijn oorsprong in Tirol en staat daar bekend als dé wandelschoen-expert. Door de Oostenrijkse vakkennis en het feit dat Stadler één van de lichtste schoenen op de markt produceert, bewijzen zich de schoenen ook heel goed in de Nederlandse winkels.

De vakkennis en ervaring van Stadler is terug te zien in de kwaliteit en stijl van onze schoenen. In onze productie werken wij steeds aan het verbeteren en innoveren van pasvormen en draagcomfort. Omdat we hoge eisen stellen aan de kwaliteit, gebruiken we alleen hoogwaardige materialen, zoals chroomvrij runderleer, Nubuckleer, Sympatex en Veloursleer.

Name: VENTO SHOES
Description:

La fortaleza de VENTO está en la tecnología con la que fue equipada la fábrica, la capacitación de su personal y la infraestructura. Actualmente VENTO cuenta con: Líneas de ensamble, líneas de pespunte, procesos automatizados con Yukis y máquinas de Inyección directa al corte.

Además, VENTO logró obtener por la calidad en sus procesos la “Certificación Lean Manufacturing” y la “Certificación Sedex SMETA”.


MISIÓN
Producir calzado cumpliendo con los estándares de calidad nacional e internacional para satisfacer las necesidades del mercado. Implementando procesos automatizados y de innovación.

VISIÓN
Ser la fábrica ejemplo de México para el mundo con impacto social y ecológico.

Name: Shandong Worxafe Safety Technology Co., Ltd.
Description:
Our factory is established in 2002, with the name of Anbaolai Footwear. In the year of 2021, we changed the name into Ziting Security for future plans. With 20 years experience, we become one of the leading companies in safety shoe business in China. 
The factory is located in Gaomi City, which is around 80 km away from Qingdao Port, the transportation is very conenient and high efficiency.
Equiped with 2 PU injections and 2 cement lines, our yearly full capacity is 1 million pairs. Meawhile, we are still expanding the productivity to meet the market needs. ISO systems have been implemented in our factory. Many of our models are CE certified by Intertek.
We have set up a independent QC system to make sure, that all the safety shoes coming from our factory are with excellent performance.
Our R&D department has been putting big efforts in new product developing. In the year of 2021, we developed a new fire proof material and already applied it in safety shoes, the temperature resistance can reach 960°C at highest.
With our sincerety, we are glad to you know and work with you.

Located in Melbourne, we are located in a creative hotspot with all the latest trends, and we always keep up with them. Our passion is to create and deliver the most sought after custom-designed footwear, finely tailored to all levels of the women's footwear market. Pushing the boundaries of service, quality and value for money. 

Offering a customised end to end service, we cater to the women’s footwear market delivering product fine-tuned to your customer needs. Always offering the fastest service and most comprehensive product development and sourcing. Refine will deliver the highest quality from your initial sampling through to bulk production.

We have had expansive experience designing and developing shoes for a variety of Australia’s largest retailers and international brands. Shoes are our passion and we aspire to provide you with the best womens footwear that the industry has to offer.

Name: Sanvin Shoes
Description:
Sanvin es una firma de calzado de lujo, hecha a mano en España, para quienes valoran la autenticidad, la excelencia y el detalle.

Nacimos de la experiencia acumulada tras años en el comercio internacional, donde aprendimos que el verdadero lujo no es una tendencia, sino una forma de hacer las cosas.

Cada par de zapatos Sanvin es el resultado de procesos artesanales, selección cuidadosa de materiales y una visión clara: ofrecer piezas atemporales que trasciendan modas y hablen de personalidad, gusto y sofisticación.

Hoy, trabajamos junto a boutiques premium, hoteles de referencia y sastrerías selectas en mercados estratégicos como Alemania, Italia, Suiza y España. Apostamos por relaciones sólidas y duraderas, construidas sobre confianza, coherencia y visión compartida.

En Sanvin, entendemos el lujo como un legado que se construye paso a paso. Y estamos aquí para caminarlo juntos.

Name: AUZORI

Name: LEH
Description:
Bienvenue sur Escarpins Hôtesses, votre référence en matière de chaussures professionnelles pour personnels navigants. Nous comprenons les besoins spécifiques des hôtesses de l'air, stewards et autres membres d'équipage, où confort, élégance et durabilité sont essentiels.

Nos modèles sont conçus pour offrir un soutien optimal tout au long de la journée, même après de longues heures debout. Grâce à des matériaux soigneusement sélectionnés, nos chaussures réduisent la fatigue et les douleurs tout en offrant une esthétique raffinée, en parfaite harmonie avec les codes vestimentaires des compagnies aériennes.

Pourquoi choisir nos chaussures ?
Que vous recherchiez des escarpins, ballerines ou des talons moyens, chaque modèle est pensé pour allier confort et élégance. Nos semelles antidérapantes, nos matériaux respirants et notre ajustement parfait assurent une marche agréable, tout en vous permettant de rester stylé(e) et professionnel(le) durant vos journées de service.

Confort et durabilité
Nous mettons un point d'honneur à proposer des chaussures qui non seulement se distinguent par leur design, mais aussi par leur durabilité. Nos produits sont conçus pour résister à l'usure, offrant ainsi un investissement durable. Chaque paire est rigoureusement testée pour garantir qu'elle répond aux exigences élevées des personnels navigants.

Un engagement qualité
Chez Escarpins Hôtesses, nous nous engageons à offrir des chaussures qui allient esthétique et praticité. Nous savons que le confort est la clé de la performance, c'est pourquoi nos modèles sont élaborés pour permettre une utilisation prolongée sans inconfort, tout en maintenant une allure impeccable.

Explorez notre collection et découvrez des chaussures professionnelles qui s’adaptent à vos besoins et vous accompagnent dans vos missions quotidiennes. Alliez style et confort avec Escarpins Hôtesses, le spécialiste des chaussures pour personnels navigants.

Name: Debongo Global LLP
Description:
100% sustainable. 100% circular.
Go Planet-D by Debongo is set to be world’s first 100% sustainable and circular footwear brand, the first to be 100% recycled and reused. It will also be the world’s first Zero-Wastage footwear brand and the patent is pending with the registry.
It will be the first Indian footwear brand that can be resold for a price.
Go Planet-D by Debongo will also be an inclusive sustainable brand for the masses at a later stage.
The concept of Go Planet-D by Debongo was conceived and developed by VKC Razak, the Managing Director of India’s VKC.

Name: CALZATURIFICIO CINZIA VALLE S.R.L.
Description:
La Tradizione Artigianale che si tramanda di padre in figlio.

Oggi il calzaturificio Cinzia Valle, alla sua seconda generazione, coniuga l’esperienza quarantennale di chi ha dedicato tutti i suoi sforzi alla creazione di una calzatura che, oltre a tener conto della moda, curasse soprattutto la cura del piede da cui dipende il benessere del corpo.

Si pone particolare attenzione all’innovazione tecnologica e alle nuove conoscenze medico scentifiche relative alla salute dei piedi della nuova generazione.

Il calzaturificio Cinzia Valle, mediante l’utilizzo di materiali naturali, pellami morbidi e pregiati, forme realizzate rispettando le esigenze dei piedi prima e della moda poi, combina il tutto con la raffinatezza ed il costante rinnovo della modelleria, crea calzature per una clientela che vuole muoversi nel massimo confort.

Nelle nostre collezioni sono presenti forme per l’inserimento di plantari personalizzati.

Name: MERSEIGHT
Description:
Merseight: A Timeless Convergence of Art, Heritage, and Modern Craft

Merseight is a brand deeply rooted in artistic and historical references, blending traditional craftsmanship with innovative techniques to offer a modern approach. Our passion lies at the intersection of design, craft, and culture, where we aim for refinement and sophistication within a classical ethos. The brand's journey is guided by the mantra of past, present, and future.
As a brand, Merseight combines classic elegance with modern sensibilities to create timeless, striking, yet minimally androgenous objects designed to be passed down through generations. The perfect harmony between Semih Işık's architectural order and aesthetic perception and Mert Güler's visual composition and narrative ability subtly infuses the brand's identity with unique depth.
At Merseight, craft and luxury are inextricably linked. Each handcrafted piece honors art and cultural influences, reflecting our profound commitment to exceptional craftsmanship.

Name: Bambloo Research s.a.s
Description:
Bambloo Research s.a.s è un azienda attiva nel settore calzaturiero opera nell'ambito del design e della progettazione stilistica intesa come attività che consiste nella ideazione di un modello, nel design della suola, individuazione e scelta dei materiali e/o accessori.

Il nostro ufficio si caratterizza non solo per innovazione stilistica ma anche per innovazione tecnologica che ci permette sviluppo tecnico ed elaborazione del disegno attraverso l'uso dei sistemi Cad-Cam e stampante 3D. Tanto dai condurci alla realizzazione di prototipi e a competenze di industrializzazione del prodotto fondamentali per soddisfare requisiti richiesti dal mercato.

Name: VOF Studio
Description:
VOF Studio is part of the Hive Corp group. We provide solutions to our customers, who seek efficient results in footwear development and manufacturing, including 3D Design. Its Headquarters is based in the Binh Duong Province in Vietnam, just on the outskirts of Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon). We have always been collaborating with global Conceptual Designers, which provides us with insights on the industry trends and needs, allowing us to keep our performance always at a high level.

Small and medium size brands need support in their development and production processes due to lack of resources. It has always been a key factor to get prototypes being delivered to the design teams as fast as possible, granting them to act promptly and to take efficient decisions faster. On the same note, and as important as having a solid development, it’s also extremely important to have a reliable production process, with short timeframes and with commitment to keep deliveries on time. This is where VOF Studio becomes an asset.

At VOF Studio, we strive to build a small but strong and effective structure. We are aware that the market constantly demands flexibility and therefore we must be prepared to adapt, embracing all challenges and fast changes. There’s also a need to consider costing, therefore we aim to deliver only what our customer needs and wants, skipping all unnecessary processes and everything which will only increase the development time and cost, bringing no added value.

You have an idea, we develop the product, and focus on the end result is key. Our customer’s success will be our success. The collaboration with us will be an important asset in your product, don't hesitate to contact us to exchange ideas.

Name: Letzsneak
Description:
Vi er Ditlev og Emil, de stolte ejere af Letzsneak. I november 2021 begyndte vi vores spændende rejse med en fælles passion for sneakers. Vores mål var at skabe mere end bare en almindelig online sneakerbutik; vi ønskede at opbygge et unikt fællesskab, hvor kærligheden til sneakers kunne blomstre i et trygt miljø.

Siden da har vi arbejdet utrætteligt for at gøre Letzsneak til det, det er i dag. Vores hengivenhed for sneakers driver os til at søge de bedste kvalitetsprodukter og tilbyde dem til vores kunder. Men vores engagement går ud over bare at sælge sneakers. Vi stræber efter at levere den bedste service, så vores kunder føler sig trygge og velplejede hver gang de handler hos os.

Hos Letzsneak handler det ikke kun om sneakers; det handler om fællesskabet og lidenskaben for sneakers, som vi deler med vores kunder. Vi ønsker at skabe et sikkert og pålideligt sted, hvor du kan udforske din sneakerkærlighed uden bekymringer.

Vi er stolte af, hvor langt vi er kommet, og vi ser frem til at fortsætte med at vokse og dele vores passion med dig. Velkommen til Letzsneak, hvor vi tror på, at hver sneakerfortælling er unik, og vi er her for at hjælpe dig med at skabe din egen.

Name: Asfark Shoes
Description:
Welcome to Asfark Shoes - The Cloud Walk. Our recipe for comfortable footwear is prepared with a focus on foot anatomy and materials that protect and comfort your feet. Our innovative designs distribute pressure and deliver an incredible wearer experience, making you feel like you can walk a little more.

We are proud to collaborate with Rajax Industries, who have been manufacturing and exporting pure leather shoes since 1965. As pioneers in comfort footwear manufacturing in Pakistan, Rajax have over six decades of experience exporting their pure leather footwear around the world. Our shoes understand foot anatomy better than anyone, and we use the most comfortable materials from all over the globe. Our team comprises experienced personnel and labourers who have been working in the footwear industry for over three decades. They have a keen eye for detail, which results in a finished footwear product that is unparalleled in terms of quality.

At Asfark Shoes, we have core values that guide everything we do. We see our clients as partners and aim to make great products together. Our satisfaction is achieved when our partner's satisfaction is met. Quality is our top priority and teamwork is essential to us. We don't say no to partners, and innovation is our belief, as we never stop innovating to thrive in Industry 4.0.

Try our footwear once, and you'll see why our customers come back to us time and time again. Join us in our mission to provide comfortable footwear that will change the way you walk.

Name: Yipee Footwear
Description:
Founded in 2021, we are the trusted manufacturing partner behind the world’s most recognized lifestyle and footwear brands. From everyday sliders to ergonomic clogs, we specialize in crafting high-performance, high-comfort footwear at scale - with speed, precision, and consistency.

Our clients range from fashion-forward labels to performance-driven giants, and our flexible production capabilities allow us to deliver at scale while maintaining uncompromising quality and comfort.

Driven by innovation and fueled by global ambition, our vision and mission are simple.

Vision
To become the world’s leading footwear manufacturer by expanding our global footprint, scaling production with precision, and setting new benchmarks in comfort, quality, and speed for every brand we serve.

Mission
To be the trusted partner behind the world’s leading brands, delivering exceptional footwear at speed, crafted with superior comfort and uncompromising quality.

As we expand our footprint across continents, we continue to invest in next-generation manufacturing, and strategic partnerships that help brands bring their designs to life - faster and better than ever before.

Open Footwear, Perfected.

Name: ASOCIACION DE FABRICANTES DE CALZADO DE MENORCA (AFCM)
Description:
La industria del calzado de Menorca, con una rica herencia y un reconocimiento creciente, se enfrenta a un 2024 tan prometedor como desafiante. 

Con el reciente lanzamiento de "Menorca Shoes", un nuevo sello de calidad impulsado por la Asociación de Fabricantes de Calzado de Menorca (AFCM), la isla no solo pretende honrar su tradición zapatera, sino también catapultar su calzado al prestigio internacional, alineándose con grandes marcas y denominaciones de origen reconocidas globalmente.

La campaña de 2024 tiene objetivos claros: instaurar Menorca Shoes como un sello de garantía y calidad, añadiendo un valor inestimable a cada producto que lo ostente. Al igual que los vinos de Rioja o los zapatos italianos, Menorca Shoes aspira a convertirse en un referente de excelencia.

Para ello, la Asociación de Fabricantes de Calzado de Menorca ha desplegado una serie de acciones promocionales audaces. Una de las herramientas más innovadoras es el mapa interactivo ya disponible en la página web, diseñado para ayudar tanto a locales como a turistas a descubrir los puntos de venta de calzado por toda la isla. Este mapa se enriquece constantemente con información sobre otros atractivos de Menorca, como museos, galerías y restaurantes, convirtiéndolo en un recurso invaluable desde el momento de llegada al aeropuerto.

Además, se está desarrollando una aplicación móvil destinada a ser un referente indispensable para todos los visitantes. Esta aplicación no solo facilitará la localización de productos Menorca Shoes sino que también ofrecerá promociones y descuentos exclusivos, suponiendo una herramienta esencial para quienes exploran la isla en busca de su atractivo calzado

Name: Ankur Foot Tech
Description:
Ankur Foot Tech is a leading OEM footwear manufacturer in India, established in 1995, with a strong legacy of quality, innovation, and reliability in the open footwear industry. With decades of hands-on manufacturing expertise, we specialize in designing and producing high-performance, trend-driven open footwear for global and domestic brands.

As a trusted OEM partner, we offer end-to-end manufacturing solutions, We operate a vertically integrated, end-to-end manufacturing platform encompassing in-house sheet plants, rubber sole manufacturing, and state-of-the-art laser, hot and cold embossing technologies, ensuring precision-driven design execution, uncompromised quality standards, and supply reliability at scale.
We also specialize in the production of open footwear (Flip Flop/Sandel), die-cut soles with stock-fitted construction, and die-cut insoles using high-performance EVA materials, ensuring superior comfort, durability, and consistent quality standards. This integration allows us to deliver cost-effective, high-quality footwear while maintaining speed, consistency, and flexibility to meet evolving market demands.

Our operations are backed by specialized manufacturing —Ankur Foot Tech—giving us a combined monthly capacity of over 4-5 lakh pairs. We are committed to uncompromising quality standards, innovative design development, and timely delivery, making us a preferred partner for leading footwear brands.

At Ankur Foot Tech, we believe in building long-term partnerships based on trust, transparency, and performance. More than just a manufacturer, we are a community of footwear professionals driven by craftsmanship, integrity, and a shared passion for shaping the future of foot fashion.

Name: Mahaveer Overseas
Description:
"Welcome to Mahaveer Overseas, a company driven by innovation and a steadfast commitment to comfort since our inception in 2000. Founded by Mr. Suresh Kumar Bhansali, our journey embarked with a bold mission: to revolutionize the footwear industry and provide unparalleled comfort to individuals grappling with foot-related challenges. This vision inspired the birth of our pioneering brand, HealthFit , exclusively devoted to crafting the most comfortable footwear for those dealing with diabetes and orthopedic conditions.

The remarkable success of HealthFit propelled us towards new frontiers, leading to the introduction of TechnoFit, a line of high-quality, comfortable footwear tailored to the younger generation, seamlessly blending cutting-edge designs with ultimate comfort. Our unwavering pursuit of excellence didn't end there. We proudly unveiled Bing Bang, a brand synonymous with top-notch ladies' fashion footwear, further diversifying our product portfolio and extending our influence.

Throughout our journey of innovation, one unwavering principle has guided us – an unyielding commitment to creating premium products while fulfilling our environmental responsibility. We take pride in crafting 100% Vegan and Sustainable footwear, ensuring that we not only cater to the needs of our customers but also contribute positively to the well-being of Mother Earth.

Today, we stand proudly as the trusted supplier to numerous prominent corporate clients, upholding our legacy of manufacturing an impressive 100,000 pairs of footwear every month. At Mahaveer Overseas, our passion for innovation, dedication to quality, and commitment to sustainability continue to propel us forward, as we work tirelessly to redefine the footwear industry, one step at a time."

Step Forward with us towards a greener and blissfully comfortable future.

#MakingFootwearResponsibly #ProudlyMadeInIndia

Name: Arkitto
Description: Step into superior comfort and all-day support with Arkitto Arch Support Insoles, designed to provide effective foot pain relief and lasting comfort for walking, running, working, workouts, and daily wear. These orthotic insoles for flat feet feature ergonomic arch support, advanced cushioning, and shock-absorbing heel pads that help reduce pressure and impact on the heels, feet, ankles, knees, hips, and lower back, making them ideal for managing plantar fasciitis, heel pain, flat feet, over-pronation, and foot fatigue. Made from lightweight, breathable, sweat-resistant, and odour-free materials, these shoe insoles keep feet fresh, dry, and comfortable even during long hours of use. The trimmable design ensures a perfect fit for most footwear, including running shoes, sports shoes, sneakers, work shoes, boots, casual and formal shoes. Suitable for men and women, these orthopedic shoe inserts act as a supportive shoe footbed, helping improve posture and foot alignment for daily comfort.

Name: Cimex Calzado
Description:
Calzado Industrial Mexicano, o como comúnmente se nos conoce en el mercado, “CIMEX”, nace en el año de 1982 en Calle María De La Luz 777 y 781, Col. Loma Bonita, C.P. 37420 de la ciudad de León, Guanajuato bajo una única filosofía de trabajo, ser “EL CALZADO IDEAL PARA TU SEGURIDAD”.
Desde nuestros inicios tuvimos en mente lograr un calzado de seguridad que diera confianza en su uso, para ello era necesario apegarse a los más altos estándares de calidad y reforzarlos con lo estipulado en la Norma Oficial Mexicana. Es por eso que el hacer un calzado que cumpla con el confort, ergonomía y funcionalidad para nuestros clientes ha sido nuestra misión del día a día.
Debido a este gran compromiso que hemos mostrado a lo largo de los años, nos ha valido el poder obtener diversas certificaciones para nuestros productos, como lo son la NOM-113-STPS-2009 y la Certificación CFE H1000-22 del Laboratorio de Pruebas de Equipos y Materiales (LAPEM) de la CFE. Y como empresa certificarnos como Proveedor Confiable por parte de las casas auditoras “IKUS Solutions”, “ECOVADIS” y “UTTEK”.
Fabricamos calzado de seguridad que de forma aleatoria seleccionamos para realizarle diversas pruebas en los laboratorios de NYCE y del CIATEC, este último forma parte de la red de Centros Públicos del Consejo Nacional de Ciencia y Tecnología (CONACYT) especializado en el ramo cuero- calzado. Entre las pruebas que se realizan están la de Resistencia al Despegado, Impacto y Compresión del casco, PH y Cromo en la piel, Resistencia Dieléctrica, entre otras. Las cuales aprobamos y nos permiten reafirmar que nuestros clientes portan un calzado confiable.
Actualmente contamos con un área de fabricación de 1,800 m2 en dos niveles, una plantilla de 45 empleados (administrativos y operarios) y una capacidad instalada de 6,000 pares semanales.
Realizamos 3 diferentes tipos de sistemas de fabricación (unión corte-suela), que son: Goodyearwelt, Lockstitcher y Pegado de Alta Resistencia. En este último nos hemos es

Name: DONNA SOFT S.R.L.
Description:
Di stagione in stagione, le nostre collezioni nascono per esaltare l’identità elegante e riconoscibile della cliente Donna Soft e per accompagnarla con grazia, grinta e comfort giorno per giorno, anno dopo anno. Progettiamo sempre modelli destinati a durare nel tempo sia per stile che per qualità.

Realizziamo le collezioni interamente in Italia, nel cuore di una regione storicamente legata alle calzature, le Marche. La ricerca dei migliori materiali, il decennale know how nella lavorazione artigianale e il costante monitoraggio dei trend del panorama fashion nazionale e internazionale ci permettono di realizzare un prodotto contraddistinto da alto comfort, uno stile contemporaneo e con un ottimo rapporto qualità-prezzo.

Ci piace ascoltare sempre le esigenze e i desideri delle nostre clienti: realizziamo infatti le nostre calzature in un’ampia gamma di misure e con materiali che supportano il benessere del piede.
Le calzature Donna Soft sono le perfette alleate per donne dinamiche e con carattere ma, allo stesso tempo, raffinate e attente tanto allo stile quanto alla comodità. Ogni particolare—dalla vestibilità al materiale—è studiato per coccolare il piede, senza rinunciare allo stile. Ideali per destreggiarsi tra gli impegni della vita di tutti i giorni e perfette per le occasioni speciali in cui l’eleganza si fa protagonista, grazie a dettagli sofisticati.

Name: Ase Sports Co
Description:
ASE Sports is a Shoe manufacturer in India, starting as a cricket bat manufacturer in Sialkot before expanding into sports footwear in Agra in the 1980s. The brand, ASE Sports was established in 1997. Focused on creating durable and comfortable sports shoes that are designed to enhance Athletic Performance. From the year 1985 to 2008, the evolution from cricket bats to High-Quality footwear demonstrates our dedication to quality, innovation and customer satisfaction. The future mission of ASE Sports is to design, manufacture, and deliver the best quality Sports Shoes that empowers athletes of all levels to achieve their best performance. Our company is committed to sustainability, excellence in craftsmanship, and leveraging cutting-edge technology to enhance comfort, durability and functionality. 

ASE Sports envisions being a Global Leader in the the Sports footwear Industry. recognized for its passion for sports, innovation, and sustainability. Name: Anyk Shoes
Description:
Anyk est une marque de chaussures marocaine née de l’héritage familial, avec une vision claire : allier savoir-faire traditionnel et design moderne tout en respectant notre planète. 
Fondée sur des valeurs d'authenticité, de qualité et de durabilité, Anyk est le fruit d’une longue histoire qui a débuté en 1995, lorsque le père M. Azzedine a ouvert la première unité de production de chaussures. 

En 2020, Yassmine fonde sa propre marque, une première étape dans son parcours entrepreneurial. Forte de son expérience et de son désir de rendre hommage à son héritage familial, elle décide quelques années plus tard de lancer Anyk. Son objectif est clair : allier artisanat traditionnel et design moderne, tout en respectant des valeurs de durabilité et d’éthique.

Avec une expertise en gestion, innovation et développement, Yassmine réinvente l’approche de la marque en mettant l'accent sur une mode responsable et une production artisanale. 

Aujourd'hui, Yassmine continue de structurer et de développer l'ADN de Anyk, en veillant à rester fidèle à son héritage tout en cultivant des valeurs humaines fortes. Anyk est plus qu’une marque : c’est un engagement pour une mode éthique et durable, un hommage à l’artisanat et une promesse de transparence et de respect envers les artisans et les ressources naturelles.

Name: Government Mental Health Centre
Description: Government Mental Health Centre, Kozhikode right from its inception in the colonial period in 1872 is committed to the promotion of mental health and has a legacy of 147 years of devotion towards the mentally ill. GMHC is one of the 3 speciality hospitals in psychiatry under the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of Kerala. Situated in the heart of Kozhikode city at Kuthiravattom, the hospital is easily accessible for the public by road and rail. The campus is spread across 22 acres of land and houses 9 wards, pay ward, de-addiction ward, administrative building and other infrastructure facilities with ample space for outdoor recreation for the patients. The heritage building that has stood the test of time and the lush greenery makes the campus unique.

Name: MAS TABAN
Description:
1976: As Saba Plastik, we first started to serve the electrical cable sector with PVC granule production.
1984: We started to produce PVC granules for the shoe industry.
2001: In addition to the PVC granule facility, it has expanded its production network 2 times by establishing the Thermo granule facility. It has maintained its place among the leading companies in this field.
2006: We increased our Thermo Granule production capacity to 1,200 tons per year and became the leading Thermo Granule producer in the sector.
2018: In addition to granule production, we entered shoe sole production under the name Mas Sole. 2022: As Mas Sole, we became the choice of national and international brands.
What truly defines Saba Plastik and Mas Sole; It maintains its sensitivity to the principles of service quality, solution-oriented structure, deadline quality and reasonable price compared to quality.
Since the first years we entered the sector, we have reached today by not compromising on the principles of 'quality' and 'trust', and we are living the 47th year of our commercial life.

Name: S2S UNIPESSOAL LDA
Description:
Criada em 2001, a S2S unipessoal tem sede no Norte de Portugal e um longo percurso começando pela representação pelo único socio e fundador Paulo Costa em exclusivo para Portugal da empresa INGA Itália solas para calçado em borracha, posteriormente a empresa INGA associou-se a outra empresa EUROPLASTICA solas em poliuretano, TR e TPU, criando uma nova empresa com o nome de EUROINGA SPA ficando com uma grande oferta no fabrico de solas para calçado em todas as vertentes de materiais e estando sempre na inovação e criação de produtos de alta qualidade. Paulo Costa juntamente com novo colaborador o seu irmão Jorge Costa criou a marca de solas S2S de fabrico exclusivo nacional, para fazer frente ás mudanças de mercados que passaram a exigir entregas de pronto moda ou seja de rápida entrega e preços competitivos, mas sempre selando pela qualidade e inovação dos seus produtos as solas para calçado, podendo assim satisfazer os seus clientes. Devido ao crescimento da empresa juntamos um novo colaborador Ana Brandão responsável pelo departamento de contabilidade, faturação e finanças da empresa. Adquirimos um espaço comercial com showroom de toda a coleção da EUROINGA e S2S para assim podermos ter um espaço para receber clientes. Com o crescimento da empresa e com a realização de coleção já com vários modelos de solas, com marca S2S têm acompanhado todas estas mudanças do mercado e está sempre presente nas principais feiras do sector calçado, para assim compreender as tendências do mercado, e estar com proximidade junto dos seus clientes, com objetivo de perceber as necessidades dos mesmos, e assim podermos garantir o serviço que pretendem, estamos constantemente a ajustar a nossa empresa pensando nas necessidades dos nossos clientes, para podermos manter uma relação comercial e de excelência, como fornecedor dos nossos clientes.
Somos uma equipa ambiciosa e com excelente relação comercial  sempre com o objetivo de ser um serviço de qualidade e eficácia

Name: NEX Footwear
Description:
NEX Group, a leading Taiwan based footwear manufacturer in the industry, has a professional team with a wealth of experience partnering with international brands. NEX has supply networks in China, Vietnam, and Cambodia to provide end–to-end footwear solutions; ranging from material innovation, product development, production, and logistics. We are a responsible global partner committed to minimizing environmental impact in our value chain. 
Quality is our top priority! All our products are fully inspected to exceed customer expectations. NEX has in-house R&D capabilities and eco-friendly material expertise to deliver innovative and sustainable footwear solutions. We believe "good shoes take people good places."

LEADERSHIP
Lee
Executive Vice President
Production, R&D

Dr. Lee joined NEX Group in 2017 as Senior Director of Development, Material Innovation. He brings with his over thirty-year experience in the industry as EVP. He previously served as Senior Development Manager at Under Armour, Head of China & Indonesia Production at Pou Chen Group, a leading international footwear manufacturer.
Lee’s current focus on renewable materials innovation leads the way for NEX with industry-changing breakthroughs in sustainable products development. 
In 2023, NEX delivered for customers their first shoes utilizing 100% recycled/recyclable materials to the market.

Taipei (Taiwan) - Headquarters

Name: SwooshedOut
Description:
Who are we?
- We are a small startup, and our goal is to let people express themselves and flex their footwear in new ways!

How do we do that? 
- We transform your sneakers by attaching a velcro swoosh which lets you change how they look whenever you decide. By doing this you unlock infinitely many combinations of swooshes for your favorite sneakers, without the need to buy a new pair.

Why are you different than others?
- We differentiate ourselves from competitors by providing more flexibility and demanding less commitment. When you get a paint job on your sneakers, they stay like that forever. When you get a Swoosh Job with us, you get to keep the old features of your beloved shoes, but you also get the possibility to change them in a matter of seconds, simply by removing the original swoosh and placing one of our custom designs!

Name: Calzaturificio ZIVIANI
Description:
Dal 1946 il Calzaturificio Ziviani è specializzato nella lavorazione “California” producendo artigianalmente sandali e scarpe comode con morbidi pellami e plantari estraibili.
L’azienda ha alle sue spalle una lunga esperienza; è nata prima dell’ultima guerra da un’intuizione di Pietro Ziviani che aveva guadagnato buona fama realizzando comodi zoccoli da uomo e da donna.

Oggi i titolari mantenendo il tradizionale impegno, ricercano nei modelli modernità abbinata ad eleganza e confort.
Tutti i modelli sono realizzati interamente nel loro stabilimento avvaledosi di una manodopera specializzata e curando ogni minimo dettaglio.
Il punto forza è rappresentato soprattutto dalla qualità del prodotto che include la scelta dei materiali di prim’ordine e accessori originali.

Desde nuestra fundación en el año 1953, hemos crecido hasta convertirnos en un referente en la industria del calzado, ofreciendo productos que combinen estilo y comodidad a un precio accesible. Nuestro equipo está compuesto por profesionales apasionados que se esfuerzan por la excelencia en cada par de zapatillas que fabricamos.

• Misión
Crear zapatillas que no solo sean cómodas y duraderas, sino que también reflejen el estilo y las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

• Visión
Ser la marca de zapatillas preferida a nivel nacional, reconocida por nuestra innovación, calidad y compromiso con nuestros clientes.
• Valores
- Innovación: Estamos constantemente buscando nuevas formas de mejorar nuestros productos.
- Calidad: Cada par de zapatillas pasa por estrictos controles de calidad.
- Pasión: Nuestro equipo está compuesto por personas apasionadas por lo que hacen.

Name: Loyal Footwear
Description:
About Loyal Footwear

Made sustainably by me, for you: Loyal Footwear is a cruelty-free, vegan shoe brand. I make every single pair of shoes myself, by hand, here in the USA. What I believe are the best ways of doing absolutely everything converge in this single collection. 

Shoes that you can live in and feel good about: My focus is on soft, comfortable, contemporary styles that you’ll want to live in, created in the most conscious and sustainable way possible. I use advanced microfiber vegan leathers, plant-based leathers, plant-based textiles, and recycled soling materials. My primary approach to sustainability is making shoes to order. No mass-production here. I never make shoes to carry inventory. Only custom, made-to-order shoes for you.  

Partner for your feet and the planet: I push myself to constantly evolve as newer, more sustainable vegan materials enter the market. I implement customer feedback to make Loyal Footwear softer, more durable, and supportive with each and every batch. I’ll get to know your feet, and you’ll get to know your shoemaker!

Name: Goloks
Description:
Les bottes GOLOKS incarnent l’esprit des hauts plateaux tibétains tout en reflétant le raffinement du savoir-faire français. Conçues pour les explorateurs urbains et les aventuriers des grands espaces, ces bottes en cuir et laine de mouton rendent hommage à la liberté, à la nature et à une élégance intemporelle.

Fabriquées à la main dans les ateliers de La Botte Gardiane en France, chaque paire est le résultat d’une attention minutieuse aux détails. Les matériaux de qualité, tels que le cuir souple et robuste associé à une doublure en laine de mouton, assurent chaleur et un confort incomparable. Leur semelle épaisse confère durabilité et résistance aux intempéries, tout en conservant un esthétisme raffiné.

Porter des bottes GOLOKS, c’est affirmer un style audacieux et élégant, idéal tant pour la campagne que pour la ville. Elles subliment des tenues décontractées tout en ajoutant une touche de sophistication à un look casual. Avec leur design classique et contemporain, ces bottes sont le compagnon parfait pour ceux en quête d’un équilibre entre confort, chaleur et allure chic.

Name: Atelier COSTÀ
Description:
Welcome to Atelier COSTÀ
The Art of Custom-Made Artisanal Footwear

Atelier COSTÀ is a small-scale workshop based in Spain, where craftsmanship meets design. We create elegant, durable and high-quality shoes, espadrilles and slippers — handcrafted for brands and clients who value slow fashion and unique production.

 Craftsmanship & Consultancy
We don’t just make shoes. We guide brands through the full creative process: from material selection to prototype, from artisanal techniques to final delivery. Our mission is to make production smooth, personal and worry-free — no mass manufacturing, no shortcuts.

 Your Partner for Small Collections
We work with fashion brands and designers who want to launch limited custom collections. Whether you have a clear idea or need creative guidance, we bring the expertise, savoir-faire and flexibility to make it happen.

 Responsible by Nature
Sustainability is part of everything we do: conscious materials, local sourcing, ethical production, and timeless design.

 Let’s Talk
If you’re looking for a trusted partner to develop unique footwear in Spain — we’d love to hear from you.
Let’s build something beautiful, one step at a time.

Description:
Born in the rugged North East of England, we design high-performance outdoor and mountaineering boots built for Britain’s wildest conditions, from boggy moors to icy summits. Name: Calzoleria Toscana Shoes
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nel 1958, anno in cui Luciano Bettaccini inizia a produrre calzature a livello artigianale e familiare secondo le tradizioni dell’epoca. 

Nell’anno 1977 inizia l’attività in forma organizzata e successivamente viene affiancato dai due nipoti Enrico e Paolo, che insieme ad altri componenti della famiglia e stretti collaboratori, fanno crescere in maniera esponenziale l’azienda che si affermerà nel settore delle calzature in pelle. 

Le nostre due linee Calzoleria Toscana e Rosso Fiorentino, cuore pulsante della nostra azienda, rappresentano la perfetta sintesi tra la passione, l’impegno e la dedizione che mettiamo nell’arte calzaturiera e gli investimenti in macchinari di nuova concezione e ricerche di stile nel rispetto dello spirito di produzione artigiana Toscana.

Ogni articolo viene prodotto adoperando materiali di produzione e lavorazione italiana, proprio per questo possiamo affermare con onore, che le nostre calzature sono manifestazione assoluta del Made in Italy più puro. 

Puoi acquistare i nostri prodotti recandoti nei punti vendita di Firenze e Milano: 

Milano, Piazza San Babila 4/A. WhatsApp del negozio - +39 389 585 8146
Firenze, via della vigna nuova 4R. WhatsApp del negozio - +39 389 903 1089

Name: A-C MAKİNE
Description:
AC MAKİNE, Comelz’in Türkiye, Azerbeycan, Özbekistan, Gürcistan, İran, Irak, Lübnan ve diğer Türki ülkelerdeki resmi distribütörüdür ve Comelz’in Türkiye ve Ortadoğu’da satış ve satış sonrası operasyonlarını yerine getirmekle yükümlü tek yetkili oluşumudur. AC Makine ailesi, Comelz’i bu coğrafyada organik ve dinamik halde tutmak gibi elzem bir görevi başarıyla yerine getirmek için 7/24 çalışmaktadır.
 
 
COMELZ, 1943 yılından beri ayakkabı, çanta ve diğer deri ürünlerinin üretiminde ilk aşama olan deri kesim aşamasına; makineleri, yazılımları ve ileri teknoloji ürünleriyle yön vermektedir. Comelz dünyada Nike, Adidas, Reebok, New Balance, Louis Vutton, Prada, Converse, Burberry, Celine, Gucci ve Christian Dior gibi isimlerin üretimlerine inovatif teknolojileriyle ışık tutan bir markadır. Comelz markasının perde arkasında deneyimli ve alanında uzman mühendislerden kurulmuş güçlü bir arge ve ürge bulunmaktadır. Bu ekip, kesim kalitesi, üretim hızı ve verimlilik konularını temel alarak var olan teknolojiyi ileri taşımak üzere durmaksızın çalışmaktadır. İlk çift kafalı makineyi ve konveyör bantlı deri kesim sistemini dünyaya tanıtan firma olan Comelz, derinin kesilmesi ve kesilmiş parçaların toplanması işlerini eş zamanlı hale getirdiği için 2002 yılından beri pazarda ilgi odağı olmuştur. O günden bugüne büyüyerek gelişen Comelz Türkiye ise, bugün dünyada Comelz’in önemli bir üssü konumundadır. AC Makine, Comelz’in Türkiye ve Ortadoğu’da satış ve satış sonrası operasyonlarını yerine getirmekle yükümlü tek resmi oluşumdur. AC Makine ailesi, Comelz’i bu coğrafyada organik halde tutmak gibi elzem bir görevi başarıyla yerine getirmek için 7/24 çalışmaktadır.

Name: ORTOPEDIA DI STEFANO
Description:
Siamo due fratelli uniti dalla stessa vocazione e affiancati da un nipote che condivide la nostra passione.

La nostra storia inizia anni fa, Fabio e Davide all’età di 16 anni con enorme curiosità e dedizione iniziano ad apprendere le loro abilità artigianali dai padri fondatori dell’ortopedia romana.

AD OGGI VANTANO UN ESPERIENZA TRENTENNALE, DAMIANO IL PIU GIOVANE SI E’ LAURETO CON LODE IN TECNICHE ORTOPEDICHE.

La nostra DIFFERENZA DI ETA’ E DI SCUOLE DI PENSIERO unita da una passione DI FAMIGLIA per il mestiere ci spinge a cercare costantemente nuove ispirazioni e a perfezionare le nostre tecniche, garantendo che ogni MANUFATTO che lascia il nostro laboratorio rappresenti il massimo dell’artigianato italiano.

Con il corso degli anni abbiamo collaborato con professionisti del mondo del calcio della atletica e del pattinaggio questo ci ha permesso di confrontarci e di crescere a livello professionale nel mondo dello sport.

Ci impegniamo a offrire un servizio personalizzato e attentamente curato per soddisfare le esigenze e le preferenze individuali di ogni cliente. Ogni ortesi che produciamo è realizzata con maestria artigianale, utilizzando solo i materiali più pregiati per garantire comfort, durata e funzionalità.
Abbiamo abbracciato l’idea che ogni piede è unico, e ciò ci ha ispirato a dedicarci alla realizzazione di ortesi su misura che non solo si adattano perfettamente, ma che riflettono anche lo stile di vita di chi le indossa.

Name: Pirmi Batai
Description:
Pirmibatai.lt - pirmoji e-parduotuvė Lietuvoje pasiūliusi įsigyti lietuviškos avalynės internetu. Įkurta 2011 metais.

El. parduotuvėje ne tik didžiausias pirmųjų batukų vaikams pasirinkimas, bet ir siūloma stilinga, sveika avalynė mergaitėms, avalynė berniukams ir batai moterims. Mes bendradarbiaujame ir didžiuojamės šiais gamintojais:

UAB "Sabalin“ (įkurta 1998 m.), kuri gamina kokybišką ir šiuolaikišką avalynę tik iš sertifikuotų medžiagų, atitinkančių Europos Sąjungos normatyvinius reikalavimus.
KK - didžiausias vaikiškos avalynės gamintojas Bulgarijoje, investuojantis į patogumą, dizainą ir naujausias technologijas. Vaikiški batai gaminami daugiau nei 20 metų ir nuolat kūriami nauji batų modeliai, tiek basutės, tiek stilingi aulinukai. 
Prekiniam ženklui "Pirmi batai" gaminami rankų darbo ortopediniai batukai ir įvairių aukščių ortopedinės basutės vaikams bei šilti žieminiai batai su vilna. Daugiau nei 15 metų turintys patirtį Lietuvos batsiuviai, stengiasi, kad batukai būtų patogūs ir kuo ilgiau tarnautų.
Prekiniu ženklu "Pirmi baldai" gaminamos tik iš kokybiškų medžiagų lovos vaikams, mašinos lovos su šviečiančiais žibintais, bet taip pat spintos, komodos, lentynos ir kiti užsakomieji baldai Lietuvoje. 
"Pirmi batai" - pasiilgusiems kokybiškos, madingos, pagamintos odinės avalynės Lietuvoje ir Bulgarijoje.

Pirmi batai - ortopediniai batai vaikams pagaminti LT su meile.

 

MB "Pirmi batai" - oficialus KK avalynės atstovas Lietuvoje ir Baltijos šalyse. 
Norinčius platinti batus, prašome su mumis susisiekti dėl tiekimo sąlygų ir didmeninių kainų

Name: DAS - Doğukan Ayakkabıcılık San. ve Dış Tic. Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Sektördeki 40 yılı aşkın tecrübemiz ile güvenlik, temizlik ve hizmet sektörlerinin yanı sıra asker, polis ve zabıta gibi kamu kurumlarına ayakkabı tedariği sağlamaktayız. Referanslarımız arasında dünyanın ve Türkiye’nin önde gelen firmaları bulunmaktadır.

Ürün kalitemiz, 5000 m² kapalı alana sahip üretim-depolama alanımız ve hizmet farkımız ile sizin de önümüzdeki dönem ayakkabı tedariğinizi üstlenmekten memnuniyet duyarız. Name: Fiorino Mother & Child Accessories
Description:
Jesteśmy polskim producentem akcesoriów dla matki i dziecka. Naszą myślą przewodnią jest tworzenie produktów, które przyniosą radość i komfort Maluszkom oraz Ich Mamom.

W Fiorino tworzymy obuwie w oparciu o najwyższą jakość materiałów i dbałość o każdy szczegół. Ręcznie szyte w Polsce produkty są jedyne w swoim rodzaju i takie właśnie jest nasze obuwie. Ekotuptusie mają swoich małych odbiorców na całym świecie, co tylko potwierdza, jak bardzo przyjazne są najmniejszym i zarazem najbardziej potrzebującym stopom.

Najważniejsza dla nas jest jakość. Cechuje nas staranne wykonanie i dbałość o każdy detal. Nasi projektanci dokładają wszelkich starań, aby wzory oferowanych kapci dziecięcych, były jak najlepiej odbierane przez dzieci. Chcemy, aby kapcie z miękką podeszwą ekoTuptusie niosły ze sobą radość i wielki uśmiech małego człowieka.

Najlepsze buty barefoot dla dzieci mają cienkie, elastyczne podeszwy i szeroki nosek. Dzięki temu dziecko naturalnie rozwija mocne, zdrowe stopy!

Większość rodziców, lekarzy i ekspertów zgodziłaby się, że chodzenie na boso jest najlepsze dla dzieci uczących się chodzić. Nauka chodzenia w kapciach dziecięcych z miękką podeszwą, to praktycznie to samo co chodzenie na bosaka. Pomaga rozwijać silne mięśnie w stopie i nie zakłóca naturalnego, zdrowego chodu i biegania.

Name: Caimar Cesare Martinoli
Description:

La nostra azienda, che ha sede a Vigevano, rappresenta oggi un'eccellenza tutta italiana in campo calzaturiero, sinonimo di accuratezza e qualità, un marchio conosciuto e apprezzato anche a livello mondiale da grandi firme della moda che si rivolgono a noi per realizzare le proprie collezioni di calzature.
Oggi Cesare Martinoli - Caimar è una realtà importante a livello internazionale nel segmento della scarpa di lusso femminile, nome che porta alto il Made in Italy nel mondo, mantenendo lo spirito artigianale di sempre.
Le nostre produzioni, infatti, vengono richieste da diverse griffe di alta moda, che si affidano proprio alla nostra esperienza e professionalità riconoscendo in noi il partner ideale per sviluppare le proprie collezioni

Da 80 anni la produzione Cesare Martinoli è sinonimo di scarpe belle, eleganti e comode, ottenute lavorando i migliori pellami e tessuti

Name: San Jos Parish Hospital
Description: San  Jos Hospital , Pavaratty  was established in 1949 by St. Vincent De Paul Society of Parish. It was started as a clinic in a rented building. It is to be remembered with gratitude that our late Arch Bishop Dr. Joseph Kundukulam took the initiation for the beginning of the Hospitals while he was Asst. Vicar at Pavaratty. In 1952 it had it own building of 6 rooms. One year before (1951) the supervision of the hospital had been handed over to the Rev. Sisters of Carmelite Congregation (CMC). Now from 1989, Rev. Sisters of Adoration Congregation are in charge. In 1970 the Parish Shrine took over the management and the hospital became San Jos Parish Hospital. Till then it was known as Vincentian Hospital. In the year 1999 San Jos Parish Hospital celebrated its Golden Jubilee. In 1994 a Nursing School has started in this Hospital.

Contando com mais de 300 colaboradores, diretos e indiretos, parque industrial próprio, maquinários de última geração e possui uma capacidade instalada de 200 mil pares por mês.
A empresa mantém negócios com os maiores varejistas do mercado brasileiro e também está presente no continente europeu e nas américas, atendendo-os com nossas marcas e produtos ou produzindo de acordo com suas demandas, desde o início do projeto até a confecção final do produto, entregando rapidez e segurança.
Além de estar atento às inovações que proporcionem cada vez mais qualidade e conforto, a RHP está sempre em busca de práticas que contribuam para o desenvolvimento sustentável em respeito ao meio ambiente, utilizando-se de matérias-primas recicláveis e gerando energia limpa através de sua usina fotovoltaica

Name: Servizio Sovrazonale di Epidemiologia - ASL TO3
NAVAIL LLC
Description:
We provide magnetic footwear for steel roofers, carpenters and estimators working on steel roofs. Our magnetic roofing shoe has an outstanding traction and a great durability. Equipped with such reliable boots, your efficiency and that of your team will likely double. The steeper the roof, the more you can make out of your roofing shoes.
We also provide a magnetized sole cover that will effectively protect your boots when walking on the ground and prevent your magnetic soles from picking up debris.

This adventure started when my brother, a steel roofer asked me to design him a pair of shoes with magnets. He was working on a particularly steep roof and did not feel confident nor safe.
At first I took a look at the state of art. I sent him a pair of magnetic boots from a well established American company. I thought the challenge was solved. It appeared like it at first but after a few days, he complained about the sole detaching from the upper and from magnets leaving the sole. I knew more had to be done.

As I am an engineer, I decided to take the challenge. At first for my brother but really to make sure all roofers have access to a reliable option when it come to walk on steel roofs.

I was harder than I thought but after 3 years, the Navail Magnetic work Boot is here. It has 3 times more traction than the other magnetic shoes, can resist heat up to 212°F (100°C) and last but not least, can resist cuts with only limited and local damage. 
Not only that but we also made sure to make the shoe as comfortable as possible, featuring a slight heel to absorb some of the roof steepness (soft slope). Even with a strong magnetic grip, it is still easy to lift your feet thank to the way the magnetic field is located close to the sole (Walk&Lock).
Of course, since it comes down to safety, we feature a steel toe to protect against shocks and crushing plus and anti-reformation midsole to protect against nails. 

Safety, efficiency, reliability and durability. This is what we do

Name: Falca
Description:
Founded in 1957 by Antonio and Bruno Torazzi, Falca started as a small atelier from the family’s long-standing experience as wood and cork traders, carrying forward a deep-rooted craftsmanship tradition. 

Falca specialized in the creation of footwear soles using natural materials, beginning with wooden wedges designed to lighten rubber footwear.
Between 1957 and 1970s, Falca pioneered the creation of innovative wood and cork soles, laying the foundation for its future direction. 
In 1971, what started as small family-run workshop evolved into a formal company, marking a milestone in its growth and expansion.

During the 1980s, Falca ventured into the production finished footwear, starting with anatomical slippers with cork soles, followed by wooden-soled clogs and slippers.
Since then, Falca has continued to expand its product offerings while while maintaining its original focus on the usage of natural materials, particularly wood.

In 2015, the company launched the Ouigal brand (ouigal.com), followed by the introduction of the WUD brand (wud-shoes.com) in 2024, further showcasing Falca’s dedication to innovation and diversification.

Today, spanning over three generations, Falca remains dedicated to craftsmanship, ensuring that each product reflects the family’s deep respect for tradition and its unwavering pursuit of innovation - Our identity is deeply rooted in timeless tradition, while our embrace of innovation drives the evolution of our artisanal expertise, ensuring that our creations continue to remain relevant in a constantly changing landscape.

Name: Emel
Description:
Over 30 years, Emel handmade shoes have become the leading standard for children’s shoes in Europe.  Established in 1992 to meet the growing expectations of well-informed parents and the ever-evolving needs of children's feet. We have created hundreds of lasts, and thousands of models, and after decades of study, have become experts regarding children's needs for their first steps.

We produce meticulously handmade, award-winning, quality shoes made from the finest materials and backed by industry-leading prophylactic insoles. We believe every child deserves a perfect first step and we want to be there supporting them from the first step to each running, skipping, and hopping move that follows.

At Emel, we understand that your little one has their own indi-kid-ual style. We produce hundreds of models with countless of variants in color, texture, material, and closures. All handwork is done with our small, efficient team of skilled artisans for the world's most discerning clients.

All Emel shoes are backed with our legendary Lifetime Guarantee. Our shoes are an investment in your child's correct development and delivering incredible value does not mean making things cheaper. It means giving you a beautiful, durable product that will last. Emel shoes are always guaranteed for the life of the product against defects in materials and workmanship. Outside of reasonable wear and tear or abuse, we will repair or replace, free of charge, any item.

We work exclusively with sustainable materials, sourced ethically from Peru and Europe, including baby alpaca yarns and custom-woven textiles inspired by ancient Andean civilizations.

With WIRA, you can offer sneakers with heritage to your store — from a single made-to-order pair (MTO) to mini bulk or bulk production runs tailored to your audience.

We’ve developed an intuitive design configurator that allows you to personalize every detail: from pre-Columbian patterns and artisan-woven uppers to lightweight soles and premium finishes.

Let your store stand out with meaningful storytelling, luxury craftsmanship, and low-impact design.

With WIRA, you don’t just sell sneakers. You carry a legacy and heritage

Perché lavorare non deve significare soffrire.

Il nostro obiettivo?
Portare più benessere sul lavoro, un paio di scarpe alla volta.

Name: HAZZLE
Description:
Hazzle is a renowned Bangladeshi leather brand founded in 2016, dedicated to crafting premium footwear and lifestyle accessories that blend timeless design with modern comfort. From handcrafted shoes and loafers to boots, sandals, jackets, belts, wallets, and perfumes — every Hazzle product reflects quality, precision, and passion.

With a deep commitment to craftsmanship and authenticity, Hazzle uses genuine leather and skilled artisans to ensure durability and style in every creation. Our philosophy is simple — to make genuine leather fashion accessible and long-lasting for men who value both comfort and class.

Today, Hazzle proudly operates three physical outlets across Dhaka City and a growing eCommerce platform, making it easier than ever for customers to shop our products from anywhere in Bangladesh. Each outlet reflects the brand’s premium aesthetic and dedication to personalized customer experience.

Our team of professionals — from designers to retail experts — share a common mission: to deliver exceptional quality and customer satisfaction. We focus on innovation, trend awareness, and sustainability, constantly refining our processes to match international standards while keeping our Bangladeshi heritage alive.

Hazzle is now entering a new phase of growth through strategic investment opportunities, welcoming partners who share our vision of expanding the brand nationwide and globally.

Mission: To craft premium, sustainable leather products that inspire confidence and comfort.
Vision: To become Bangladesh’s most trusted and globally recognized leather lifestyle brand.
Values: Quality • Integrity • Craftsmanship • Customer Satisfaction

At Hazzle, every product tells a story — of skill, dedication, and the art of true leather craftsmanship.

he company's philosophy is to create and develop new products providing soft, comfortable, casual, reliable, fashionable shoes for all purposes. Each individual part of the shoe is checked thoroughly by a number of special techniques to ensure the excellent quality that makes them stand out.

Name: El Tempo
Description:
In the marvellous language of Esperanto, EL Tempo means "Beyond Time." Over 20 years ago, when our company emerged, we deliberately chose this name.

EL Tempo embodies timeless values: beauty, comfort, affordability. It represents forward momentum: rhythm, movement, resourcefulness. The footwear brand EL Tempo continues the traditions of Spanish craftsmen, from whom we crafted our first models, always delivering impeccable quality, innovative technologies, and a blend of modern and traditional materials to our customers.

Throughout these two decades, we've maintained our European roots, establishing our team of Russian designers and technologists who conceive footwear in line with global fashion trends and ensure quality control at every stage of production. We unite shoemakers from Spain, Portugal, Russia, China, Turkey, and consumers from various corners of our homeland and other European countries.

We create practicality and simplicity for some, vibrancy and fashion for others, but always with comfort and quality at the core. We work for you, for the motto of EL Tempo is "Freedom in every step".

Description:
SHOE DESIGN by WIESER

Jeder Maßschuh ist einzigartig und hat seine eigene Geschichte. Nach diesem Motto erlebt der Kunde die Entstehung seiner eigenen handgemachten Maßschuhe.

Verbindung von Tradition und Moderne machen das Produkt „Maßschuh“ und die Entstehung dessen zum Erlebnis! Trendige Maßschuhe sowie hochwertige Handarbeit werden bei uns in der „Schau“-Schuhmacherei in Wien Währing gezeigt.

Die Auswahl von Modell, Design und Materialien werden eingehend mit dem Meister Gerhard Wieser besprochen. Einzigartig und individuell werden ihre Wünsche mit
perfekter Passform sowie den aktuellen Trends kombiniert.

Schritt für Schritt in feinster Handarbeit entstehen ihre Maßschuhe. Live, per Foto oder Mail werden sie über die einzelnen Phasen ihres Maßschuhes informiert und begleiten somit die Entstehung ihres individuellen Schuhes.

Der Meister – Gerhard Wieser, Schuhmachermeister, Orthopädieschuhmachermeister und 13facher Goldmedaillen Gewinner – verkörpert die Philosophie von WIESER SHOE DESIGN und garantiert ihnen somit einen Auftritt nach Maß.

Name: Safe Step Comfort Shoes
Description:
Rambler Brands has been operating since 1950.

We were in the business of creating exclusive men’s shoes till 1985.

From then on till 2004 we also created unisex shoes where we shifted our client base to distribute our products to pharmacies and orthopedic stores.

Safe Step

One of our biggest innovations was the creation of Safestep which brought to the market shoes that were not like any other.

In fact, although they were all leather and anatomical, our design is much more modern and appealing so it began to attract a much larger client base and demographic.

Thileon

In 2014 we saw the creation of one of the company's newest brand.. Thileon.

This brand was created after a great demand for even more fashionable style women’s shoes but always keeping in mind high-quality materials and the use of our comfortable anatomical forms for which the company became known.

Our shoes are designed with one goal..to emphasize comfort and style in our daily activities.

With that philosophy in mind, all our shoes are designed as anatomical, leather, and modern with a huge variety of colors.

We make all our shows and we have patented all their designs.

The result of all of the above is that we have succeeded in penetrating markets such as retail companies, pharmacies, orthopedic stores and more recently dozens of foreign countries as distributors.

Our added value as a company is our expertise due to our long experience and know-how in creating and distributing anatomical comfort shoes.

We have participated in many expos and trading events to expand our brands International awareness.

We love our products we love our company we love our clients.

We are Rambler brands.

Name: Summer Lab Inc
Description:
Helping brands navigate the footwear product creation process from ideation through production. We deliver a blend of market insights, creative vision, and technical expertise to create innovative, cost-effective, and consumer-driven footwear.

Currently collaborating with brands of all sizes, from startups to global leaders, we tailor our approach to meet each brand's unique needs. Whether managing the entire process or focusing on a specific stage, we’re committed to bringing your ideas to life.

Areas of focus:
Market Research - Identifying trends, consumer preferences, and competitive opportunities.
Merchandising - Crafting product strategies to align with market demands and brand objectives.
Design - Creating innovative concepts that reflect brand identity and resonate with target markets.
Development - Managing technical prototype creation and ensuring manufacturing feasibility.
Material Sourcing - Delivering high-quality materials to meet design and cost targets.

Name: Demetra B Corp
Description:
Demetra srl B Corp è un’azienda della tradizione artigiana dei calzaturifici delle Marche.

Da un piccolo laboratorio ad Ascoli Piceno, aperto alla fine della seconda guerra mondiale dal Sg Raniero, prima le figlie e oggi le nipoti hanno sviluppato una PMI con oltre 80 dipendenti.

La proprietà, da sempre attenta alla sostenibilità ambientale e rispettosa dell’etica del lavoro, ha scelto e ottenuto che Demetra diventasse una B-corp nel 2018.

Oggi l’azienda, che ha mantenuto l’headquarter nella natia Ascoli Piceno –sede centrale e un grande impianto produttivo d’avanguardia- ha anche un ufficio di rappresentanza a Milano (Zona Buenos Aires) città cruciale per tutte le realtà che vogliano occuparsi di moda.

La nostra mission è rivoluzionare il mondo delle calzature, rendendo processi e materiali interamente sostenibili.

Vieni a scoprire le nostre collezioni di scarpe a impatto zero. 

Vieni a conoscere gli ingegneri del nostro reparto Ricerca e Sviluppo.

Name: Tiannia Barnes Footwear and Accessories
Description:
Tiannia Barnes: Where Art Meets Engineering in Footwear Design

Tiannia Barnes is more than just a shoe brand; it’s a celebration of elegance, innovation, and empowerment. Born from the creative mind of Tiannia Barnes, an engineer turned designer, our brand blends the precision of engineering with the artistry of fashion. Our shoes are crafted for the multifaceted woman who desires sophistication without sacrificing comfort. 

At Tiannia Barnes, we believe in the transformative power of shoes. Each pair is meticulously handcrafted in a family-run Italian factory, ensuring the highest quality and attention to detail. Our collections, including the illustrious Diamond Collection, are inspired by modern art and designed to evoke confidence, strength, and bold femininity. From high-powered heels to statement-making sneakers, our designs are as unique and vibrant as the women who wear them.

We are proud to be a female-founded, black-owned business committed to community and empowerment. Tiannia Barnes stands on the shoulders of trailblazers and gives back by inspiring future generations of women in STEM. We create more than just footwear; we build a legacy of innovation and support women in their journey to walk in their truth.

Join us as we redefine luxury footwear, where every step tells a story of strength, elegance, and unyielding passion. Discover a world where style meets sole, and every pair of shoes becomes a partner in your journey. Explore our collections and find your perfect pair today.

Name: CHELO'S Cuero Legitimo
Description:
Chelos es una marca líder en calzado masculino que combina la tradición artesanal con la comodidad y el estilo moderno. Nuestra amplia gama de calzados está diseñada para satisfacer las necesidades de hombres que valoran tanto la elegancia como la funcionalidad. Desde zapatos formales hasta opciones casuales y elegantes, Chelos ofrece una variedad de estilos para cada ocasión.

Nuestra plataforma de venta en línea brinda a los clientes la conveniencia de explorar detalladamente cada modelo desde la comodidad de su hogar u oficina. Cada par de zapatos viene acompañado de información exhaustiva sobre diseño, materiales y características destacadas. Además, nuestro equipo de expertos está a disposición para brindar asesoramiento personalizado a través de mensajes y correo electrónico, asegurando que cada cliente encuentre el ajuste perfecto.

En Chelos, la satisfacción del cliente es primordial. Por eso, hemos simplificado el proceso de compra al máximo. Los clientes pueden elegir entre opciones de pago seguras, incluyendo transferencias bancarias y códigos QR, así como la popular opción de pago contra entrega. Una vez confirmado el pedido, nos encargamos de la entrega a domicilio, con tarifas de envío adaptadas a la ubicación del cliente.

Cada par de calzados Chelos no es solo un artículo de moda, sino una expresión de calidad y aprecio por nuestros clientes. Cada envío incluye una tarjeta de agradecimiento, reafirmando nuestro compromiso de brindar una experiencia única y especial en cada paso del camino.

Descubre el mundo de estilo, confort y confiabilidad con Chelos, donde cada paso es una afirmación de tu personalidad y buen gusto.

Name: MONTELLIANA 1965
Description:
EN 
Founded in Montebelluna in 1965, Montelliana is a footwear brand inspired by the alpine lifestyle and rooted in Italian craftsmanship.
The strong DNA of mountain footwear — with its technical details, robust materials and functional design — is reinterpreted in a contemporary way to create styles with an urban, refined and authentic aesthetic.
Each pair is made with artisanal care, sustainable choices, and a design language that merges performance and elegance.
Tradition and innovation meet to tell a new idea of luxury: one that is born in the mountains and walks through the city.

We design two distinct lines:
Montelliana 1965 – our women's line, defined by soft alpine elegance, minimal design and premium materials.
MNTL1965 – our men’s line, rooted in outdoor codes and reimagined into contemporary, urban silhouettes with a bold identity.

IT 
Nata a Montebelluna nel 1965, Montelliana è un marchio di calzature ispirato allo stile di vita alpino e radicato nella tradizione artigianale italiana.
Il forte DNA della calzatura da montagna — con i suoi dettagli tecnici, materiali robusti e funzionali — viene reinterpretato in chiave contemporanea per dare vita a modelli dallo stile urbano, raffinato e dal gusto autentico.
Ogni scarpa è realizzata con cura artigianale, attenzione alla sostenibilità e un’estetica che unisce performance e design.
Tradizione e innovazione si incontrano per raccontare una nuova idea di lusso: quella che nasce dalla montagna e cammina nella città.

Progettiamo due linee distinte:
Montelliana 1965 – la linea femminile, caratterizzata da un’eleganza alpina essenziale, design minimale e materiali pregiati.
MNTL1965 – la linea maschile, ispirata al mondo outdoor e reinterpretata in chiave urbana e contemporanea, con una forte identità visiva.

From everyday essentials to performance-driven sports shoes, Deemok focuses on delivering value through superior craftsmanship, modern designs, and long-lasting comfort. Our state-of-the-art manufacturing capabilities and commitment to high standards have enabled us to build strong relationships with retailers and customers across India.

Name: Facit
Description:
FACIT is a leading company in the high-quality women's footwear sector, specializing in producing items for prominent brands on the Italian scene (Fendi, Borbonese, Sergio Rossi, Rupert Sanderson Londoni, and Oscar De La Renta).

Facit's story is one of innovation and resilience. Our company managed and overcame two of these: the 2023 earthquake and flood.

Those events did not undermine our desire to keep the manufacturing tradition alive in the footwear industry. We resumed operations in Tredozio factory specializing in pattern making, cutting, joining, and logistics. We bought a 40 years high quality experienced Factory in Tuscany - that deals with finishing, assembly and makes 170k items per year for well-known brands such as Gucci, Bottega Veneta, Jimmy Choo, and Michael Kors.

Our production chain is about:

* sustainability
* industry 4.0
* training of new skills.

We promote a Made in Italy production style, based on a work ethic capable of valuing all those who work with us and their talents.

Today a company with a great shoe tradition and a company into the future, to create a sustainable business model for our Regions and industry community.

Name: NALLUFOOTWEAR s.r.o.

Name: Rocky Calzados de Seguridad
Description:
ROCKY Calzados, es una empresa fundada por profesionales con 30 años de experiencia en la industria del calzado. Desde nuestro nacimiento en 2002, nos hemos especializado en la fabricación de calzado para marcas líderes del mercado, con quienes mantenemos relaciones comerciales sólidas de más de 10 años.

Especialización en Calzado de Seguridad
En 2015, lanzamos una nueva división de negocio dedicada a la producción, comercialización y distribución de calzado de seguridad. Esta línea se destaca por cumplir con los más altos estándares de diseño, calidad y durabilidad. Nuestra planta industrial se encuentra en General Pacheco, partido de Tigre, Provincia de Buenos Aires, lo que nos permite atender eficientemente al mercado local.

Calidad y Certificación
Cada par de calzado ROCKY es fabricado por expertos utilizando las mejores materias primas. Trabajamos con cuero homologado, punteras de acero certificadas, todas homologadas bajo normas IRAM 3610. Nuestros productos están diseñados para ofrecer máxima seguridad y confort en el trabajo.

Características Destacadas
Punteras de Acero Homologadas: Nuestras punteras de acero cumplen con las normas IRAM 3610, brindando seguridad y confort en cada tarea.
Suelas Resistentes: Las suelas de nuestros calzados soportan altas temperaturas, abrasión y desgaste, garantizando durabilidad y seguridad.
Propiedades Dieléctricas: Nuestros calzados son dieléctricos, ofreciendo protección contra descargas eléctricas.
Resistencia a Aceites: Las suelas están diseñadas para resistir aceites y otras sustancias industriales.
Compromiso con la Seguridad
En ROCKY Calzados, cada detalle cuenta. Utilizamos ojalillos metálicos y técnicas de cementado y cosido para asegurar una mayor durabilidad y protección en nuestros productos. Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer calzado de seguridad que cumpla con las exigencias de los profesionales de distintas industrias.
Ubicación y Contacto.
Estamos ubicados en Boulogne, partido de San Isidro.
Location: Boulogne Sur Mer, Buenos Aires Province

Name: 4me
Description:
4me is pioneering a groundbreaking approach to custom footwear, merging health, 3D printing, and professional medical expertise. We offer truly personalized, medical-grade solutions exclusively through certified podiatrists, moving beyond traditional orthotics and mass-produced shoes.

The process begins with a comprehensive foot analysis by a certified podiatrist using our state-of-the-art scanning app. This captures a precise 3D digital model, detailing arch height, pressure points, and other nuances. This data ensures a perfect functional fit.

The digital file is then processed by 4me's proprietary AI wrapping algorithm. This advanced software analyzes the scan data to generate a unique, meticulously engineered shoe structure. This additive manufacturing process allows for complex geometries and variable densities impossible with conventional methods, resulting in a shoe that addresses specific conditions (like bunions) while remaining lightweight, supportive, and breathable.

By operating exclusively through podiatrists, 4me ensures the product remains a medical-grade solution. The podiatrist provides the initial diagnosis, oversees scanning, and fits the final product, solidifying our commitment to patient care and professional expertise.

Name: Glemis Romania

Pantofii Glemis sunt creați de meșteșugari pricepuți din localitatea Vicovu de Sus, Suceava, o regiune renumită pentru tradiția de a confecționa încălțăminte de înaltă calitate. Meșteșugul este transmis din generație în generație, iar fiecare pereche de pantofi reflectă atenția la detalii și experiența acumulată de-a lungul anilor.

Cu interiorul și exteriorul realizate din piele naturală, acești pantofi sunt fabricați manual din materiale de cea mai bună calitate, garantând atât durabilitate, cât și confort. Procesul de confecționare este realizat de adevărați artiști în domeniu, care pun pasiune în fiecare etapă de producție.

Glemis colaborează cu acești meșteșugari talentați pentru a aduce în fața clienților produse autentice, lucrate cu grijă și respect pentru tradiție. Pantofii sunt realizați cu o mare atenție la detalii, fiind creați pentru a oferi nu doar confort, ci și o experiență estetică deosebită.

Pantofii Glemis reflectă perfect meșteșugul local și calitatea superioară, fiind un exemplu de excelență românească în confecționarea manuală de încălțăminte.
