Description: Palliative care for patients is well established and provides important benefits. Orthopedic Department takes the initiative for bedridden patients who suffering from different types of fractures. In the case of old aged patients it is difficult to do a surgery for an immediate cure. What we are doing is giving Ortho care, physiotherapy to retain their normal life. And help to reduce their severe pain as soon as possible. Patients with broken hip and other fractures may get the relief through our specialized Ortho care. Bone healing in these cases is impaired and often the bones do not unite. The fracture therefore needs to be fixed by a method that focuses on forming a strong, permanent, stable construct that can allow an immediate return to normal function and that will last the life of the patient, rather than using a method that focuses on fracture healing.

Name: Diamant Schuhfabrik Otto Müller KG
Description:
Die Diamant Schuhfabrik Otto Müller KG ist ein deutsches, mittelständisches Familienunternehmen, das sich auf die Herstellung von Tanzschuhen spezialisiert hat. Seit dem der Schuhmachermeister Eberhard Müller die Schuhmachertradition im Jahre 1873 mit der Eröffnung seines Ladengeschäfts in Frankfurt am Main begründete, hat sich der Familienbetrieb zu einem modernen und international agierenden Unternehmen entwickelt, welches seine Produkte in 37 Länder auf 4 Kontinenten exportiert. Der Firmensitz und Produktionsstandort ist in Bad Soden am Taunus ansässig und wird heute in der 4. und 5. Generation von Thomas Otto Müller und Thomas Oliver Müller geführt.

Die Produktpalette an Diamant Tanzschuhen umfasst Tanzschuhe für den Gesellschaftstanz sowie den Turniertanz für Kategorien wie Standard, Latein, Tango, Salsa und weiteren Tanzrichtungen. Des Weiteren werden Dance Sneaker (Turnschuhe mit geteilter oder durchgängiger Sohle für moderne Tanzrichtungen) und Tanzzubehör angeboten.

Speziell zum Tanzen entwickelt ist der Tanzschuh zugleich Fußbekleidung und Sportgerät in einem, woraus ein dem normalen Straßenschuh abgeänderter Aufbau resultiert. In der Verarbeitung müssen Tanzschuhe auf der einen Seite dem sportlichen Anspruch gerecht werden und die Bewegungsfreiheit so wenig wie möglich einschränken, auf der anderen Seite müssen sie jedoch auch passgenau verarbeitet bzw. einstellbar sein. Aus diesem Grund werden Materialien verwendet, die besonders leicht und flexibel sowie belastbar, atmungsaktiv und schweißbeständig sind.

Tänzer*Innen auf der ganzen Welt wissen: Diamant Tanzschuhe werden durch ausgesuchte Materialien zusammen mit einem über 100 jährigen Know-how unter Nutzung modernster Technologie zu einem Produkt von hervorragender Qualität verarbeitet, welches zu einem vernünftigen Preis angeboten wird. Diese Qualität, Verlässlichkeit und Anspruch auch in Zukunft beibehalten und weiter verbessern zu können, hat sich die 5. Generation zum Ziel gemacht.

Name: Parker Boot Company
Description:
in the heart of Texas where tradition meets innovation, Zephan Parker stands as a beacon of American Craftsmanship.  Born and raised in the vibrant city of Houston, Parker’s journey began in the unassuming town of Lampasas, where he apprenticed at the renown Jass Boot Shop. It was there amidst the rolling hills of central Texas, that he began to ,aster the art of crafting the true working cowboy boot - rugged, durable, and authentic to its core.

In 2014, alongside his with Cathleen, Zephan founded the Parker Boot Company in the very neighborhood he grew up, near the Heights Houston. Their vision was simple yet profound: to blend the raw, unyielding spirit of Texas cowboy with the refined elegance of modern craftsmanship. The vision was honed under the guided cue of his mentor, Dave Wheeler of Wheeler Boot Co.,whose influence helped Parker elevate his craft to new heights. Together, they merged the ruggedness of the central Texas cowboy boot with the sophisticated nuances of high-end design, giving birth to what is now known as the Parker Boot Company - the epitome of American Luxury in Western wear.

Parker Boot Company is more than a brand; it is a testament to the pursuit of excellence. Every pair of boots is a symbol of Zephan’s dedication to heritage, quality, and the relentless quest for perfection. Today, with his team of passionate artisans, Parker Boot Comapny continues to set the standard of American Craftsmanship, embracing the ethos of honesty, integrity, and freedom that defines Texas spirit. 

For over a decade, Zephan Parker has not only crafted exceptional boots but also built a legacy of teaching and team building. His commitment ensures that the traditions of western boot making will endure for generations to come, carried forward by a new generation of makers who share his passion and dedication. Parker Boot company is not just about footwear; it’s about creating an experience - one that is steeped in tradition, innovation, and excellence.

Aktualnie produkuje i dostarcza na potrzeby armii polskiej i służb mundurowych innych krajów kilkaset tysięcy par butów rocznie. Większość obuwia montowana jest systemem bezpośredniego wtrysku (najbardziej trwałe połączenie spodu z cholewką). Zdobyte doświadczenie przy wytwarzaniu skomplikowanego i wymagającego obuwia militarnego firma DEMAR wykorzystuje także w produkcji nowoczesnego obuwia najwyższej jakości.

Firma posiada w swoim asortymencie:
- profesjonalne obuwie myśliwskie i wędkarskie
- specjalistyczne obuwie ochronne i robocze
- kalosze i śniegowce dla dzieci – KIDS Demar
- obuwie rekreacyjne - HOBBY Demar

Mamy nadzieję, że nasze produkty spełnią Państwa oczekiwania. Zachęcamy do odwiedzania naszej strony internetowej, na której możecie Państwo zapoznać się z aktualną ofertą obuwia produkowanego przez firmę DEMAR.

Name: Espadril
Description:
Espadrilles made my hand - Espadril represents the history and tradition of Spain. 

Our styles are the modern reinterpretation of the classic mediterranean espadrilles, the soul of summer romanticism.

In 2014 with the dream to take the art of making espadrilles to African, Espadrilles founders South African Rizqah Issacs and Spanish Patricia Terre trained a team of women in this old Mediterranean craft and started producing their own espadrilles at Espadril's first store and workshop in the heart of Cape Town, where every pair was made to the customer's needs and specifications. Each and every part of the process is made by hand. 

As the company grew and transitioned to accommodate a demanding online market and expanded to international markets, production was moved to Spain, where expert hands give life to our designs. 
Espadril's African artisans are still a part of the team and produce small collections for the South African market. 

With designs inspired by the Mediterranean summer, Espadril wants to change the way the world understands espadrilles. 
We are slowly growing into new markets and spreading our love and passion for this art, which has almost disappeared.

Name: FYVFY
Description:
Our Name
Our company name is FYVFY and is short for 5 versus 5 and is pronounced FIGH “V” FIGH. This is captured in our name (“FY” is short for “five” and “V” for “versus”) and our logo.  It is a reference to what basketball is about; five vs five or FYVFY.
Our logo creatively encapsulates the name FYVFY by playing with the position of three Vs. In Roman numerals a V means 5. In English text, a V means “V”, but it is also often an abbreviation for “versus”. Our logo captures the duality of the meaning of V and literally means 5 versus 5. 

The “shoe”
The FY-DENY I is named based on the purpose of the product: deny dust, dirt, grime, water, muck and whatever else is on the floor, in the street, on the grass, in the bathroom or wherever your basketball shoes used to go. We threw the FY in the product name because we thought it sounded kind of cool and its part of our company name!  

Th FY-DENY is designed to zip on over your basketball shoe so that you can get to the court and play and get off the court and go.  Don’t lose your grip.

Our company
We are an American company born from sheer desire to protect those soles and for the absolute love of sport and competition. We promise to protect your soles and we hope in turn, you promise to represent your five the best you can. Like us on Facebook or Instagram or tweet about us…you get the assist!

Name: Nos Ailes
Description:
Nos Ailes is a footwear design and innovation studio that helps brands, creators, and companies unlock new revenue through foam footwear. We design, validate, and prepare market-ready products that turn existing audiences into buyers fast.

Most brands struggle to enter footwear because it feels complex, expensive, and slow. We remove all of that. Our team handles design, prototyping, production partners, and launch strategy in one streamlined system so clients can test and scale footwear with almost no lift on their end.

Over the past few years, we’ve partnered with top celebrities, global brands, and high-growth companies like Chris Brown and Diamond Supply Co. to create iconic foam silhouettes that have generated millions in revenue. Our work includes everything from collectible 3D printed prototypes to full foam footwear releases, all built to help partners find their winning product faster.

If you want to add footwear to your lineup, tap into a new category, or validate a bold idea without the usual risk, our system was built for you.

Explore how we work and see what’s possible:

www.nosailes.com
info@nosailes.com

Name: Yıldem Terlik ve Ayakkabı
Description:
Yıldem Terlik ve Ayakkabı, Türkiye'nin öncü ayakkabı ve terlik markalarından biridir. 2012 yılında vizyoner bakış açısıyla kurulan firmamız, ayak giyim sektöründe yüksek kalite standartlarını, rahatlık ve estetiği bir araya getirerek müşterilere sunmaktadır.
Misyonumuz: Kaliteyi, rahatlığı ve şıklığı bir araya getirerek, müşterilerimize ayak giyim alanında üst düzey deneyimler sunmak ve sektörümüze yön vermek.
Vizyonumuz: İleri teknoloji ve yenilikçi tasarım anlayışımızla, global ölçekte tanınan ve tercih edilen bir ayakkabı ve terlik markası olmak.
Değerlerimiz:
Tutarlılık: Sözlerimizle ve eylemlerimizle arasında tutarlılık sağlayarak güven oluşturuyoruz.
Esneklik: Değişen pazar koşullarına adapte olmak için esneklik gösteriyor, yeniliklere açık bir yaklaşım sergiliyoruz.
Şeffaflık: Faaliyetlerimiz hakkında tüm paydaşlarımızı net bir şekilde bilgilendiriyor, güvenilir bir iletişim sağlıyoruz.
Kalite: Ürünlerimizde ve hizmetlerimizde mükemmel kaliteyi standart olarak benimsiyoruz ve müşteri memnuniyetini merkeze koyuyoruz.
Etik: Yasalara, ahlaki değerlere ve çevreye saygılı, şeffaf ve dürüst bir iş etiği ile hareket ediyoruz.
Yıldem Terlik ve Ayakkabı olarak, Gaziantep 5. Organize Sanayi Bölgesi'nde modern ve örnek tesislerde faaliyet gösteriyoruz. 10.000 metrekarelik arazi üzerine kurulu olan tesisimiz, 6000 metrekare kapalı alanda son teknoloji ekipmanlarla üretim yapmaktadır. Aylık 300.000 çift üretim kapasitesiyle, hem iç pazarda hem de uluslararası arenada güçlü bir konum elde etmiş bulunmaktayız.
Öncelikle kendi markamızın yanı sıra fason markalar için de üretim yaparak, 20'den fazla ülkeye ihracat gerçekleştirmekteyiz. ISO 9001-2000 standartlarına uygun üretim ve sosyal uygunluk kriterlerine uyumlulukla, faaliyetlerimizi uluslararası kalite standartlarına taşıdık.

Name: Modena Ayakkabı OnBoot Day Tük Mal Tic Ltd Şti
REY Footwear Corp.
Description:
ABOUT US
RFC is a New Delhi based manufacturer specializing in premium grade footwear. Born as an artisanal company, we embrace knowledge, skill and passion necessary to produce the highest quality footwear. Our shoes are born from the hands of highly skilled shoemakers. We provide design, development, prototyping and manufacturing solutions for shoe companies, international brands and fashion start-ups. Offering services to both private labels and individual clientele, our founder Shrey Gupta has been supervising the entire manufacturing process for over 10 years now. Our shoes are aimed at men, women and kids. We particularly specialize in producing boots, moccasins, drivers, dress shoes and sneakers. The RFC factory is a true specialist of Hand-welted and Norwegian constructions. Patina footwear is yet another expertise. Sartojiva, is our inhouse brand focused on delivering a true bespoke experience to its most valued and famous client base.

Shoemaking is truly a form of art and to achieve the utmost quality, a precise level of workmanship is required. It is a long and laborious process, a result of artisans’ in-depth knowledge accumulated over the years. We employ the best manufacturing techniques throughout the various stages of production. Our ability to use modern and advanced machinery along with age-old craftsmanship enable us to produce unmatched quality. At RFC, we always pay attention to the evolution of international markets to keep ourselves abreast with global consumer taste.

OUR MISSION
As a footwear factory, we embrace creativity and give shoe companies an opportunity to create unique pieces by applying the art of artisanal craftsmanship.

MADE-TO-ORDER PLATFORM
RFC factory offers a one of its kind made to order shoe platform to private labels and boutique brands. We are India’s best production facility manufacturing top of the line custom made shoes for 25+ brands from over 5 countries, including India, UK, France, UAE and Australia.

porque ayuda a contaminar menos y contribuir más.

Y ya que se trata de un Acerca de, no nos olvidemos de quiénes la formamos y cómo somos. Personas inquietas, de estas que siempre tienen un objetivo en la vida o un reto ese día, y que se proponen cumplirlo. Porque sabemos muy bien tener sueños por experiencia propia.

Name: 3MinaWave Shoe & Bag Factory
Description:
3Mina Wave is the sourcing and development division of 3Mina InfoTech Inc., providing global brands, startups, and private-label clients with full-service manufacturing support across footwear, handbags, travel accessories, and lifestyle goods. Based in Dongguan, China, we connect clients directly with factories, materials, and production teams throughout Asia.

We specialize in guiding brands through the entire product lifecycle — from concept and sampling to production, quality control, and logistics. Our team works hands-on with factories in China, Vietnam, and the Philippines to ensure accurate development, responsible sourcing, and consistent production standards.

What We Do:
• Product development (footwear, handbags, SLGs, travel goods)
• Factory sourcing & supplier management
• Sampling, materials sourcing & technical development
• Production oversight & quality control
• Startup brand consulting (costing, timelines, MOQ strategy)
• Tech packs, development briefs & seasonal direction
• Export, logistics & shipping coordination

Who We Support:
• Emerging brands launching new product lines
• Established brands seeking new production partners
• Designers needing development support in Asia
• Startups entering the footwear or accessories market

3Mina Wave provides the on-the-ground expertise brands need to navigate manufacturing in Asia — delivering reliable development, transparent communication, and scalable production solutions.

Siamo un team di professionisti appassionati che, dopo anni nel mondo della fast fashion, ha scelto di intraprendere una nuova strada.

Abbiamo rivoluzionato il concetto di calzature, utilizzando materiali organici e innovativi come la vinaccia e il mycelium dei funghi, trasformando scarti naturali in scarpe di alta qualità. Le nostre sneakers non offrono solo stile e comfort, ma rappresentano anche un modo concreto per contribuire a un futuro più sostenibile.

In Demetra, siamo convinti che la moda debba rispettare la Terra. 
Ogni nostra scelta è guidata da principi di trasparenza, responsabilità e rispetto. 
Siamo fieri di essere una Società Benefit e una B-Corp certificata, impegnata a fare la differenza, non solo attraverso i nostri prodotti, ma anche con le nostre pratiche aziendali.

Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio verso una moda più consapevole e sostenibile  ➜ Visita il nostro Sito

Name: Techno PU
Description:
With over 20 years of experience, Techno PU Industrial Automation specializes in designing, manufacturing, and servicing high-quality machinery and automation systems for the polyurethane (PU) and polymer processing industry. We support manufacturers with reliable, efficient, and tailor-made solutions that improve productivity, reduce downtime, and ensure consistent product quality.

What We Do
• PU & polymer processing machinery
• Custom automation and process control systems
• Installation, commissioning, and technical support
• Upgrades, optimization, and maintenance services

Why Choose Us
Our team combines deep industry expertise with a customer-focused approach. Every machine or system is built to match the specific needs of the client, from small-scale setups to full production lines. We prioritize durability, ease of operation, and long-term service support to help our customers grow sustainably.

Our Mission
To deliver innovative, reliable, and cost-effective automation solutions that empower manufacturers to achieve higher efficiency and better performance.

Our Vision
To be a leading and trusted partner in polyurethane and polymer processing technology — recognized for quality, service, and continuous improvement.

Let’s collaborate to elevate your manufacturing process.

Name: Fuqing Fushenda Plastic Co,LTD. (FSD)
Description:
Fuqing Fushenda Plastic Co., LTD. (FSD) is not just a shoe factory; we are the heartbeat of innovative and stylish footwear in Fuqing, Fujian Province, China.


Immersed in the art of shoemaking for over 30 years, FSD has mastered the craft of creating not just shoes, but fashion statements. Our Flip Flops, Sandals, and Sliders are not mere accessories; they are expressions of comfort, style, and personality for Women, Men, and Kids alike.


Beyond our commitment to fashion, FSD takes pride in adhering to the highest ethical and quality standards. Our shoes undergo stringent audits, including BSCI, Sedex, HIGG, GSV, Target, GRS, ensuring that each pair is a testament to both craftsmanship and responsibility.


What sets us apart is not just our experience but our holistic approach. FSD offers a unique one-stop service, leveraging state-of-the-art machinery and an integrated supply chain all housed within our dynamic facility. From our own fly knitting workshop to the bustling injection workshop, vibrant printing workshop, soulful sole foaming workshop, and the precision of our testing lab — every stage is a dance of creativity and precision.


Join us in stepping into the future of footwear. At FSD, we don't just make shoes; we craft experiences that walk with you.

Jest to platforma, która została skonstruowana w oparciu o innowacyjne technologie w celu zapewnienia szerokiej gamy wysokiej jakości badań MR. Dzięki temu możemy zaoferować Państwu całe spektrum badań MR, poczynając od stawów poprzez badania neurologiczne czy naczyniowe, a kończąc na badaniu całego ciała. Zapewniamy nie tylko wysokiej jakości obrazowanie, ale również opisy i obsługę pacjenta na najwyższym poziomie. Nie zwlekaj – zadzwoń już dzisiaj i umów się na badanie – ZAPRASZAMY.

Name: Demetra Shoes
Description:
Chi Siamo
Demetra è una società Benefit con certificazione B-Corp, nata dalla volontà della sua fondatrice di dire NO al Fast Fashion e creare delle calzature combinassero estetica, qualità e rispetto per l’ambiente.

Le nostre calzature sono amiche del pianeta!
I nostri prodotti, per combattere l'inquinamento prodotto dall'industria fashion, sono composti da materie di origine organica, donando loro una nuova vita. 

Non può esserci bellezza in una moda che distrugge la terra che ci ospita!

Vuoi fare la differenza? 
Le nostre scarpe lasciano un'impronta ecologica e sociale. Scegli di contribuire a migliorare il mondo in cui viviamo. 
Visita il nostro sito: www.demetrashoes.com e scopri come diventare un nostro rivenditore ufficiale.

Name: Demetra
Description:
Demetra è un'azienda all'avanguardia nel settore delle calzature ecosostenibili. 

Il nostro brand, fondato con l'obiettivo di coniugare estetica, qualità e rispetto per l'ambiente, si distingue per la produzione di scarpe a basso impatto ambientale, utilizzando materiali organici e processi innovativi. 

Demetra è una Società Benefit e siamo orgogliosi di essere una B-Corp certificata, affermando così il nostro impegno per il benessere sociale ed ambientale. 

Unisciti a noi in questa avventura verso un futuro in cui stile e responsabilità ambientale si incontrano. 

Resta aggiornato su tutte le nostre novità, collaborazioni e progetti seguendo la nostra pagina.

Name: Demetra - Sustainable Footwear
Description: Demetra è un brand italiano di calzature sostenibili che unisce qualità, comfort e design. Utilizziamo solo materiali organici, come la vinaccia, per ridurre l’impatto ambientale trasformando scarti naturali in innovazione. Dopo il successo della linea sportiva, stiamo per lanciare Urban, una nuova collezione pensata per la vita di tutti i giorni e presto disponibile anche in Europa.

Name: Demetra
Description:
Non l'ennesimo brand fast fashion, ma calzature a basso impatto ambientale accessibili a tutti.

Per combattere l’inquinamento dell’industria della moda, le nostre scarpe sono composte da materie di origine organica, come la bio-polimerizzazione della vinaccia. In questo modo, possiamo garantire comodità e stile utilizzando materiali di scarto e dandogli nuova vita.

Demetra è una Società Benefit e da poco è stata confermata come B-Corp

Name: Demetra Ecofootwear
Description:
Demetra si distingue nel panorama Italiano per la produzione di calzature ecosostenibili derivanti dalla lavorazione della vinaccia.

Nasce dall'idea condivisa di professionisti derivanti da settori industriali e artigianali diversi e mossi dallo stesso desiderio di essere partecipi al cambiamento immaginando un mondo più verde, responsabile dove le persone sono al centro.

Ogni nostro modello di scarpe di distingue per la qualità, la comodità e il design originale, il tutto prodotto grazie ad una filiera completamente green che parte dagli scarti di lavorazione dell'uva.

Demetra è una società che parte dall'unione delle eccellenze del territorio e al territorio restituisce tutta cura e la sapienza di cui è capace.

Name: Demetra
Description:
Spinti dai nostri ideali lavoriamo per cambiare le regole dell'industria della moda, producendo scarpe che combinano estetica e rispetto per il posto in cui camminano.

Le nostre scarpe sono composte da materie di origine organica, in questo modo garantiscono comodità e stile utilizzando materiali di scarto e dandogli nuova vita.

Da poco riconosciuti come B-corp e con sede a Cagliari, continueremo a creare calzature comode, con design unici e in linea con le esigenze del nostro pianeta, perché non ci può essere bellezza in una moda che distrugge la terra che ci ospita!
